## Queen Victoria influenced the mourning customs of her time.
When Queen Victoria’s husband, Prince Albert, died in 1861, Britain’s queen entered a mourning from which she never emerged. In keeping with the etiquette of the time for widows, she rarely wore colors, and even then only the purples that were permitted in half-mourning. She avoided social outings (being out in public was seen as being in extremely bad taste for widows), kept Prince Albert’s rooms just as he had left them, and slept with a postmortem photograph of him above her head. Although she was criticized for the depths of her mourning, many other widows of the era [copied her](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suchic&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) signs of grief. At the time, it was common to swathe the house in black crepe, send intricate black-bordered memorial cards, and wear all-black clothing (down to underwear and jewelry, the latter often made of jet). Widows were expected to mourn for roughly two years, and widowers for three months.

clean_body: Though it may seem shocking to us today, taking and displaying postmortem photographs was a popular practice in European and American life during the Victoria era. | T hough it may seem shocking to us today, taking and displaying postmortem photographs was a in European and American life during the Victoria era. In a time before modern sanitation, vaccines, and antibiotics, death was commonplace, and making images of the dead was part of mourning rituals. Postmortem portraiture — in the form of drawings and paintings — had long been available to those who could afford it, but the invention of photography the trend. While we tend to associate death with the morbid or grotesque today, many of these images were beautiful and emotional remembrances. The dead were often depicted in their beds or coffins accompanied by flowers (such as lilies and forget-me-nots) or keepsakes. If the deceased was a small child, they were held or propped up by family members. These photos were often displayed in parlors and family photo albums alongside pictures of the living, or they might be carried in lockets. Postmortem photography reached its peak in the 1860s and 1870s, but began to fade away by the early 20th century, and had all but disappeared by the 1930s. By then, the cultural attitude toward death and mourning had changed. It was less likely that people would pass away at home and be taken care of by family members, and more likely that death was seen as a matter for hospitals and funeral homes. The mass casualties of World War I also encouraged a turn away from elaborate Victorian-era mourning customs. For one thing, families simply didn’t have time to mourn so many losses, and these wartime casualties often took place far from home. Yet today, postmortem photographs have become a treasured item for many collectors, who see great tenderness in these attempts at immortality. | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . When Queen Victoria’s husband, Prince Albert, died in 1861, Britain’s queen entered a mourning from which she never emerged. In keeping with the etiquette of the time for widows, she rarely wore colors, and even then only the purples that were permitted in half-mourning. She avoided social outings (being out in public was seen as being in extremely bad taste for widows), kept Prince Albert’s rooms just as he had left them, and slept with a postmortem photograph of him above her head. Although she was criticized for the depths of her mourning, many other widows of the era signs of grief. name: Shane Jenkins, Stand in the Gap
subject: My January 6 story
body:
This email isn’t easy to write.

| | |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8gu324ea3vg309fl57vm49u8v6m7r6fgkj0tnh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm8or4c5h2bs) Friend,

This email isn’t easy to write. In fact, it’s one of the most difficult emails I’ve ever sent.

**You see, I was at the Capitol on January 6, 2021. Let me tell you what I’ve experienced since then...**

It all started as a simple rally for those who were concerned about the election process and the results of the election, which is what drew me to DC as well.

It was a beautiful day. Even though we were there about a serious matter, the people there filled the event with praying, singing, and dancing. I almost felt like I was at church. It was a time of joy, and I met some wonderful people.

Later on, after the rally, we were on our way to the Capitol.

**What started as a beautiful day quickly turned to chaos, violence, and brutality.**

I saw the police brutalizing people who were taking no action against them. They were shooting into the crowd with pepper spray, pepper balls, and flash grenades. It was bad, but I had no idea how much worse it was going to get for us.

Due to the recourse, the FBI took me into custody on March 5, 2021.

During my time in the DC Department of Corrections, I was surrounded by other January 6th defendants. I witnessed their struggles and challenges firsthand.

While several organizations were raising funds to support these individuals, many of their needs were still going unmet. The political nature of January 6th made it difficult for established groups, which typically assist people in similar situations, to step in and help us.

Seeing this gap, I felt compelled to take action based on my previous experience with CHARM Prison Ministry.

Even while behind bars, I envisioned creating an organization that would stand up for those who were suffering and facing relentless persecution. Knowing I couldn’t do it alone from inside prison, I assembled a dedicated team of people on the outside to help bring this vision to life.

That’s how Stand in the Gap was born — a commitment to stand in solidarity with and fight for those who are being overlooked or mistreated.

Our goal is to provide support and advocacy for those in need, ensuring they aren’t left to face their challenges alone.

[If you are willing to stand with me to help these patriots rebuild their lives, please join me today by donating whatever you can generously afford to help Stand In The Gap today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2s8afp0s1jfmd4do2691rdrcl7m25e1ac03nui0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm8or4c5h2bs)
[Donate](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuvic5opi2qsocjuausojdkk4ad16i62djrl82to_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm8or4c5h2bs)
This vision is deeply rooted in my faith. In the Bible, Jesus speaks about remembering the prisoner — passages like Matthew 25:36, where He says, _“I was in prison and you came to visit me,”_ remind us of our duty to care for those who are suffering.

Like some people, I have a checkered past, saved by the blood of Christ. I’m not proud of it, but it has given me a unique perspective and a very solid understanding of daily operations on the inside of various facilities.

_But what I witnessed in the DC DOC was like nothing that I had ever seen before..._

We faced nothing short of the intentional deprivation of basic human rights.
* They denied us haircuts and nail clippers for a year.
* They denied us religious services and visitation for two years.
* The guards took physical force against January 6th detainees, from pepper spray to beating them up.
* They would regularly throw individuals into solitary confinement, known as the special housing unit.
* They terrorized J6ers in the DC DOC.

The rest of the jail wasn’t walking around with shackles, belly chains, handcuffs, or a black box; however, because the government labeled us as terrorists, we received the worst treatment.

**Even being an inmate before, I was never targeted for having a certain political or religious belief.**

It was a culture shock to those who had never been in trouble. Some of us who had done time before, like myself, became a sounding board for everyone else.

We really only had each other in the DC DOC, but we were thankful for that.

Stand in the Gap gives me the opportunity to draw from the profound experiences I’ve witnessed and endured and keep driving meaningful change for those who are incarcerated and those who seek to rebuild their lives upon release.

There are nearly 1,600 American patriots who need to rebuild their lives. That’s exactly what Stand in the Gap is helping them do!

[Can you please send an urgent donation of $10 or more to support Stand in the Gap? I am hoping to get 100 new supporters to help us in our mission to rebuild the lives of Americans who need us now more than ever.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2q1maljsgns3487jti3i3m83qib15cetkbk0u4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm8or4c5h2bs)
[Donate](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdrq0k36d1vghg3sv3ih6l9nqorf9lqnqdl8dp88_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm8or4c5h2bs)
At the heart of our mission is the belief that we must see the humanity in all people — no one should be forgotten or discarded.

We cannot forget the prisoner.

Stand in the Gap is about standing alongside them, fighting for their dignity, and helping them become contributing members of society again.

[Please consider donating $10, $35, $50, $100, or any amount you can generously afford today. >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfgnr7th3323gf8pqctil82711u8urqqvp9bbpl8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm8or4c5h2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8tq6esu94egar1cslk79kkno8fb7d8alhiso8o0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm8or4c5h2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6k5eo0er8kk5q61md0ri263svsjrvk2kp2sqja8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm8or4c5h2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zui386373ja3698p7qalqofhn1ve0qh4ffl0t678_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm8or4c5h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze4oj9ic5s4osa74db3mejj97jn9av81g9b9udu8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm8or4c5h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze688ua8cj7ircki01tlvial6lisg3i5lj65lbvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm8or4c5h2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq7p3urlkrs6qemluvshrmph0q3qhfiukg5o6mu0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm8or4c5h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3q7s27g1ljb08r8p9qc663ggv5h5vj20bm3d2jg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm8or4c5h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbuuet8gsin03v2n8uv347uhimdkmsgfbdc0gago_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm8or4c5h2bs)
I’m thrilled to lead this effort and see the transformative impact it can have.

Sincerely,

Shane Jenkins
Founder and Executive Director of Stand in the Gap

subject: The Chairman wants your thoughts

body:
This will only take a minute or two of your time.

|
---
| | | Friend, this isn't your ordinary survey.

Your submissions will help us plan for 2026 because, after all, you're our greatest advisor.

We have questions about policy, election strategy, budgeting, and much more.

Can you take two minutes to advise our next move?

---
| | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsst4l983es0f88oho52b3s0ms319ahaq228v358_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm4pb2cjh2bs "TAKE THE SURVEY")
---

This is how we will win, and we've been directed by Speaker Johnson, Chairman Hudson, and Majority Leader Scalise to reach out as soon as possible.

We need to know what the voters are thinking and what you're hearing from your friends.

This Spring Survey allows you to voice your opinion directly to House leadership.

So please, can you take just two minutes to take the NRCC's 2025 Spring Survey?

Team NRCC

name: eastermeals@uso.org
subject: This Easter, brighten a service member's day
body:
A taste of home goes a long way
[](https://www.uso.org)
[DONATE TODAY](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/XDEAH9Zp8~S3/YTJOa1VOVE8zaVFiQXdteFlyQXVpN2xpZ1dSdy9XMW9qckh6MXBuTGc2TURlR2tyUFJNVkVTMnRZaTlGQUV2U0M3NWtWTGdnaTY0OHkyRFY1anJaa3pJeWRoZ2xPRzdkaEJ4MWFIZmVVSFE9S0/Rkpob1VkTW1xYXdzdVR0RmN2UitzVGxxK0N4eE1FVm15b2kxUDRoa0VEd05PbjVyZkFTL1FDRUpGZHhVVDcvbFViT0F4MUZvRHBiSDAzWjNUNncxc3pvNXJGVnRJM2FoS0) [**Your gift can help fund meals for our service members this Easter.**](https://links.e.uso.) [**GOAL: 5,000 MEALS**](https://links.e.uso.)
---
| [RUSH AN EASTER GIFT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/A-VKBb2eApQ9/YTJOa1VOVE8zaVFiQXdteFlyQXVpN2xpZ1dSdy9XMW9qckh6MXBuTGc2TURlR2tyUFJNVkVTMnRZaTlGQUV2U0M3NWtWTGdnaTY0OHkyRFY1anJaa3pJeWRoZ2xPRzdkaEJ4MWFIZmVVSFE9S0/Rkpob1VkTW1xYXdzdVR0RmN2UitzVGxxK0N4eE1FVm15b2kxUDRoa0VEd05PbjVyZkFTL1FDRUpGZHhVVDcvbFViT0F4MUZvRHBiSDAzWjNUNncxc3pvNXJGVnRJM2FoS0)
---
Dear USO Supporter,
For our selfless service members deployed abroad, the special parts of springtime and the Easter season can feel far, far away.
Without the USO's programs, service members might find themselves in lonely barracks eating the same old mess hall food. But with your support, the USO is able to make home feel a little closer.
Our heroes sacrifice make unimaginable sacrifices in service of our country. **[Will you join us to brighten their day and help ensure they get a warm meal and other support for Easter and year-round?](https://links.e.uso.)** *

At this time of year when service members may be deeply lonely or homesick, we set a goal to help fund 5,000 warm meals and other critical military support via email and text message through April 15.
As you can imagine, this is a difficult time to be far away from loved ones and cherished traditions. **[With your generous gift today, you can help provide a touch of home for service members serving abroad this Easter season and year-round.](https://links.e.uso.)**
Thank you for supporting our heroes in uniform when they need it most.
With gratitude,
The USO

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Secure Our Elections NOW – Act Today
body:
SAVE Act up for vote this week. Tell your representative to vote YES!
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** As you know, while election integrity gains have been made over the last four years, there is still work to be done. One glaring loophole that still exists is the one that allows noncitizens to register to vote. Representative Chip Roy (R-TX) has reintroduced the Safeguarding American Voter Eligibility Act (SAVE Act, H.R. 22) to the House, and it's heading to a vote this week, likely on Thursday. The SAVE Act demands proof of citizenship for voter registration--a basic safeguard missing from current law. That's right. Right now, nobody actually has to show documentary proof of citizenship when registering to vote. H.R. 22 closes gaps in the National Voter Registration Act and the Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act that allow noncitizens to register and request overseas ballots. **ACTION:** **[Use our action page](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa5e6381/1edb9794aa5da700 "https://action.teapartypatriots.org/petition/save-act-2025")** **to call and email your congressman today and tell him or her to vote "yes" on the SAVE Act. **You can remind your representative that polling shows Americans overwhelmingly oppose noncitizens voting in our elections.** **[ Our polling in 2024](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa5e6381/1edb9794aa5da702) showed that _eighty-six percent_ of Americans oppose it! It is a fringe, radical, extremist position to oppose the SAVE Act.**** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ TAKE ACTION ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa5e6381/1edb9794aa5da704)
---
| **** The left's riding high off of recent wins, and they're dead-set against this bill. They're pressuring liberal lawmakers to unite in opposition to kill the bill, and they want to scare conservative lawmakers into voting against it. **We can 't let the left win.** Republicans may hold a slim House majority and a stronger Senate edge, but that's no guarantee. Complacency loses battles. We the people have to speak up, loud and clear, and push this bill through before 2026 to close this disastrous loophole once and for all. **Remember: whether you are represented by a Republican or Democrat, please call and email.** Do not allow the left to set the narrative that this is an unpopular bill. Americans elected Donald Trump and a Republican Congress to stop this kind of deterioration of our country. Thank you for taking action and sharing this all to action today! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa5e6381/1edb9794aa5da706)
---
|
---
|
---

---

Want to change how you receive these emails?You can **[unsubscribe](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/ua/optout?od=3z78b821f279e8235b374a03e8688062636c48fef6889d6f0093de3b9f21e3f920&rd=1edb9794aa5e6381&sd=1edb9794aa5555fc&n=11699e4c28334fb "https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/ua/optout?od=3z78b821f279e8235b374a03e8688062636c48fef6889d6f0093de3b9f21e3f920&rd=1edb9794aa5e6381&sd=1edb9794aa5555fc&n=11699e4c28334fb")** or **[update your preferences](http://$\[li:updateprofile\]$/)**.****

## Liberals Claim to Value Empathy, But Have None For Conservatives – HotAir
About a decade ago. social psychologist Jonathan Haidt did a series of studies that showed that conservatives and moderates are quite good at anticipating the values and priorities of liberals, but liberals are quite bad at understanding how conservatives think. ## Was the polio vaccine a killer, not a saviour?
THE eradication of polio has been hailed as one of the great vaccine success stories. Yet one professor disagrees and says polio data is an exercise in smoke, mirrors and sketchy statistics. Polio cases have been hidden by redefining the disease, and unthinkably, vaccines can cause paralysis, the very symptom they are designed to prevent. [...] [Read more](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/cVkY8BsHBFhph4EmnyB_z-HkwShBNzzh6zOPrCaoU0m8Y5R2onswuTJ9nu6CvMv9GTU0DUM_aFbq3K_AeXzhE36FxvQOqg6-PBiOIyheQ436LeMUHS8BrYCYMLVwvp84OacHUXjEcbLkdizEugNLySnmKYnc94UpQMuah8ynkTmd9m6Su8oKzb1zDM9qNdpjMzb8XLiEXVpEkFw_mqqHRQzby7mxvnAoeFsNm14z26bqh_J-dzSkXy6CeVAfahRAUiQgBNkv65xUGChbyNwCzqteVVx0bCLCf2VMShb6EQ5gpYGIl3WYTf5Wyz8EpRBSlOHv_9w/klpr_xTmODtTjOW3zj2BilfcMsyDvas1/7)

body:
This will only take a minute or two of your time.

|
---
| | | Friend, this isn't your ordinary survey.

Your submissions will help us plan for 2026 because, after all, you're our greatest advisor.

We have questions about policy, election strategy, budgeting, and much more.

Can you take two minutes to advise our next move?

---

body:
You’re one of America’s most informed seniors

| |
---
| | I’m writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs71octbj7iie8hb2uqlhrmom2d22blm972grmag_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmaoj6c9h2bs)
---
| | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message – will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdu7gpmst5tnp62ocdu3ve6v7roqabl235ddep5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmaoj6c9h2bs) ** You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsgdu2g70c04plndp1gcn2olvemo23s8j8eqaj58_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmaoj6c9h2bs)**

Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1softgn6s1ss2u8ou9pe69q0fp1no3teqc82ufo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmaoj6c9h2bs) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2ul7nfr8iqmphdi33ts8er37p6vrmvatte1d100_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmaoj6c9h2bs) **If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ****And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we’ll need in the next 20 months.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zics2dnkfspf949e72hgg5krh3krtemt8jon0fug_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmaoj6c9h2bs) ** AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it.**[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zieka17fjrg703tj2f7mqqmb79mqodu8qhgbqrpg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmaoj6c9h2bs) **Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.

**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

name: AMAC Action
subject: Enemies of our nation
disclaimer_text: paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation
body:
You’re one of America’s most informed seniors

| |
---
| | I’m writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat.
---
| |
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zjpaoa70qakuu33ib97oaviqtuo48e55kd4pfai0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm6p32chh2bs)
---
| | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message – will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zcom7n9s1519gpaj58cmhl48hnpostqect4mt45g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm6p32chh2bs) ** You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zb009vdesdke99s5l4fvln4s6djavv9onf7tp66o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm6p32chh2bs)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zuf855fiopd3lkr803iojgm4p1bd7a0i1513vn7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm6p32chh2bs)
---
Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zm2p6gkc86n0m1tdtrccv9sq5974mjkcsqm0k2n0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm6p32chh2bs) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zvphov1kr3foea06rirbh3mjr1h2g129bdsli6co_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm6p32chh2bs) **If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ****And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we’ll need in the next 20 months.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z5ttna5uihatkms5rhsbhsln1c2oprn0hd6h1ino_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm6p32chh2bs) ** AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it.**[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ztd13uu5s1ghdn6410vqd7jvak5s6cu973u7geng_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm6p32chh2bs) **Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z2gehjtva5qsk567a48kd0ijagig669g9thag76o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm6p32chh2bs)
---
| | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a “Stop Soros Law” and so can we! To do it, **[**AMAC Action needs your signed STOP SOROS petition and your one-time contribution of $35 or more to expand this petition drive**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zmthd50qjl1026ftc7sjp9mod4ph1h9leegs1gcg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm6p32chh2bs)**. Thank you for taking action when action is needed!
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zsv2oaumbg96vsuierabqlv2g7d8r48slf3l2tpo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm6p32chh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zm8htn0h20su6cmjhppai2389rsj3tvhnn7q98d8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm6p32chh2bs)
---
_**_**[Support AMAC Action](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ziieh6i2r5kpjc5h072i1qmf5sjglj5330au1t9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gm6p32chh2bs)**_**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.
---

name: Sen. Jon Ossoff
subject: On authoritarianism
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
MAGA is committed to eliminating Democratic seats in Congress so Trump can continue his “revolution” without domestic opposition.
#

_Our new reality_ --
From classrooms to boardrooms to local governments and the press, Americans now fear political retribution from their own government.
Think of the CEO who bends the knee after public threats of prosecution. Or the newspaper owner who decides it’s safer to bury editorial criticism of the President.
The President and his lieutenants relish the power of intimidation. _And they’re using it._
***
Before my election to represent Georgia in the U.S. Senate, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide.
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminds me of countries where dissent is silenced by intimidation.
_“We don’t want any trouble.” “We’re not sticking our necks out right now.” “We don’t need an investigation.”_
**These things should never be said in the United States.**
*******
During the confirmation hearings for RFK Jr., I noted the Republican Senate’s total capitulation to Trump.
Then they confirmed to lead the FBI (for TEN YEARS) a Trump loyalist who enters office having composed what many call an “enemies list” of MAGA’s adversaries.
_To lead the FBI._
***
Friend: Only by regaining Congressional power can we reverse this.
Remember: in 2026, I’m the only Democratic U.S. Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won.
MAGA needs me defeated and gone.
**_Help me defeat them in a landslide. Help fight back.**_
[**Please split $5 between my campaign and GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-apr25.eBryvR&refcode=em250407-1-b&t=1&akid=10276%2E3935704%2EqFXTF4)

clean_body: MAGA is committed to eliminating Democratic seats in Congress so Trump can continue his “revolution” without domestic opposition. Our new reality -- From classrooms to boardrooms to local governments and the press, Americans now fear political retribution from their own government. Think of the CEO who bends the knee after public threats of prosecution. Or the newspaper owner who decides it’s safer to bury editorial criticism of the President. The President and his lieutenants relish the power of intimidation. And they’re using it. * Before my election to represent Georgia in the U.S. Senate, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminds me of countries where dissent is silenced by intimidation. “We don’t want any trouble.” “We’re not sticking our necks out right now.” “We don’t need an investigation.” These things should never be said in the United States. During the confirmation hearings for RFK Jr., I noted the Republican Senate’s total capitulation to Trump. Then they confirmed to lead the FBI (for TEN YEARS) a Trump loyalist who enters office having composed what many call an “enemies list” of MAGA’s adversaries. To lead the FBI. Friend: Only by regaining Congressional power can we reverse this. Remember: in 2026, I’m the only Democratic U.S. Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won. MAGA needs me defeated and gone. Help me defeat them in a landslide. Help fight back. # ACTION ALERT: VOTE YES ON
SB 2119, SB 269 AND SB 407
|
---
SB 2119 by Senator Kevin Sparks protects medical and veterinary college students by allowing them to file exemptions for any required vaccinations. SB 269 by Senator Charles Perry would require healthcare providers to report vaccine and drug-related adverse events. SB 407 by Senator Mayes Middleton would prohibit healthcare facilities from denying their employees’ reasons of conscience exemptions to vaccines. All of these bills are being heard in the Senate Health & Human Services Committee this week. **TAKE ACTION NOW BY URGING MEMBERS OF THE SENATE HHS COMMITTEE TO SUPPORT THESE BILLS!** **1 \- Email the Committee Members:**
|
---
| | [ Click here to generate an email to all committee members! ](mailto:bryan.hughes@senate.texas.gov,bob.hall@senate.texas.gov,kelly.hancock@senate.texas.gov,borris.miles@senate.texas.gov,molly.cook@senate.texas.gov,lois.kolkhorst@senate.texas.gov,charles.perry@senate.texas.gov,cesar.blanco@senate.texas.gov,kevin.sparks@senate.texas.gov?subject=Vote%20YES%20on%20SB%202119%2C%20SB%20269%20and%20SB%20407&body=Dear%20Senator%2C%0A%0AI%20am%20writing%20to%20ask%20for%20your%20support%20of%20SB%202119%2C%20which%20will%20be%20heard%20in%20Health%20and%20Human%20Services%20on%20Tuesday%2C%20April%208%2C%20as%20well%20as%20SB%20269%20and%20SB%20407%2C%20which%20will%20be%20heard%20in%20Health%20and%20Human%20Services%20on%20Wednesday%2C%20April%209.%0A%0AThese%20bills%20would%20help%20protect%20college%20students%2C%20patients%2C%20and%20healthcare%20workers.%0A%0AThank%20you%2C%0A%5BYOUR%20NAME%5D)
---
|
---
___The button above_ _will populate with a sample message. You are welcome to use it as is_** _by signing your name._**
_If this button does not work on your device, please copy and paste all of the emails below in the TO: field of your draft to send just one email to all committee members at once:_____[](mailto:bryan.hughes@senate.texas.gov)bryan.hughes@senate.texas.gov; bob.hall@senate.texas.gov; kelly.hancock@senate.texas.gov; borris.miles@senate.texas.gov; molly.cook@senate.texas.gov; lois.kolkhorst@senate.texas.gov; charles.perry@senate.texas.gov; cesar.blanco@senate.texas.gov; kevin.sparks@senate.texas.gov _[](mailto:kevin.sparks@senate.texas.gov)_

These bills would help protect college students, patients, and healthcare workers. Thank you,
[YOUR NAME]

name: AMAC Action
subject: Enemies of our nation
disclaimer_text: paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation
body:
You’re one of America’s most informed seniors

| |
---
| | I’m writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat.
---
| |
---
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z8mj5ivvsthtusjkpe3ihh8bkib4130kagl8b4a0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmeo34cth2bs)
---
| | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message – will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zh1mjnh80fs57fhl6248q5uvcb3a992bm7i852r8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmeo34cth2bs) ** You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zrsmejn5s50p3qe4huhp1bo8bmo4a60m9p4du0uo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmeo34cth2bs)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zk3vgq74tle9b99kcr8c62st1e4bcddaf2jkucs0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmeo34cth2bs)
---
Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z9gtvdpivm157gk4nche54r369n1irp1d71pmr9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmeo34cth2bs) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zn4jap17807aki9jv3nmdk3aaesct7697us4ipmg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmeo34cth2bs) **If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ****And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we’ll need in the next 20 months.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2znunpm5bjuca7c9iliaunspvsvriersdublfa63o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmeo34cth2bs) ** AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it.**[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zf6mm6ulvmqqebbim1b5p5ofu74t1hj73v1hbf4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmeo34cth2bs) **Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zolpdcnd7au7vqjk6kbb2f6cq28mj17l6ukfodeg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmeo34cth2bs)
---
| | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a “Stop Soros Law” and so can we! To do it, **[**AMAC Action needs your signed STOP SOROS petition and your one-time contribution of $35 or more to expand this petition drive**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zongi42an0upi1qn24epgn25lto9rli81tnaomi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmeo34cth2bs)**. Thank you for taking action when action is needed!
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zi31ov025kglnrug87cnnvm500i9hnjkhf7qng3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmeo34cth2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z7l4q2mttcm8q8ub5g45u5m74akmu406v2k70nc0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmeo34cth2bs)
---
_**_**[Support AMAC Action](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zpon3lgiqcjhmlbjqlbrm4ck15lc3rsk48j987t8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmeo34cth2bs)**_**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.
---
| | [ **Support AMAC Action**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zpge9b0u931jkvhtsqaueul8hbit0fushemn5n3g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1gmeo34cth2bs)

So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.** And we would be honored to have you by our side. AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it. Thank you for joining us in this fight for America. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a “Stop Soros Law” and so can we! To do it, . Thank you for taking action when action is needed! | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | Pop Acta Media | Update For America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Robert F. Kennedy Jr's top dog advisor Calley Means **[dominated a Politico reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/ecc9cd64-4f39-4772-95e2-35918cea2986?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Dasha Burns in a podcast-style interview at Politico's Healthcare Summit, Wednesday.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ecc9cd64-4f39-4772-95e2-35918cea2986?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ecc9cd64-4f39-4772-95e2-35918cea2986?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Burns pushed Means on the timing of RFK's abrupt cuts to HHS. "What do you say to people in the public who are concerned if we are prepared for the next pandemic when these cuts have happened so hard so fast?" she asked.
"I'd say to the reporters in the room and the lobbyists in the room,... Have a little bit of humility about what the voters were trying to say by putting Bobby Kennedy Jr. in this position of power. Have a little bit of humility to ask why Bobby Kennedy along with Trump are the two most popular figures in America today by far."
"What the voters are trying to say, and I think they were right, is that **[the system is really on the wrong track!"](https://substack.com/redirect/ecc9cd64-4f39-4772-95e2-35918cea2986?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Means continued, adding that corporate news has become a "non-stop commercial for pharma."
Burns interjected, "But how does cutting a bunch of people at HHS solve that problem?"
"It is insane for your to insinuate that the thing standing between you and better health is more bureaucrats!" Means fired back before a heckler from the crowd started laughing out loud at his comment.
"Is that funny?!!" he shouted out to the crowd.
Watch what happened next in the tense interview:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ecc9cd64-4f39-4772-95e2-35918cea2986?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

## For All Its Flaws, American Health Care Gets a Lot Right
We all know the problems with American health care. It costs too much, there are gaps in insurance coverage, health care markets are uncompetitive, provider payments are often incomprehensible, pricing is opaque, bureaucracy is metastasizing, and our citizens face absurd barriers to personal choice of plans and providers. name: Democrats.org
subject: Not normal.
body:
---
Derek, Trump’s policies are tanking our economy, as prices are rising, and we’re facing a slowing job market with fewer paychecks to go around. He and Elon Musk have spent the last few months dismantling key federal agencies, putting thousands of people out of work. Now, Trump is floating the idea that he’ll run for a third term. **This is not normal. What he and his allies are doing threatens millions of people’s well-being and the very foundation of our democracy.** But we are not powerless, and together we can chart a new path. Millions of Americans voted against Trump and MAGA Republicans, and they’re doing it again now. This year, Democrats are overperforming in special elections, as people across the country are furious with Trump and Musk and are voting accordingly. And every Democrat we can elect is one more Democrat checking Trump’s power. The DNC is committed to organizing and mobilizing against Trump, and we are the organization best positioned to move resources to the places they’re needed most, this year and beyond. **It is time to register new voters in CT. The ones we have just do not get it.** It is time to [Vote Early CT](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/01e5a0f0-ca99-437f-a7e7-9f72fe0f543d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to counteract the Wanda's of the world.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c806f672-4c51-43f5-b284-0d27b9544e9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
After the 2024 elections, the clear next issue that Americans are told to be thinking about is
**1) What do the midterms look like; and**
**2) Will Trump have a sufficient coalition of senators and congressman to continue his efforts before becoming a "lame duck"?**

In the meantime, the democrats are forming coalitions and "peacefully protesting" in hands-off events and taking conservative slogans to achieve their goals.

_**For far too long, we 've treated elections as solely a local or state-wide events and forget that federal elections have national consequences.**_

Voters focus solely on local races to the people that show up at apple bobbings, carnivals, local rotary clubs and other events in the neighborhood. What we always forget and overlook throughout the country is that we are the United States of America: 50 autonomous states that work together under a federal rule of law to ensure some harmony between us.

**The 2024 elections in Connecticut were abysmal.
** "Voter turnout in Connecticut declined from 80% in 2020 to 76% in 2024, with 73% of towns experiencing a decrease. While towns like North Stonington and North Canaan saw an increase by over 10 percentage-points, Bridgeport's turnout dropped by 20 percentage-points, falling from 72% in 2020 to just 52% in 2024. East Hartford also saw a significant decline, with turnout dropping 15 percentage-points, from 66% to 51%. Hartford's turnout has consistently declined over the last three elections, from 63% in 2016, to 50% in 2020, to only 43% in 2024." (source [CT Data](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/cd1301ff-8e9c-47de-b61d-29a2961281ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))

_**Many registered voters simply didn 't show up to vote because they thought their vote didn't count or matter. More Nutmeggers afraid of their shadow voted during Covid, especially as Bridgeport got by with a little help from their friends like Wanda the ballot stuffer. **_
Any city that takes a week or more to finish its election results is suspect and it took a while for Bridgeport to certify.

If it's happening in Bridgeport, it's happening in other cities like Waterbury Danbury, New Haven, Hartford ... Stamford Norwalk. **IF YOU HAVE AN ELECTION STORY LET US KNOW.**

New Canaan had better turnout from grass roots efforts and during the campaign, we spent a lot of time in that town on our congressional primary and campaign for Dr. Michael Goldstein. This had an impact to the success of the victory of State Senator Ryan Fazio and he also campaigned hard there and the investment of time paid off for the 36th Senate District.

The Base is the Base and that does not move as much.
**How Do We Get New Voters or Excite Them?**
1. It's really the passionate single issue voters that pick up new issues where our focus is needed.
2. Young voters need to be excited and not indoctrinated or bribed with pizza to commit voter fraud.
3. Parents want their towns affordable so their children can afford to live in their hometowns if they choose to do so.

**Without change of leadership here, the state will continue to decline and its representation in Washington DC is also likely to decline.
**
_**Connecticut is likely to lose a congressional seat in the next census and California may lose a few as others like Florida, Texas ans Pennsylvania may gain a few seats.
**_
That may not be the worst thing for CT but it's reality.

_Growing up in the 80s - Smokey the Bear said Only You can Fight Forrest Fires._
**SO WHAT CAN YOU DO** to give the next generation the best chance of success?

**Help us educate, inform and register new voters. Tell us the issues you are willing to go out and be passionate about.**

[Vote Early CT](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/01e5a0f0-ca99-437f-a7e7-9f72fe0f543d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to is that vehicle to do so (_**it 's not electric, gas powered or a hybrid - it is fueled by Americans who believe in our system of democracy.**_

Some of us will be meeting up next Saturday, April 12 at 12 - 3pm at the [Cadillac Ranch (click for directions)](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/448fa0ac-c2ac-4ae7-910d-61eb25b28ee6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- 45 Jude Ln, Southington, CT 06489

Go to our [website](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/01e5a0f0-ca99-437f-a7e7-9f72fe0f543d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), sign up and join the [Facebook page](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d7da4503-a9aa-4c6d-9c71-61cf1eab2a36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- WE NEED BOOTS ON THE GROUND!

**OUR TIME IS NOW TO** Fight Back, Take Back CT and let's get some new voters.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=160780116&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNzgwMTE2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDQwMzQwNzIsImV4cCI6MTc0NjYyNjA3MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.W8Px2kTuFO-jxU9aY2zjzlNgX0qNbty4eyGnQPJejTQ)

Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein
_The father-son team continues on_ so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT and this country together in a meaningful way.

In the meantime, the democrats are forming coalitions and "peacefully protesting" in hands-off events and taking conservative slogans to achieve their goals. For far too long, we 've treated elections as solely a local or state-wide events and forget that federal elections have national consequences. Voters focus solely on local races to the people that show up at apple bobbings, carnivals, local rotary clubs and other events in the neighborhood. What we always forget and overlook throughout the country is that we are the United States of America: 50 autonomous states that work together under a federal rule of law to ensure some harmony between us. The 2024 elections in Connecticut were abysmal. "Voter turnout in Connecticut declined from 80% in 2020 to 76% in 2024, with 73% of towns experiencing a decrease. While towns like North Stonington and North Canaan saw an increase by over 10 percentage-points, Bridgeport's turnout dropped by 20 percentage-points, falling from 72% in 2020 to just 52% in 2024. East Hartford also saw a significant decline, with turnout dropping 15 percentage-points, from 66% to 51%. Hartford's turnout has consistently declined over the last three elections, from 63% in 2016, to 50% in 2020, to only 43% in 2024." (source ) Many registered voters simply didn 't show up to vote because they thought their vote didn't count or matter. More Nutmeggers afraid of their shadow voted during Covid, especially as Bridgeport got by with a little help from their friends like Wanda the ballot stuffer. Any city that takes a week or more to finish its election results is suspect and it took a while for Bridgeport to certify. If it's happening in Bridgeport, it's happening in other cities like Waterbury Danbury, New Haven, Hartford ... Stamford Norwalk. IF YOU HAVE AN ELECTION STORY LET US KNOW. New Canaan had better turnout from grass roots efforts and during the campaign, we spent a lot of time in that town on our congressional primary and campaign for Dr. Michael Goldstein. This had an impact to the success of the victory of State Senator Ryan Fazio and he also campaigned hard there and the investment of time paid off for the 36th Senate District. The Base is the Base and that does not move as much. How Do We Get New Voters or Excite Them? 1. It's really the passionate single issue voters that pick up new issues where our focus is needed. 2. Young voters need to be excited and not indoctrinated or bribed with pizza to commit voter fraud. 3. Parents want their towns affordable so their children can afford to live in their hometowns if they choose to do so. Without change of leadership here, the state will continue to decline and its representation in Washington DC is also likely to decline. Connecticut is likely to lose a congressional seat in the next census and California may lose a few as others like Florida, Texas ans Pennsylvania may gain a few seats. That may not be the worst thing for CT but it's reality. Growing up in the 80s - Smokey the Bear said Only You can Fight Forrest Fires. SO WHAT CAN YOU DO to give the next generation the best chance of success? Help us educate, inform and register new voters. Tell us the issues you are willing to go out and be passionate about. to is that vehicle to do so (it 's not electric, gas powered or a hybrid - it is fueled by Americans who believe in our system of democracy. Some of us will be meeting up next Saturday, April 12 at 12 - 3pm at the \- 45 Jude Ln, Southington, CT 06489 Go to our , sign up and join the \- WE NEED BOOTS ON THE GROUND! OUR TIME IS NOW TO Fight Back, Take Back CT and let's get some new voters. | | ---|---|--- Thank you for your continued support and please reach out for assistance. Please subscribe and spread the word as we need your support to grow this message.** Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein The father-son team continues on so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT and this country together in a meaningful way. The Goldstein Substack is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell The Goldstein Substack that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Michael Goldstein ? ?

name: Jena Griswold
subject: I’m running for Attorney General—here’s why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch&refcode=250407-emailam [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch&refcode=250407-emailam]
Peter,
I’m writing you to share some exciting news: I’m running to be Colorado’s next Attorney General.
I’ve spent my career fighting for our democracy, standing up to extremists, and protecting the rights of Coloradans. As Secretary of State, I expanded voter access, safeguarded our elections, and took on Donald Trump’s attacks on democracy—despite facing death threats myself.
Now, I’m ready to do even more for the State of Colorado. Will you become a Founding Donor by pitching in $5 and helping me launch this campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch&refcode=250407-emailam&amount=5]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch&refcode=250407-emailam&amount=10&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch&refcode=250407-emailam&amount=25&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch&refcode=250407-emailam&amount=50&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch&refcode=250407-emailam&amount=100&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch&refcode=250407-emailam&amount=250&express_lane=true] ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch&refcode=250407-emailam&]
As Attorney General, I will fight to protect reproductive rights, ensuring that women and doctors are never prosecuted for making personal healthcare decisions. I will stand up to Donald Trump and MAGA extremists who threaten our democracy and freedoms, just like I’ve done before. I will protect our land, air, and water and always stand with working people and the middle class.
And that’s just the beginning—we can do so much more to protect the Colorado way of life.
I grew up in a working-class family in Estes Park, where I learned the value of resilience and hard work. I put myself through college, earned a law degree, and dedicated my life to public service. Now, I’m ready to continue fighting for Coloradans as Attorney General.
Our campaign is just getting started, and we need your help to show our strength. Can you contribute $5, $50, or even $100 right now to help us build momentum? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch&refcode=250407-emailam]
Let’s do this,
Jena Griswold
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch&refcode=250407-emailam [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch&refcode=250407-emailam]
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold] https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold [https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold] https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: I have a dilemma
body:
Soon, I will face the voters of my Palmetto State as I seek re-election. As one of President Trump’s closest confidantes, I’m certain to be one of the Democrats’ biggest targets once again. |
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=05c590eb5da24f00b2a607737c8a4e55&_e=MHfAsY8T7qPF584bdzrhhLgqYXdecbJW_p7thKNXAMzPtnJhVDt9Qkbr-zmp83M5kcf1blo9NKE6yyahdLgvVj_Q_hZLbF2tb_9k1Zh1sQFQN-P6Yks0qQ4ym1oxzmvGJo-9s6OAsqI2pAeu55FUvvKXXz56Iyq7Nr86QW0mYqNIBTEmVsOCmM0SAZ8GG3PYVA5hypRQ_AZSiQi6j_XZq-kgI8ZVJ5TTo8hrgMECeHSl05rQBr5v-TktAO8UleUvS1kJiuikVMA4w7HHYvaFT6UCiR5AGlK12OJwhEt_0g_MRFMoPSTRA-6kTkG-SI6Ib-jYBa_z5KOfEbij_DRGSe-j3XHTVh2NQMINfPqhsXsa0ggaSeCK8S2eMAxEt4M19BwLe6cFeMbiqRsb-lsQyg%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

Soon, I will face the voters of my Palmetto State as I seek re-election. **As one of President Trump's closest confidantes, I'm certain to be one of the Democrats' biggest targets once again.**

As Chairman of the Senate Budget Committee, I am working with the President and his team to pass sweeping legislation that will secure our border and rebuild our economy.

_**I can't wait for you to see our successes!**_

But to be candid with you, Fellow American, I don't have a lot of time right now to focus on my campaign.

My time is spent working to dramatically reduce government waste and inefficiencies and extend the Trump tax cuts for hard-working families and job-creating businesses, which will help get our economy back on track. Don't forget -- a stronger economy means a more secure nation, whether it's at our southern border or in the world arena.

**My dilemma here is simple:** the more time I spend helping President Trump, the less time I have to raise for what is shaping up to be an incredibly expensive re-election contest.

**[Will you do me a favor and contribute $20, $30, or even $75 to help fund my campaign?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=05c590eb5da24f00b2a607737c8a4e55&_e=MHfAsY8T7qPF584bdzrhhLgqYXdecbJW_p7thKNXAMzPtnJhVDt9Qkbr-zmp83M5kcf1blo9NKE6yyahdLgvVj_Q_hZLbF2tb_9k1Zh1sQFQN-P6Yks0qQ4ym1oxzmvGJo-9s6OAsqI2pAeu55FUvvKXXz56Iyq7Nr86QW0mYqNIBTEmVsOCmM0SAZ8GG3PYVA5hypRQ_AZSiQi6j_XZq-kgI8ZVJ5TTo8hrgMECeHSl05rQBr5v-TktAO8UleUvA6E7WcfSRSxQOijrK0UWLEZ6_bkdztdyBwe8DjahXkkdfasusGeNdBjg8akirxr7Zni070pt7zMNyLSFEv942iLZOl1Cv2FUMYl3UNK9iFEduWke_O-CGHsLSZ2Ci54LaGTKcroS21eFF-1P1-FEpw%3D%3D)** Your support will allow my focus to stay where it needs to be: serving the American people.

In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

clean_body: Soon, I will face the voters of my Palmetto State as I seek re-election. As one of President Trump’s closest confidantes, I’m certain to be one of the Democrats’ biggest targets once again. | Fellow American, Soon, I will face the voters of my Palmetto State as I seek re-election. As one of President Trump's closest confidantes, I'm certain to be one of the Democrats' biggest targets once again. As Chairman of the Senate Budget Committee, I am working with the President and his team to pass sweeping legislation that will secure our border and rebuild our economy. I can't wait for you to see our successes! But to be candid with you, Fellow American, I don't have a lot of time right now to focus on my campaign. My time is spent working to dramatically reduce government waste and inefficiencies and extend the Trump tax cuts for hard-working families and job-creating businesses, which will help get our economy back on track. Don't forget -- a stronger economy means a more secure nation, whether it's at our southern border or in the world arena. My dilemma here is simple: the more time I spend helping President Trump, the less time I have to raise for what is shaping up to be an incredibly expensive re-election contest. Your support will allow my focus to stay where it needs to be: serving the American people. | Thank you, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done.
