name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: They think they have Californians good and fooled.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026
body:
Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor’s race.

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars.It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world.
---
| | Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the line and kept Riverside County safe. Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities is graver than ever before.
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z3t797mj9d3u0eb8nij33jm620gktcip5msh2pvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im0or0c3h2bs)
---
| | That’s because Kamala Harris is positioning herself to run for Governor of California. **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat radical Kamala Harris in the race for California Governor.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zgi596lmolrgp8o5amc0k3c0imlgfnmqfp2cu1g8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im0or0c3h2bs)** Californians are waking up to how disastrous these years of Democrat rule have been. There is no better way to highlight that failure than putting myself, a Sheriff who has spent decades defending law and order, up against Kamala Harris, who as Attorney General oversaw the severe decline in public safety that we are living with today.Kamala Harris, Karen Bass, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff want us to forget the harm that Democrat rule has caused to California.But you know how these years have been:
---
* Democrats’ lack of preparation and water management allowed wildfires to ravage the state, while Karen Bass and Gavin Newsom were nowhere to be found.
* Despite Democrats spending hundreds of millions to “fix” it—crime, homelessness, and drug addiction skyrocketed.
* Democrats wasted billions of dollars on “high-speed rail” with nothing to show for it.

---
As they say: fool me once, shame on you... Fool me twice, shame on me.Well Californians ought to be ashamed.There’s rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is unbearable...Californians are being taxed to death just to watch their hard-earned dollars go towards fighting against Trump’s common-sense policies like wildfire prevention, immigration reform, and water storage improvement.These California Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they _welcome_ the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Chad, I’m afraid California’s best days are behind us.”But listen, here’s something you need to remember...**_Republicans turned things around_ by electing Ronald Reagan as Governor of California.****_And we can do that again_**. **But there’s no way I can pull it off without you.****[That’s why I’m asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zutv36q490s8vbinksm02e6bcv5qsphn2r5bq3qo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im0or0c3h2bs)** More and more everyday Americans are waking up to the harm that years of Democrat rule has caused them, and they are turning their backs on the party that betrayed them. A recent statewide poll showed Gov. Gavin Newsom's approval rating among likely voters at 44%. The number for the state legislature is even lower, with a 40% approval rating. Fewer than 20% of L.A. residents give Mayor Karen Bass high marks for fire response. Six in 10 voters said they felt the state was going in the wrong direction. The polling for Republicans has never been stronger in 20 years because of the dissatisfaction with the Democrats controlling their government.The time is right...But California is massive. We need to ignite a massive grassroots movement to compete across all 163,696 square miles and in all 58 counties. **[**When you rush your Bianco for California contribution of $35 or more...**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zrfve1jum1aatp1dflq7nj0ee5kqhpg67krk71so_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im0or0c3h2bs)**...you’re helping us fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: _You don’t have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free.__**We rely on everyday Americans like you**_ — _Not liberal Hollywood elites_ —to fund this campaign. **[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in to my campaign and give us the resources we need to go up against the Kamala Harris fundraising goliath.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zam6rve8t6b0bnptbkbhi9imqnmv7563aqvlnqho_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im0or0c3h2bs)** The Democrat machine that raised a billion dollars for Kamala Harris is going to come out in full force in her home state of California. But people are fed up with her, with her incompetence, and with the years of Democrat rule.Even if she outraises me 10-to-1, I’ll have a good fighting chance.This race is the toughest in the nation. But I have been doing something just as tough—tackling crime in California.Here is what Democrats don’t understand about the crime problem: when someone breaks the law or is a violent repeat offender, you put them in jail. It’s not a systemic or societal problem. Or a racism problem. It is an accountability problem.I’ve been wrangling criminals without help from these Democrats for years.And despite Liberal politicians and the local media trying to get rid of me, I’ve won two terms as Sheriff.That’s how you can know I’m the man for the job.Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win statewide in California as a Republican.When we win here... defeating Kamala Harris for the second time......we become the line of defense against these failed liberal policies spreading to the rest of the country.And we stop Kamala Harris, or whoever the Democrats put up for Governor, from using California as a liberal launchpad for their extremist agenda.It all depends on you!
---
| | [ **DONATE **](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zni0urmm4e7hulqsrrudqrq9e0ar1shos1c6ijp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im0or0c3h2bs)
---
Thank you and God Bless,Sheriff Chad Bianco
---
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2za1car1925c2emu7t5p42e139mu2qcurji84p1ug_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im0or0c3h2bs)
---
Chad Bianco For Governor
---
| | Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026
---
**PO Box 706****Riverside, CA 92502**
---

Pop Acta Media | Update For America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zc9rjofptqfgvgsib290ofi1i66t9ipnqpuh7ac8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im0or0c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqas3h6gonacpnm9q3bd9ieir38ct66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni62oj5c9i60oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z4lsbqfg47acnsutdhp2785fflgqscjqi9k3skng_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im0or0c3h2bs)_

[](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zqvk9iqvf44612hpdu814dp3oo0ffgmhur0a8tco_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr1c5g6ao33c1ge49fg)

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: 🚨 Trump's Tariff Gamble
body:
Plus, a buried investigation in Albuquerque. Must-Watch New Episode of No Doubt About It for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5741327872&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | We’re back with a [brand-new episode of the No Doubt About It Podcast](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=680b8a3db6&e=567664f14c), and this one is all about the future of the U.S. economy—and Trump’s boldest political risk yet. With the financial markets showing signs of weakness, **Trump is rolling out a detailed plan that goes far beyond tariffs—and we’re breaking it all down.**
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=1892d5dca8&e=567664f14c)
|
# What You’ll Hear in This Episode:
---
| **💥 Trump’s Full Economic Playbook Revealed:**
Tariffs are only the beginning. Trump’s strategy involves DOGE, interest rate cuts, tax cuts, and slashing government spending. Mark dives into how all of these factors are connected and why Trump is betting it all on rebuilding the economy from the ground up. If this plan fails, it could trigger economic calamity—but if it works, it could reshape the American economy in a positive way for generations.
**⚠️ What Could Go Wrong?**
Every major economic strategy comes with risk. We explore the potential pitfalls if the administration miscalculates the market’s reaction or global response. Can the U.S. actually bring manufacturing home—and if we do, will it succeed long-term? COVID proved we need it, but it’s not a guaranteed win.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3cfe085444&e=567664f14c)
---
| **🕵️♀️ Albuquerque Mayor’s Office Under Investigation?**
Krysty unpacks a recent Albuquerque Journal report about a quiet investigation involving the Mayor’s office—and why City Hall might be keeping it under wraps. Who’s asking questions, and who’s trying to avoid them? Transparency matters, and we’re shining a light on this developing story.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=7e3e0c35ba&e=567664f14c)
---
|
#### Here’s How You Can Help Spread the Word:

**📢 Like, Rate & Subscribe: **
If you enjoy our content, [subscribe to the No Doubt About It Podcast on your favorite platform](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a34c6f255e&e=567664f14c) and on YouTube—this helps us grow and reach more people!
**💬 Comment on YouTube:**
What do you think of Trump’s economic strategy? Will it bring manufacturing back—or miss the mark? [Let us know in the YouTube comments!](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2c039d652f&e=567664f14c)
**💰 Support the Podcast:**
If you believe in honest, no-nonsense political analysis, [consider donating](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=7fe1c2fcb5&e=567664f14c) to help us keep exposing the truth.

Stay informed, stay engaged, and keep questioning,

**Mark and Krysty Ronchetti**
_Hosts of the No Doubt About It Podcast_
---

Transparency matters, and we’re shining a light on this developing story. | | Here’s How You Can Help Spread the Word: 📢 Like, Rate & Subscribe: If you enjoy our content, and on YouTube—this helps us grow and reach more people! 💬 Comment on YouTube: What do you think of Trump’s economic strategy? Will it bring manufacturing back—or miss the mark? 💰 Support the Podcast: If you believe in honest, no-nonsense political analysis, to help us keep exposing the truth. Stay informed, stay engaged, and keep questioning, Mark and Krysty Ronchetti Hosts of the No Doubt About It Podcast | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | © 2025 Choose Adventure Media. name: Colonel Pam Stevenson
subject: McConnell is out. I am in.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf37d1e2f-ba74-4f48-8c2b-b96a7b42dc1b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f828557-81b1-49c4-832d-dd0f8230b129/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [Peter, I have some huge news to share with you: I am running for Senate here in Kentucky to replace Mitch McConnell. In a moment, I’m going to tell you about my vision for this election — and I would love it if you took the time to read my full message. But if you’re short on time, will you chip in $10 to become one of my founding donors and help me become the next Democratic U.S. Senator? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taa1ae26b-7c5c-434b-88de-e3037b679d73/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I was born and raised right here in Kentucky. I’ve spent my life in service to our communities, state, and country. I served as a JAG attorney in the U.S. Air Force for 27 years with the rank of Colonel. In the Air Force, I successfully negotiated several hostage crises and prosecuted violent criminals and child sex offenders. I’m a nonprofit founder for veterans in need, ordained minister, and the Floor Leader of the Kentucky House Democrats. I know firsthand the challenges Kentucky and our country are up against. [So now, after 27 years of serving our state and our country, I am running for Senate, but I can't start this fight alone. That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally: Will you chip in $10 in before midnight TONIGHT to help me kick off my campaign strong and show the world I have what it takes to win this race? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e08ad98-ae1e-462b-be9f-a57b79a0eccb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’m ready to run for U.S. Senate to defend our freedoms and build an economy that works for everyone – no matter your background. Every American deserves access to food, clean water, healthcare, and shelter. But Mitch McConnell and the GOP do not see things the same way. During his 40 years in the US Senate, he’s put his personal quest for power and his special-interest allies ahead of our state, nation, and Constitution every time. I’m ready to turn the page. But I need you with me. [I promise you I will put everything I have into winning this race and being a voice for every single American. But I can’t do it alone — and I’ll need the help of grassroots supporters like you every step of the way. So I’m humbly asking: Will you pitch in $10 before midnight tonight and help me kick off my campaign with an unbeatable show of support? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e0f3e8d-17bd-4a77-a02d-25dfac2eebc5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T451aa15b-6549-4946-8bae-1c19b2c836da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| In the Air Force, they taught us to live by “Duty. Honor. Country.” I ask you to stand with me and live by “Duty. Honor. Kentucky.” Thank you, Colonel Pam
Floor Leader, House Democrats
Candidate for US Senate

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T283a9ce7-3c17-4245-93a3-a89c5915bc63/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| **About the Republican Party of Florida**
* * *
The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.

We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America.

Members of the Republican Party of Florida will be united by these principles and will work to elect Floridians with integrity who will work to enact such solutions. We will seek to be the most effective state party in the nation and serve as a model for other party organizations.

name: Erika, House Republicans
subject: RARE OPPORTUNITY: A chance to help the Department of Government Efficiency for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m seeking someone with a good head on their shoulders... and I think that’s you

|
---
| | | Dear Friend,

**I 'm writing to inform you of a unique opportunity to contribute to the Department of Government Efficiency (D.O.G.E.).**

**This groundbreaking initiative** has already saved the American people billions of dollars. I have noticed your value amongst House Republicans, and **I believe your voice would be a valuable asset to our mission.**

---
| | | [TELL HOUSE GOP WHERE D.O.G.E. SHOULD STRIKE NEXT](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcsnn65s2uvjph47khe7225npgnpmmhfnmbflq00_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im4ob6chh2bs "TELL HOUSE GOP WHERE D.O.G.E. SHOULD STRIKE NEXT")
---

_**We are seeking an individual to provide input to House Republicans on where D.O.G.E. should focus its efforts next.**_ This is a chance to play a crucial role in our ongoing efforts to eliminate waste and abuse of taxpayer dollars, and **we invite you to join us in this important endeavor.**

**_Please note that this opportunity is time-sensitive_** _,_ and we require your prompt response to proceed. **Please take a minute to share your thoughts with House Republicans on where D.O.G.E. should strike next.**

---
| | | [OFFER YOUR INSIGHTS](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztdmupf2ocv0k9qoeooqs6jagovdrdlj9vm570n0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im4ob6chh2bs "OFFER YOUR INSIGHTS")
---

**_Please respond within ONE HOUR to be considered for this opportunity, Friend._**

---
| | | [RESPOND NOW](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zio8bftoojlquha2tdgosjm4qi15meupoko5iggo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im4ob6chh2bs "RESPOND NOW")
---

I look forward to your response!

Sincerely,
Erika
House Republicans

Friend : U.S. Senator Amy Klobuchar introduced and is working hard to pass the Election Worker Protection Act , which would would " provide states with the resources to recruit and train election workers and ensure these workers’ safety, while also instituting federal safeguards to shield election workers from intimidation and threats ". The bill includes provisions that were developed with input from election officials across the country.
We want to see how our members feel about this legislation. Please take our quick survey:
Team: Do you think we need to do more to protect our election workers?

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. Erica is a well-respected scientist, businesswoman, and advocate for marginalized communities. She believes in building a community that’s safe, sustainable, and strong, where everyone has a voice, and every resident, regardless of age, race, gender, or background, feels welcome and protected.

Her Democratic opponent, Barry Cassidy, on the other hand, is running as a Democrat, but his words and actions tell a shocking story. **He is a proud white nationalist who routinely uses racist and anti-LGBTQ language. He openly aligns with MAGA extremism.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105365456/538101074/-459442197?refcode=EM_F_250407Deuso_N_CD_90DO_10_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhZWZiOGFjLWMxMTMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O2uDreI2WYIZkBT6yDsXfQCcobBga1XnUtZ8TFDmWSA=)
---
That’s not all: If Erica wins the primary, she will be facing off against Republican Richard Bryant, **a far-right extremist and unapologetic Trump supporter.** He uses his online platform to spew misogyny, anti-trans rhetoric, and racist commentary. Additionally, he is known to mock women for their appearance, attack the LGBTQ+ community, and spread harmful lies about climate change and immigrants. He advocates for violence, promotes mass deportation, and supports banning books and suppressing votes. As Erica’s campaign has stated, **“This isn’t political disagreement—this is dangerous, dehumanizing extremism.”**

_In Erica’s own words: “The constituency in Downingtown is diverse, educated, and proud of our borough’s progress and growing inclusivity. Voters here care about good schools, safe streets, responsible development, and a local government that reflects the people it serves. They want a mayor who listens, who leads with compassion, and who is focused on building a better future.

I bring my whole self to this work—including my perspective as a trans woman who’s had to fight to be taken seriously in rooms where decisions get made. That makes me more determined to lead with purpose and to make sure every woman in Downingtown knows her voice matters, and her community has her back. Because when we take care of women, we’re taking care of the whole town.”_

**But Erica needs our help.**

[**Her campaign needs to raise $17,000 to fully fund all of their programs. Through our incredible community of grassroots supporters, we know we can help her get there. Rush support to Erica’s campaign by pitching in a split $20.25 or more contribution immediately →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105365458/538101095/-459442197?refcode=EM_F_250407Deuso_N_CD_90DO_10_G_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhZWZiOGFjLWMxMTMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O2uDreI2WYIZkBT6yDsXfQCcobBga1XnUtZ8TFDmWSA=)

Thank you,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move
---
| | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states.

Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies.

**Support this important work with a contribution today!** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105365459/538101108/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250407Deuso_N_CD_90DO_10_G_N_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhZWZiOGFjLWMxMTMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O2uDreI2WYIZkBT6yDsXfQCcobBga1XnUtZ8TFDmWSA=)

dpwillis67@gmail.com 2025 Donor:

[**Can we count on you to pitch in $5 before midnight to help us reach our $250,000 stretch goal and post the fiercest fundraising report possible?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250407_1_supporterrecord?amount=5&refcode=em20250407-1190&refcode2=1190_400544_XbeA6c&akid=1190%2E400544%2EXbeA6c)
What we raise in this first reporting period is so crucial to the future of the campaign. **Posting a strong fundraising report shows that our grassroots movement is the real deal and that we have what it takes to _win_.**
We already blew past our initial fundraising goal, but if we can meet our $250,000 stretch goal by midnight, that would be HUGE!!
It would give us more room to work with in the budget for things like staffing, opening campaign offices, holding events, and much more.

name: Solar Power Pack
subject: I hope this gets to you before we sell out again...
body:
You can grab yours for just the cost of shipping...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20964/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/614b8c83b9ed82d5410d304d6db4410ece4a3b5e). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20964/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/614b8c83b9ed82d5410d304d6db4410ece4a3b5e?message_id=ImIyNjU0ZDAwLWY2MTEtMDEzZC03NmQ1LTcyZWNiZDU2ZDI3ZEBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).
---
| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20964/6374453/f04b2dd4380eeccee2c072b97ddfb9305591f38d/614b8c83b9ed82d5410d304d6db4410ece4a3b5e)
---
---
|
---
In today’s society, we rely too heavily upon a dependable source of power. When disaster strikes, and power is removed from our lives - it causes complete and total chaos for all who were not smart enough to prepare for it. We don’t want that to be you - **and you shouldn’t either.** Now listen, I’m not saying go out and spend your life savings on freeze-dried food, batteries, cases of water and an underground bunker.. But I do think everyone should have these items.
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20964/6374453/f04b2dd4380eeccee2c072b97ddfb9305591f38d/614b8c83b9ed82d5410d304d6db4410ece4a3b5e)
---
Equipping you and your family with a few tools that will make this inevitable situation less stressful is what we’re here to provide. You can grab yours for just the cost of shipping by [clicking here.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20964/6374453/16c24de2fff17564253fd6fdf683aaeaac33d311/614b8c83b9ed82d5410d304d6db4410ece4a3b5e) Months ago, we picked two of our Best Selling items, tossed them in our new Dry Bag, and completely sold out within the week. The feedback from our customers was so positive that we had to bring this bundle back. I’m sorry it took so long to get everything back in stock, that’s just the way she goes sometimes. If you take self reliance & preparedness seriously, [go checkout what I’m talking about.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20964/6374453/16c24de2fff17564253fd6fdf683aaeaac33d311/614b8c83b9ed82d5410d304d6db4410ece4a3b5e) I hope this gets to you before we sell out again. Please be sure to reach out with any feedback, our team truly does value all of the input we’ve received over the years. Last chance: [tap here to just pay shipping](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20964/6374453/16c24de2fff17564253fd6fdf683aaeaac33d311/614b8c83b9ed82d5410d304d6db4410ece4a3b5e). As always; Stay safe & God Bless.
---
| | |
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20964/6374453/f04b2dd4380eeccee2c072b97ddfb9305591f38d/614b8c83b9ed82d5410d304d6db4410ece4a3b5e)
---

You should not rely solely on information contained in this email to evaluate the product or service being endorsed.Always exercise due diligence before purchasing any product or service.
---

name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: We can win in California again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026
body:
Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor’s race.

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars.It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world.
---
| | Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the line and kept Riverside County safe. Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities is graver than ever before.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn6es6rvhq6ir3rel4fktgi7cgo7vmlqh3df2ssg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im4ob6chh2bs)
---
| | That’s because Kamala Harris is positioning herself to run for Governor of California. **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat radical Kamala Harris in the race for California Governor.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zechpf5peuhgjbvn20nb6fcp98orm5p1m9el5t90_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im4ob6chh2bs)** Californians are waking up to how disastrous these years of Democrat rule have been. There is no better way to highlight that failure than putting myself, a Sheriff who has spent decades defending law and order, up against Kamala Harris, who as Attorney General oversaw the severe decline in public safety that we are living with today.Kamala Harris, Karen Bass, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff want us to forget the harm that Democrat rule has caused to California.But you know how these years have been:
---
* Democrats’ lack of preparation and water management allowed wildfires to ravage the state, while Karen Bass and Gavin Newsom were nowhere to be found.
* Despite Democrats spending hundreds of millions to “fix” it—crime, homelessness, and drug addiction skyrocketed.
* Democrats wasted billions of dollars on “high-speed rail” with nothing to show for it.

---
As they say: fool me once, shame on you... Fool me twice, shame on me.Well Californians ought to be ashamed.There’s rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is unbearable...Californians are being taxed to death just to watch their hard-earned dollars go towards fighting against Trump’s common-sense policies like wildfire prevention, immigration reform, and water storage improvement.These California Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they _welcome_ the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Chad, I’m afraid California’s best days are behind us.”But listen, here’s something you need to remember...**_Republicans turned things around_ by electing Ronald Reagan as Governor of California.****_And we can do that again_**. **But there’s no way I can pull it off without you.****[That’s why I’m asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1rthonc9h6alp61vtavbd0tv431ob60jvvif5b0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im4ob6chh2bs)** More and more everyday Americans are waking up to the harm that years of Democrat rule has caused them, and they are turning their backs on the party that betrayed them. A recent statewide poll showed Gov. Gavin Newsom's approval rating among likely voters at 44%. The number for the state legislature is even lower, with a 40% approval rating. Fewer than 20% of L.A. residents give Mayor Karen Bass high marks for fire response. Six in 10 voters said they felt the state was going in the wrong direction. The polling for Republicans has never been stronger in 20 years because of the dissatisfaction with the Democrats controlling their government.The time is right...But California is massive. We need to ignite a massive grassroots movement to compete across all 163,696 square miles and in all 58 counties. **[**When you rush your Bianco for California contribution of $35 or more...**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfv07m60tmhedv9ok99fdthqpquphkfgi1kis2eo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im4ob6chh2bs)**...you’re helping us fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: _You don’t have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free.__**We rely on everyday Americans like you**_ — _Not liberal Hollywood elites_ —to fund this campaign. **[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in to my campaign and give us the resources we need to go up against the Kamala Harris fundraising goliath.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkcuhip4dneu6uk4lku1738dus75qgi4cp5mmo1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im4ob6chh2bs)** The Democrat machine that raised a billion dollars for Kamala Harris is going to come out in full force in her home state of California. But people are fed up with her, with her incompetence, and with the years of Democrat rule.Even if she outraises me 10-to-1, I’ll have a good fighting chance.This race is the toughest in the nation. But I have been doing something just as tough—tackling crime in California.Here is what Democrats don’t understand about the crime problem: when someone breaks the law or is a violent repeat offender, you put them in jail. It’s not a systemic or societal problem. Or a racism problem. It is an accountability problem.I’ve been wrangling criminals without help from these Democrats for years.And despite Liberal politicians and the local media trying to get rid of me, I’ve won two terms as Sheriff.That’s how you can know I’m the man for the job.Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win statewide in California as a Republican.When we win here... defeating Kamala Harris for the second time......we become the line of defense against these failed liberal policies spreading to the rest of the country.And we stop Kamala Harris, or whoever the Democrats put up for Governor, from using California as a liberal launchpad for their extremist agenda.It all depends on you!
---
| | [ **DONATE **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm6l6vm478ga2dgohr7h64768et8dp21gppqemi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im4ob6chh2bs)
---
Thank you and God Bless,Sheriff Chad Bianco
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0fj4vii46u3pc365i4n86pju78ehdbakeso3lb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im4ob6chh2bs)
---
Chad Bianco For Governor
---
| | Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026
---
**PO Box 706****Riverside, CA 92502**
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2rnm4lg29smm217vd5s4vq1era48tptq0f51pd8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im4ob6chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp31c9im4oj0s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1lk5u7r21iuqpp5b3gbodo8negp8c9788kssak0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im4ob6chh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5v81o592j9pbg8ugvn1479a7p26lt1e7d73cbc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im4ob6chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Erika, House Republicans
subject: RARE OPPORTUNITY: A chance to help the Department of Government Efficiency for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m seeking someone with a good head on their shoulders... and I think that’s you

|
---
| | | Dear Friend,

**I 'm writing to inform you of a unique opportunity to contribute to the Department of Government Efficiency (D.O.G.E.).**

**This groundbreaking initiative** has already saved the American people billions of dollars. I have noticed your value amongst House Republicans, and **I believe your voice would be a valuable asset to our mission.**

---
| | | [TELL HOUSE GOP WHERE D.O.G.E. SHOULD STRIKE NEXT](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3ilq3o50capml667qtded332ts36isjuj5ob21o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1imcpj6c5h2bs "TELL HOUSE GOP WHERE D.O.G.E. SHOULD STRIKE NEXT")
---

_**We are seeking an individual to provide input to House Republicans on where D.O.G.E. should focus its efforts next.**_ This is a chance to play a crucial role in our ongoing efforts to eliminate waste and abuse of taxpayer dollars, and **we invite you to join us in this important endeavor.**

**_Please note that this opportunity is time-sensitive_** _,_ and we require your prompt response to proceed. **Please take a minute to share your thoughts with House Republicans on where D.O.G.E. should strike next.**

---
| | | [OFFER YOUR INSIGHTS](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zaotvcfopj4t1jc0afk1v9o71724g81vo4823380_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1imcpj6c5h2bs "OFFER YOUR INSIGHTS")
---

**_Please respond within ONE HOUR to be considered for this opportunity, Friend._**

---
| | | [RESPOND NOW](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z104teahivhdsra92sdfr9trn6oqciq5hhapepuo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1imcpj6c5h2bs "RESPOND NOW")
---

I look forward to your response!

Sincerely,
Erika
House Republicans

---
| |

body:
I’m seeking someone with a good head on their shoulders... and I think that’s you

|
---
| | | Dear Friend,

**I 'm writing to inform you of a unique opportunity to contribute to the Department of Government Efficiency (D.O.G.E.).**

**This groundbreaking initiative** has already saved the American people billions of dollars. I have noticed your value amongst House Republicans, and **I believe your voice would be a valuable asset to our mission.**

---
| | | [TELL HOUSE GOP WHERE D.O.G.E. SHOULD STRIKE NEXT](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4bgfv7c64ktbnk25bkn17stgipu7nuqn9qtdq78_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c1im2oj4cdh2bs "TELL HOUSE GOP WHERE D.O.G.E. SHOULD STRIKE NEXT")
---

_**We are seeking an individual to provide input to House Republicans on where D.O.G.E. should focus its efforts next.**_ This is a chance to play a crucial role in our ongoing efforts to eliminate waste and abuse of taxpayer dollars, and **we invite you to join us in this important endeavor.**

**_Please note that this opportunity is time-sensitive_** _,_ and we require your prompt response to proceed. **Please take a minute to share your thoughts with House Republicans on where D.O.G.E. should strike next.**

Erika

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Here’s something you may not know about me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
It’s easy to be discouraged about everything that’s going on, but I believe that taking the time each day to remind yourself of what you’re grateful for can provide a glimmer of hope even on terrible days. |
#
---
Here’s something you may not know about me, team: I keep a gratitude journal. At the end of each day, I write down at least three things that I’m grateful for. Some days, my list is about 10 items long. Other days? Well, let’s just say that my dogs, my bed, and a glass of wine are the only things that make it on the list. **On the hardest days, it’s easy to want to hide under the covers and avoid the rest of the world — but getting out, engaging with people and keeping up the fight is what we’ve got to do. ** I’ll be honest. We’ve had a lot of tough fights over the last few years — many we’ve won, and some we’ve lost. And I know that many people in Michigan and across the country feel all sorts of emotions about the moment we find ourselves in. It’s easy to be discouraged about everything that’s going on, but I believe that taking the time each day to remind yourself of what you’re grateful for and why you continue to fight the good fight can provide a glimmer of hope, even on the darkest days. [_**So, I’m inviting you to join me in this practice. Click here to let me know what you’re grateful for, and if you’re up for it, push yourself to write down at least three things each day that keep you going >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105367352/538107002/-1566240981?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250407_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RhYzBhNmQtYzUxMy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mxFYRFjNB1uDVxcrUR9mrZ6NnwdG7oMau5gczMFAR0I=&emci=76ac0a6d-c513-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7dac0a6d-c513-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1028753) | [I’M GRATEFUL FOR...](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105367353/538107003/-1566240981?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250407_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RhYzBhNmQtYzUxMy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mxFYRFjNB1uDVxcrUR9mrZ6NnwdG7oMau5gczMFAR0I=&emci=76ac0a6d-c513-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7dac0a6d-c513-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1028753)
---
Here’s one thing that I’m going to write in my gratitude journal today: **I’m grateful for this amazing grassroots team that has stood by me through all of the ups and downs we’ve faced over the past few years. **
Your support means the world to me, and I couldn’t be more grateful to have you on this team.
— Gretchen
Fight Like Hell PAC

Lansing, MI 48901
United States ****[FIGHTLIKEHELLPAC.ORG](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105367354/538107004/-1026118285?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250407_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RhYzBhNmQtYzUxMy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mxFYRFjNB1uDVxcrUR9mrZ6NnwdG7oMau5gczMFAR0I=&emci=76ac0a6d-c513-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7dac0a6d-c513-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1028753) ** | [info@fightlikehellpac.org](mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org)**|**[PRIVACY POLICY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105367355/538107005/-28805512?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250407_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RhYzBhNmQtYzUxMy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mxFYRFjNB1uDVxcrUR9mrZ6NnwdG7oMau5gczMFAR0I=&emci=76ac0a6d-c513-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7dac0a6d-c513-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1028753) ** **** | **Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**

clean_body: It’s easy to be discouraged about everything that’s going on, but I believe that taking the time each day to remind yourself of what you’re grateful for can provide a glimmer of hope even on terrible days. | Here’s something you may not know about me, team: I keep a gratitude journal. At the end of each day, I write down at least three things that I’m grateful for. Some days, my list is about 10 items long. Other days? Well, let’s just say that my dogs, my bed, and a glass of wine are the only things that make it on the list. On the hardest days, it’s easy to want to hide under the covers and avoid the rest of the world — but getting out, engaging with people and keeping up the fight is what we’ve got to do. I’ll be honest. We’ve had a lot of tough fights over the last few years — many we’ve won, and some we’ve lost. And I know that many people in Michigan and across the country feel all sorts of emotions about the moment we find ourselves in. It’s easy to be discouraged about everything that’s going on, but I believe that taking the time each day to remind yourself of what you’re grateful for and why you continue to fight the good fight can provide a glimmer of hope, even on the darkest days. | Here’s one thing that I’m going to write in my gratitude journal today: I’m grateful for this amazing grassroots team that has stood by me through all of the ups and downs we’ve faced over the past few years. Your support means the world to me, and I couldn’t be more grateful to have you on this team. — Gretchen Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

This is Byron Donalds, and I’ve never been more proud to stand with the America First Movement.
President Trump LIBERATED America from the BURDEN of **globalist economic policies** \- and he’s putting the American worker FIRST again.

Byron Donalds

subject: Trump’s plan is nothing short of chaos
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
---
| | Team,

On Thursday, Josh appeared on MSNBC to discuss Trump’s _dangerous_ tariff plan. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105367936/538108708/1264861879?source=EM_NBI_JG_20250407_ENG_MSNBC_0_3MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzlhZjA0NC1jNjEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SgLfDLnKbBUGd-BwmByxuObTatY5A8BRyJrR3HpRp98=&emci=105af173-c513-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=239af044-c613-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=37438246) Trump’s reckless tariffs are driving us closer to a recession. Our hardworking families will be hit the hardest – **_whacked with at least $2k a year in EXTRA costs._

His plan is nothing short of chaos.**

Josh is running for Governor to make sure Jersey families don’t pay the price for Trump’s mess. He’s ready to put Jersey families and small businesses first by cutting taxes and lowering costs. **[Check out his comments here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105367940/538108711/1264861879?source=EM_NBI_JG_20250407_ENG_MSNBC_0_3MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzlhZjA0NC1jNjEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SgLfDLnKbBUGd-BwmByxuObTatY5A8BRyJrR3HpRp98=&emci=105af173-c513-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=239af044-c613-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=37438246)**

Thank you for your support,

Team Gottheimer

* * *
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. subject: officially the Democratic nominee!
body:
I'm the Democrat running to flip the governor's office |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105368101/538109044/-2024062986?refcode=WUEFH418_20250407_SpanbergerSplit_ALL_&sourceid=1055916&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDQzNTVlNy1jNTEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oaEqZTkWlnjMxIKNymopicearZ4HSVl5djgAa5Ja2vI=) Peter, it's Abigail Spanberger.

**I'm honored to share that I'm officially the Democratic nominee in the November 2025 election for the governor's office in Virginia**! I'm grateful for the grassroots support from volunteers and contributors like you who have made this possible. Every dollar we raised, every phone call we made, and every conversation we had was only possible because of you.

The Virginia governor's race is one of the most competitive races in the country right now, and it's being called _**a total toss up**_ by experts. All eyes are on us to see if we have what it takes to win this race — and set the stage for 2026 and beyond.

That's why we need to continue building on the strong foundation that we've built so far: your contribution will help us continue mobilizing volunteers, knocking on doors, and holding events. **We need to reach voters across the Commonwealth to show them that I'm running to stand up for the people of Virginia, not stand by as chaos and division are spread**. clean_body: I'm the Democrat running to flip the governor's office | = Peter, it's Abigail Spanberger. I'm honored to share that I'm officially the Democratic nominee in the November 2025 election for the governor's office in Virginia! I'm grateful for the grassroots support from volunteers and contributors like you who have made this possible. Every dollar we raised, every phone call we made, and every conversation we had was only possible because of you. The Virginia governor's race is one of the most competitive races in the country right now, and it's being called a total toss up by experts. All eyes are on us to see if we have what it takes to win this race — and set the stage for 2026 and beyond. That's why we need to continue building on the strong foundation that we've built so far: your contribution will help us continue mobilizing volunteers, knocking on doors, and holding events. We need to reach voters across the Commonwealth to show them that I'm running to stand up for the people of Virginia, not stand by as chaos and division are spread. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger = = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. body:
Peter,

I trained my entire life to compete at the highest level.

_I put in the early mornings, the brutal practices, the sacrifices -- just like every other female athlete._

But none of that mattered the moment **[I was forced to race against a male in college.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/UTQVcddgFY6TZwhBEStrLdvhI5kxKslGNLEp4etF6tQ_P19ouHxnNz3Vogf8LqFnCvpXt7iDPEE7dBotUfViRa812m0U7_s44vYBPQIywU6CdZyKGgNEXyVHrAIAXkjbLCrTg2HBmbbOOg24VA3kRwHYVr5D8A9caxvhm2PhdrmtRFJfBkSjqjDlm7fuP78uu64R-seU4Xbn_D5BeIlv3u2PoEJooBgQBXF0CMl_aaLE9YBE7ndlrDn4iOwaf4-OivV9UAP-iLW1yuH4tYwb34uvvVOqn0gwmxsIpWL9ivlu1C7ykGEPu90eOz2lXhXvfF4DSyhFFz-Qk-Nwn2yTfIgqjW4tgZtvfDVwXPa1Otc3Z002kVc0GJeW6OjbmFL0n6gB2XSKaGXdOYi5eCPs8J8MHsHlR1uegWmVZsdjX5Mz05ljDaRWM1y1vWzlDN86Huz8KlYB90pNGpwbcA7MhGzCFFAN_BbOpVt3N7pvNaI3XfeGhx02QwaJN8bZ6xpoYX_6TSBzvIRA0DyjgGgtLZEFo_YXpWioQ52ovM3BVm_9qE467H6olNb9BaaHUSXz5At1AChhvPtqX359_1fBzANqelF_ZiKfeeXnCmWFUC481TI-b-Hde50XuIeVmxUt3w/v2OQRb0BI7a9C_sgH2Rb6GSYwayqIJh_/7)**

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Thank you. We won big.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
We won on Tuesday night, and that’s in part to the work this team put in over the last few months.
#
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-april25.epcG-f&refcode=em250407-1-240&t=1&akid=5516%2E196590%2E7GwQP3)
Team — **_Thank you.**_
We won big on Tuesday night, and that’s in part to the work this team put in over the last few months.
We helped raise tens of thousands of dollars for Judge Susan Crawford and turn out the progressive vote in communities across Wisconsin.
We went up against Donald Trump’s MAGA-movement and Elon Musk’s fortune in one of the most competitive states in the country, **_and we won.**_
We won a future where ballot access is not just guaranteed but expanded, where the right to an abortion and reproductive care is protected for millions of women, and where collective bargaining for workers is as strong as ever in Wisconsin.
And importantly for our democracy, we blocked the far-right from undoing fair maps and gerrymandering Wisconsin’s districts for the GOP, which would have had huge consequences for the race for Congress in 2026.
So once again, thank you. Since we started The Long Run, we have proved that when we get involved, when we fight in every way we can, we can secure big wins for our democracy and the movement for progressive change in this country.
Now we’re setting our sights on the midterms, where there will be competitive races in states across the country (including here in Wisconsin!)
We’ll need all hands on deck to keep up our work supporting diverse, changemaking candidates. If that sounds like a plan to you, you can use [**this link](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-april25.epcG-f&refcode=em250407-1-240&t=2&akid=5516%2E196590%2E7GwQP3)** or the button below to make a contribution.
I’ll always rely on folks like you, to keep up the fight with me and this team. Let’s keep this momentum going.
— Mandela Barnes
[DONATE $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-april25.epcG-f&refcode=em250407-1-240&t=3&akid=5516%2E196590%2E7GwQP3)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=5516%2E196590%2E7GwQP3). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=5516%2E196590%2E7GwQP3)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=5516_196590_7GwQP3&akid=5516%2E196590%2E7GwQP3)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=5516%2E196590%2E7GwQP3)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Response Urgently Requested ----------- House GOP
subject: Mark Levin drops a TRUTH BOMB about the disgraceful attacks against Elon Musk:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Just turn on your TV – every day, there’s a new story about the Liberal Mob firebombing Cybertrucks, screaming at car owners, protesting dealerships, and vandalizing and ramming Teslas.

| |
---
| | | Mark Levin drops a TRUTH BOMB about the disgraceful attacks against Elon Musk:
_**"No business should have to put up with this concerted effort by members of government. Members of Congress. Billionaires. Activists. Intimidating customers, intimidating Tesla owners. Intimidating dealerships. Besmirching and smearing him. And his product."**_
Mark is exactly right.

Just turn on your TV - every day, there's a new story about the Liberal Mob firebombing Cybertrucks, screaming at car owners, protesting dealerships, and vandalizing and ramming Teslas.

Meanwhile, Congressional Democrats and their allies in the Fake News Media are fueling outrage in order to sabotage DOGE, Elon Musk, and President Trump.

Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message – will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/Geb0HB4aKONSb-_OFjIdjQ_2DSZW7I1JiI0Y7TNgCIg2DpQTCzjnAtf9rdWKIBjiqEQbXlCSR1DZpMAW_X-BdUUPeBVXhYu-LRVKL6tw5Q12hwsdmhXOZGRrDgSCXEE0TU5J2Y2akA5QwjaEX7SNNY678_Fg6EHir2XeimGCjc0_HSPvCWeWVKg9xXfY6WmSAzPH7vsR7zDMzBIGyWUdvIfkHF22VAM8glHZdZnS2ShcXpPUUxZGhqwS8e5uohZaKJgwkYwqmj5fPS2rC7UecXibzVXPV_juNt9OvNMDhOn_0k3wp5w73brjRN6uZvLVozoahziCnIyvLm1idRMcfmxLx2OkYczPBvI3MrJnTvXBw4EkaUdfLgqgF0VUvPHd2tbpefRRaZ7LljdjSB8_yndTwl3r1epQo7ZE/4adhYKhe-d92iYWL3UmMb01rJg6Jn4Wc/7) ** You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/bo_I-lHHRa5ds2lmRfbbLLUZWuGfDz0D0jwsnkVG6zEGcdiPttiJygzyj9cpioWQ3e_ycuD6sHlFUyCaqf47ArFlMXEigbIQIsuG31GjWcEMWAL9G6UwSwFZFci4OEBtK9_VpTUHemikPmVmjFfSoY8SNYHPn_LmOiUPliWFfmrv8EuJf9jw_U6W3bgnQRrI6uOb_UKfymLprspIFQh4VnWT3-lmwdKVlq-1ssUBNiYJxmPy3lEq8R-inwdmRG_0AdqpWyF8XXOo0aFnLYV0XXBFYNhxaC-xKTaXYshvjl1Fu109eUeBAgK5VI926InFa8ZF0MeoP47NSqdcUHxILH83oSb-iomvasX9b9x_USEOzQVk1BBLGwwp4XO_UgCPFF1wFg5-ep7UjZmWsSF1xwqVqnI54hARugYc/H0c2ABWQ_1O76k_dTSTFkxwbmI7SiDGq/7)**

[ **STOP SOROS**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/M678LjcSaPBn9L5WHpzddeEt7PbrU3ZDd4MEyIRuTvwygbJGi0jr6wg79fUVTGVZ2ONxR3XFzY4pCsis9IGKIJ3lvFIMQlfIggkP6SI1IHScYXWFgNymgal8uaCez4050lrQcyZXdlHRZqk49F8YsP4eg8A22KMVrTu31f-j6-00dnMGOASnyvoZvAmoQFkcACS64XANjdYup49jsOEESsm2niN9cvWS94_xtkPQPCiNUt4LsGV-52n_kRQq97xQ16pHflkMV4NyK2b2voQRm6lMM14wkCncaYBaMop1vfSPvvJovTiEl_1r4KsJm7x9ev2e9D_5pV1JKkrID6E8c3OHgAJdtvZPqt1vk5161dwM7jBCBTCC2mbZt1l-1YcKlBF6T01Z1a_KD2eRpxpCa18IwZ24e7_xZLCN/tVKS6qhy4oi9V_8yY63XRXI097vHVwpJ/7)

Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/IH7PCbuLUL-qZEWgToboU5ruO9Kxn9dPdB0UvN3A06iP-xFSQ5YfctPlJBIXDslsC3fmYu3CqLd0_o8hF-iN_qM74nCXfzwYvSn3sHk0LUAedPO_OTQk0by9Tg-B3r_QhCCgpSV-LFn0pOT4lXmTVK-ZDRX-WXvDMJQGhfB6Qm_YPwPwMDHQuZ-RhNEGbs9a19SqBrAk6nuQwOjzsEMZMHSovOgib_KSLL9epIP85GfmgfFf04J3EYlK0lO5h58Od7gub-aDZLo6k8WmB0JTvLaI7QQGYWaP82YER2v6RN8-933JVY8ufCIOBZbmFO366Svhjk3j3skrNpUMJxFc-R_Z93IxdNPx_vc8glZXHRIy2vuNvkNvWWD5M3USWIY1AQy6JcWmGbibjAZ2rr-95_c4lwkESVosXyuW/ufJ4_0vmh6tuDRD4mBSBmh0f4sCRaGSJ/7) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/l7HHbEEvApXoZqHPbkD6T-MEw1H6d_IIF2SYyER0cWRDLbrkn8YhVDtMMTD4Etw32I2qHiZ4hhBIaYFfx_farl8Mx8S-Ie7tMtASrWzmxBpEfEar4Iw8x54kFCpN47XUgkMG-JvAMmdjJLF0K6ziMzymf8hGKeDe_gtyCM3SnH_cEImY9zwrUbzhvO1XdQ3ymJ6uLSsg0ASfIxeU3wcJXweEwJhPLrROrIgSBKIhe6ViSRSZ9QsAqX3xaB0-qsLJddOnfIjLVo1ypsl7mUqayHW_w8uDnomitxV7xiLy6NRRM1m0LXoG5a98bhehkwIJpS23gkvJYIXsyL0hfA4sT61e7bWgfc-4hthQzbIN0hu1l_2cya58BoURJnrduCRkqQdrA_On-Jc6jTxdjP8tldNH6WqKhJXUbEj3/GQnxCGBk0qifgndXOO9sqIfQeB9HdNK9/7) **If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ****And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we’ll need in the next 20 months.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/PCsBSZXVDYz1TjkqnBfl2iC0qlLxXLv50mKiKgcCIRobEWMQsvLjavWjIbHCxz57-XMjEkRexR-VzfPjoOgcj718Eh_6cteAeYQLbRLuxeYP22lSiDkEWcSsgcPuUwF_ocZKTjICh_WBbRzN6fUJM1CWYnCseQaOoGQPdO4LFD1jb5yOiP7S5AZrRRAJXEHBOSOZg7NEoZQoD8YxpXdL2K6K87C2mTMkFQS6rrwAG5jGSsDv19Vb6N0ZtYyHObisOT0YmWGJC-GL4RqcvdZ0Fg5oivtKQS4Avvh5NMVwKB9oBqDbodUMofZKUUmQm_ACESdXNlj9Z2wR9b-dLApgazdCM9w0pD7Si_mBukhoQzNiQTLvE45QNKCv9sUI7GIWo87KMy4SC5F6hUeMgQ0Un3q5l7VDxCiu_dnG/oz0JJ7rXyGROmCxNME286V3Bz-Sz0_pm/7) ** AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it.**[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/Hj80-nnAIWke0zby39WVFWZJbba6z2Ww9YO36gHN-Ovij3nq1DG_41oPa2YDtRwORjU4cCMHl1fDEBWsCISHoV87oDT67z2PY3E6mzg8bIUmCnLfMyGFqERFjEwQneb0xBtMTOcNG54wCDy75L-VQ4m8DC8gmAoFbySs69j0gjReznmwX5pMY62hUHKGvdSJpEquCX8RilR06J4tmwM2VVvg8bC7M4taDT_MS_62t7kDscCBTJjbuN075V80jz6dVmMNQqDw9wAxfqVG39Yev3x7bkEM5yApwX3fJxCF5t-Era6ramN2gKJhkc7IZo8loenK0-1fWTHP_wbGXTV1AObu_oHvKXdHoT6qKGjzowyf_0xI6FPs-yzcJjdtk4HkpV-28Qrx7XuWKwNNDg1A9jTWsj3_5ePoT0lo/647Uinphmd3kgxXGSTdX6QUlclDSHjGc/7) **Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.

**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

clean_body: You’re one of America’s most informed seniors | | | | I’m writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat. | | | | STOP SOROS Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love. > We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys. This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system......to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us?? My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals! There are no two ways about it. George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law. We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.And we only have 20 months to do it. On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.** And we would be honored to have you by our side. AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it. Thank you for joining us in this fight for America. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a “Stop Soros Law” and so can we! To do it, . name: Team Benson
subject: They are gutting our access to health care
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
When Donald Trump makes Planned Parenthood and other healthcare providers the target of attacks, Jocelyn will fight back.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=199%2E181023%2EiSK-K4)
Team,
**FIRST,** Donald Trump and his administration announced tens of millions of dollars in cuts to Planned Parenthood, impacting women’s healthcare costs and accessibility nationwide.
**NOW,** Planned Parenthood Michigan announced that it’s closing **4** locations across the state and cutting **10%** of staff. **This is devastating for the thousands of Michiganders who rely on Planned Parenthood for their health care.** Women of color and people in rural communities will be hit hardest.
**But we’ve got news: Jocelyn is fighting back. She’s fought to protect abortion access and affordable health care before, and we can count on her to keep up these fights as Michigan’s next governor. Jocelyn knows we must be working to expand access to reproductive health care, not limit it.**
[**Pitch in to help Jocelyn protect women’s reproductive rights in Michigan >>**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250407_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=199%2E181023%2EiSK-K4)
| [DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q22025.rGq0NW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250407_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=199%2E181023%2EiSK-K4)
---
As Secretary of State, Jocelyn has been at the forefront of the fight to defend our rights.
After voters in Michigan passed a constitutional amendment guaranteeing the right to reproductive health care, Jocelyn *fought back* against extremists who tried to overturn the will of Michiganders.
She has never wavered on this issue, and she never will. Michiganders can trust Jocelyn to protect the right for women to make healthcare decisions about their own bodies without government interference.
And when Donald Trump makes Planned Parenthood and other healthcare providers the target of attacks, Jocelyn will fight back.
[**We can expect more threats to reproductive freedoms from the GOP and the Trump administration, which is why we need leaders like Jocelyn. Please chip in to help elect a champion for reproductive rights as Michigan’s next governor.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250407_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=199%2E181023%2EiSK-K4)

clean_body: That’s what NRSC Chair Tim Scott had to say about next year’s elections | = Team, At a National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) meeting, Chair Tim Scott told donors that next year’s elections will likely break spending records. And he made it crystal clear that Republicans will be zeroing in on Ohio, saying protecting Senator Husted’s seat will “require a massive effort.” = Make no mistake: Ohio’s Senate race will be one of the most expensive, competitive, and consequential battlegrounds in the entire country next year. Republicans are already focusing their resources and donor networks on Ohio to protect their fragile Senate majority—locking in plans to flood the state with millions of dollars in attack ads. Erica is a well-respected scientist, businesswoman, and advocate for marginalized communities. She believes in building a community that’s safe, sustainable, and strong, where everyone has a voice, and every resident, regardless of age, race, gender, or background, feels welcome and protected.

Her Democratic opponent, Barry Cassidy, on the other hand, is running as a Democrat, but his words and actions tell a shocking story. **He is a proud white nationalist who routinely uses racist and anti-LGBTQ language. He openly aligns with MAGA extremism.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105372615/538124987/-459442197?refcode=EM_F_250407Deuso_N_CD_IN_10_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzODFlYjNlLWNlMTMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YxBn1hHyTj-ajQZRhYqBoo3KFB8Uwhal-X5kfLkppek=)
---
That’s not all: If Erica wins the primary, she will be facing off against Republican Richard Bryant, **a far-right extremist and unapologetic Trump supporter.** He uses his online platform to spew misogyny, anti-trans rhetoric, and racist commentary. Additionally, he is known to mock women for their appearance, attack the LGBTQ+ community, and spread harmful lies about climate change and immigrants. He advocates for violence, promotes mass deportation, and supports banning books and suppressing votes. As Erica’s campaign has stated, **“This isn’t political disagreement—this is dangerous, dehumanizing extremism.”**

_In Erica’s own words: “The constituency in Downingtown is diverse, educated, and proud of our borough’s progress and growing inclusivity. Voters here care about good schools, safe streets, responsible development, and a local government that reflects the people it serves. They want a mayor who listens, who leads with compassion, and who is focused on building a better future.

I bring my whole self to this work—including my perspective as a trans woman who’s had to fight to be taken seriously in rooms where decisions get made. That makes me more determined to lead with purpose and to make sure every woman in Downingtown knows her voice matters, and her community has her back. Because when we take care of women, we’re taking care of the whole town.”_

**But Erica needs our help.**

[**Her campaign needs to raise $17,000 to fully fund all of their programs. Through our incredible community of grassroots supporters, we know we can help her get there. Rush support to Erica’s campaign by pitching in a split $20.25 or more contribution immediately →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105372616/538124988/-459442197?refcode=EM_F_250407Deuso_N_CD_IN_10_G_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzODFlYjNlLWNlMTMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YxBn1hHyTj-ajQZRhYqBoo3KFB8Uwhal-X5kfLkppek=)

Thank you,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move

name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: We can win in California again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026
body:
Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor’s race.

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars.It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world.
---
| | Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the line and kept Riverside County safe. Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities is graver than ever before.

clean_body: Over the weekend, we saw thousands of people across the country stand up and fight back against the Trump administration. | | | | Over the weekend, we saw thousands of people across the country stand up and fight back against the Trump administration. = Trump and his allies are running our government and country into the ground. They're gutting life-saving services to pave the way for tax cuts for the wealthy – and we've had enough of it. We need to grow a grassroots movement to stop these dangerous cuts to Medicaid and stop the corruption and lawlessness threatening our democracy. What we are facing right now as a country isn't about political parties. This isn't about Democrats or Republicans or Independents. This is about those who stand for the Constitution and those who don't. The current landscape is full of misinformation and distractions, and being informed and engaged is one of the strongest defenses against Trump's destruction. Thanks to all who joined the crowds all over New Jersey and the country. It's inspiring and energizing. | | Dear Peter,
---
God is at work in a refugee camp on the Syrian border. We distributed massive food bags, aid, and relief—and we topped it off by renting a kebab truck to deliver fresh, hot food to these beautiful people!

Most lost all, or nearly all, of their belongings in the earthquake, but they are being loved, evangelized, and served with the love of Jesus.

Watch the update and see how your generous resources are being used for the Kingdom!
