name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: We can win in California again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026
body:
Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor’s race.

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars.It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world.
---
| | Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the line and kept Riverside County safe. Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities is graver than ever before.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/JzlPIZL04mEPDd_h3KTR2qoVHkjRsUenjUhQJOjEUvXp9PQK1DKdY3fpJ8IlYhD-IDnTgrKI2Eb1LGi7i9NSS6jLu7PlT5qPxoEB6NZ4BoFyqlZkOJ-rv9UW5S57izjMRtaO0tFjw5viWepy_9aS387FTpfyGuFT600Tiv37B5lx6JAECCEHWsD-ucNSB2-gh2Gg2TEye1t1OPG4SGGMtclLGWoCOkJQ4dUgnEHt8yX2RROVpQjrsJxnARruAIYzvA2XQGb-NRjoNkPitzNbQ9gSTMHJUnXree1m-se8SZRDgBm-yx1LKOjwGOpEEqN7R5z4hBEqEpocvoXBzqKd9PubDgiWPfHJnK6h1TJwe6bpmB2Zb24RhMnTzaE1N6Onu8tVRqGbAojzSUd9IVUhlAgov1foZ4pnFAEp-jM74XlFwCIWpaDkIHdCCHQN7w9sE19_onhKX3pRPA/6WpEI8UODV5__D70-VsyhvtJkHN34RQ9/7)
---
| | That’s because Kamala Harris is positioning herself to run for Governor of California. **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat radical Kamala Harris in the race for California Governor.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/_KAn_QbWPkC14_vTqZ7bUJC4_mQJRa5eQmHrMxgpsxLT2Ol0WaYnfbZ15rBn5hnJI5ELDmj4h1co0rt1U0mzpukXeHrmXZIspsnNbgpRgcVlWmg7mlX8vgBzQF6Llg5Vo1TmzPag0sJL0HMHVkqdEz5T0OorkSDURqD10X7aNoaeLt8c6e-EjUDpWj_OiuOoWpQ71PU5OgerXV9wCAbrvikRmhqARSLCpIBHkDR5JORTA51JBMjm9hlTxbgWWRgRzmt-R0ogUTpQA-g9HioOUeDUkcWeYMkzLSvJK_59cqEcwDSxC-X0zLZr_HOeBt3f-uF_mUroz8OhcK1795H-p54hB0UnDlRujMtGPDOzBUo-iBCK4nYGD1qgzAhJ8BOxeXFf8yVLQPJ-hXralxC9ib1SIJbvUhOAojj0T22Yt86hbqVGQznTLYDfaqaLhw-pOQ9H9vB9vvcQIA/yFA08AqmRnKilBrxuCSiD8VZzbw1JxWa/7)** Californians are waking up to how disastrous these years of Democrat rule have been. There is no better way to highlight that failure than putting myself, a Sheriff who has spent decades defending law and order, up against Kamala Harris, who as Attorney General oversaw the severe decline in public safety that we are living with today.Kamala Harris, Karen Bass, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff want us to forget the harm that Democrat rule has caused to California.But you know how these years have been:
---
* Democrats’ lack of preparation and water management allowed wildfires to ravage the state, while Karen Bass and Gavin Newsom were nowhere to be found.
* Despite Democrats spending hundreds of millions to “fix” it—crime, homelessness, and drug addiction skyrocketed.
* Democrats wasted billions of dollars on “high-speed rail” with nothing to show for it.

---
As they say: fool me once, shame on you... Fool me twice, shame on me.Well Californians ought to be ashamed.There’s rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is unbearable...Californians are being taxed to death just to watch their hard-earned dollars go towards fighting against Trump’s common-sense policies like wildfire prevention, immigration reform, and water storage improvement.These California Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they _welcome_ the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Chad, I’m afraid California’s best days are behind us.”But listen, here’s something you need to remember...**_Republicans turned things around_ by electing Ronald Reagan as Governor of California.****_And we can do that again_**. **But there’s no way I can pull it off without you.****[That’s why I’m asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/rLEfYszOFOm-pSwxsDN_bXFJc2nVJ1nELpa7Q1ZcT8utagixWXWHZ6k8kpNIa2WswDWqhLs4YpWBWf6-cNtC0Z1FJGHgWTM98RV7B7m-tpFbtuA6FDMnkS5qiL0niOIzGaoX73CywjJiG-VFZD636Xi6kCIXv-TY1ljeC0qUKorrcSaUd7Jvm3ySmkwLVyLI0StF-cLgZW2SMdckXwMMNG9_kX7dyk6AiUaqk4LnK9XJSrXPccAhwQibZZ1_dTcSAhEpCLMumKy-U7I3e8fDVwzsOLKus_vW9EEPxQK1OhhVLEp9_yCjHGF-BKZvL_a5n-jA_N2RPQWebe4C9KOs_Pdp02AGa6VMrJS1CYXKs8dGN4vCwcUUtOwcE1EwOownoGQlEyxjs64wi1PcZDAFKBUIWxCHNlUvNRE-wyd_Vx4PixRIhpoPy3YL1eQnayV8WjIvVuvrQj-PvQ/P5kNIp_l8hFNclRC_avB4Vl97Pn2WXo_/7)** More and more everyday Americans are waking up to the harm that years of Democrat rule has caused them, and they are turning their backs on the party that betrayed them. A recent statewide poll showed Gov. Gavin Newsom's approval rating among likely voters at 44%. The number for the state legislature is even lower, with a 40% approval rating. Fewer than 20% of L.A. residents give Mayor Karen Bass high marks for fire response. Six in 10 voters said they felt the state was going in the wrong direction. The polling for Republicans has never been stronger in 20 years because of the dissatisfaction with the Democrats controlling their government.The time is right...But California is massive. We need to ignite a massive grassroots movement to compete across all 163,696 square miles and in all 58 counties. **[**When you rush your Bianco for California contribution of $35 or more...**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/jsvfvvwAGSRbmUUtagWDmNyrhfS9gT8c6wF-pe1dBB6YQgBTnrk94hD_ZcHBh4d_TDYWSK7jgbLAnx9AKKSQG09wUa4e5jDQ6ahZeZPJrsrnSzOjjT5V4A82bicH9z2VwfvF2WTZuRQa1cAYuKGiSKWMBqlF1_hrOwdw7qOSzuWwc9lnfD4RWzIDWKPH4CQOD4BmR-K04Jq9QRdyITMR_RerDfWaWSvQZHqmxfGAqbyqLLxeTeoD_jKxiCqrqIbSR84xfMqGZT6nDGzZFP8e0WdnX_ewBllxXUnBGyNQoDJJ6UrvlgsKp88x_1jmm5Er_yCyeHI9Lcxh015PnpQnsBwbsxtFdUJMwjMxYNC7x8E0iRuIfQySIWitoi-g3I8u-PfSvfVyGjc1h5b36UjJzF681VlLMeUJh75JMhEzD0cFSK7YbEEvhqbfnEwm3LiP40xaTKOp969D8w/fkcvhDAQJFAxSK83ucB89CFn8GQXCWUP/7)**...you’re helping us fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: _You don’t have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free.__**We rely on everyday Americans like you**_ — _Not liberal Hollywood elites_ —to fund this campaign. **[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in to my campaign and give us the resources we need to go up against the Kamala Harris fundraising goliath.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/Lev_vktW9Hsp58Gdmigfgk-pU5tMNfhRddbKuheJPd3UwnAUaa4ETKhRMDY_bBV8lFHbxhcbuaLfh16v-St7idLm9_7306dOEc6q7rQdzNgH0skJGO0ULCFKRePGRooKqAW-LBHce-CNQROyyju3SlK4W1n_8_XbsJsGT6kUqSF9MqqDhk7dyln1KLwianQYCJ6mzlZGxpdjN7ajVKZk2WVBIc3ybry9Hy-DFvUebIp4_lP_LBbVikf2rG3p_qK0RFWOp9CYQoRD6alKTR_ZRHw_LQOudvcwAdEuzzNWloziBqagv9JTWJcSWjXkBTOCPMDNfe-xDTojRpINsGvquu24-SMkxZD-gJK7iulyNxKzDpfO7xhgfmxcZW9gOmSw4HZAedFm4sbiWNtm_WIlHxBXyAsqDgBUzyRIGknAnSNyNWMKrNNSyOxdNiwNeeSPfQ0IZBy1ABnx_A/5i8fjn2V6uAbhfCNOPWe-FwsUpdy0sd4/7)** The Democrat machine that raised a billion dollars for Kamala Harris is going to come out in full force in her home state of California. But people are fed up with her, with her incompetence, and with the years of Democrat rule.Even if she outraises me 10-to-1, I’ll have a good fighting chance.This race is the toughest in the nation. But I have been doing something just as tough—tackling crime in California.Here is what Democrats don’t understand about the crime problem: when someone breaks the law or is a violent repeat offender, you put them in jail. It’s not a systemic or societal problem. Or a racism problem. It is an accountability problem.I’ve been wrangling criminals without help from these Democrats for years.And despite Liberal politicians and the local media trying to get rid of me, I’ve won two terms as Sheriff.That’s how you can know I’m the man for the job.Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win statewide in California as a Republican.When we win here... defeating Kamala Harris for the second time......we become the line of defense against these failed liberal policies spreading to the rest of the country.And we stop Kamala Harris, or whoever the Democrats put up for Governor, from using California as a liberal launchpad for their extremist agenda.It all depends on you!
---
| | [ **DONATE **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/GvU4WUhnpzoC_BSnDq0jzsK3V0fiYT_Z-zBu6kukcEk0JNFLKDuRRmUM44ori9isQdKiASIv6th56iUscY3PazdkVMPyLhuUnYmjJ5mZAuKZrmbMGU-eGcWJ6cYxyGY2QwYpc86Qklg62B_o_U8XVgOBMbCd1jb3AiFSUILEfIiRN69w90ced1G2-96oQ2JjBKQ4nTJrpWKiMnPadp5jbjoRkDh63-TYFBzJltc7SrBoY16RPWutcdbGaTDTF-UMmJWVeQaD15AXId3m1FHXMHZlnqbzCzxuUdu1gGayaQIxx7fRggm_W3ruLTedogAxAiUYVw3V51YaUpn3gErMQC5ZFeKznw27S2U9l4qK4KOYXcucNG-09nkjL3zk_gFjUwjj9HSMEQeE0ThIlQDZAYN1bCKCwWdaDKUpcrdB9cV1XI05UVgKaRgVJqz-zSd4DPCz8QAxnqUIXg/_ckNyElCbkiI6h-pcgTwggcDBwl1Z0UZ/7)

Thank you and God Bless,Sheriff Chad Bianco

But people are fed up with her, with her incompetence, and with the years of Democrat rule.Even if she outraises me 10-to-1, I’ll have a good fighting chance.This race is the toughest in the nation. But I have been doing something just as tough—tackling crime in California.Here is what Democrats don’t understand about the crime problem: when someone breaks the law or is a violent repeat offender, you put them in jail. It’s not a systemic or societal problem. Or a racism problem. It is an accountability problem.I’ve been wrangling criminals without help from these Democrats for years.And despite Liberal politicians and the local media trying to get rid of me, I’ve won two terms as Sheriff.That’s how you can know I’m the man for the job.Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win statewide in California as a Republican.When we win here... defeating Kamala Harris for the second time......we become the line of defense against these failed liberal policies spreading to the rest of the country.And we stop Kamala Harris, or whoever the Democrats put up for Governor, from using California as a liberal launchpad for their extremist agenda.It all depends on you! | | Thank you and God Bless,Sheriff Chad Bianco Chad Bianco For Governor | | Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026 PO Box 706Riverside, CA 92502 Pop Acta Media | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: We can win in California again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026
body:
Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor’s race.

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars.It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world.
---
| | Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the line and kept Riverside County safe. Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities is graver than ever before.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/KV1V65OggYWHA0Vco6W43xZ8OglctcRk3vEC7aecnWoq3wXL_oQRlUjWKgC9qkQn220IhMckyeQpjQmeCRV6YQdESVbQWBheGy2XEhQohrk2x7RGqwDnka4U3-s5LBhIDXER97nV6j4bDSXTu0a4Hv6W9lheRniwLftZHuVB8VVtJ0Ip82JEWgXlgqZmpPSu1qAc276yrEGlfJzNzccWp_t3VPGkis-D5SY-6HZE2NVov7xJ3azqMiBHGnpfPMUx9O6GlwhFVzYmx-jSTMlRNrJvS3I0ZX1pvSFHjtAGOxbCJf9Uu4syh928DFQy-i64VVAJzFy-oKZI_kYKSNjc_ofnxXVamnvCcte7FGsUwiKpvfn1ousjX0iglqhv57hlMGcGPdKPmBvIsVQlTGi663YsH3Z9abnU6g3mDGArANZZOCzkM9DRw3TscKswN6uq90DOn2pt6zOAoQ/5T_XEfBi-hGfkh751E_YifWEo2XSnlDD/7)
---
| | That’s because Kamala Harris is positioning herself to run for Governor of California. **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat radical Kamala Harris in the race for California Governor.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/_8xPauHieeMuHLj5ckf4SWbcRHWUDb1bpOgqX9ECXlGjTLXb4JIC1FSMuqcnX05j6PtqmDN22b2ltIcIuTEMkhKx33QSnoAOvQ3rSC_szuoJcXFqCst_TqrYG-TvxnFFy66c4ju2ZaeJOk-dcmsDyn2rFTXZNxigwxQ07wCzTRrRpWU1uNls4NQ91dzJJQQvdiJkX2XgX1wv-YhIcrsp8noQOlb4Xyucp3SXZJTEsrR5wUq__-xKoq3Nprek4TXR6miWTWHuAWz4F9kbBOaw7Qr16Sxn6s13o66S4_QZBW5xbn9ZrS-HJyW6pjguEmBv6bcdSfM1pe1ntOGKa8twSLiXhqpmMsBbJxlKH8xH3YCMJ2lTU5ho0HekSeVKsP5fFmuDdExbV1WC3qyA-esJItofh7evnouIDYFJq0LNH505G_GLZZZ8GdQHYx-4V3nyNHSWDBvAapRdaw/L9wCjggVPbRYZo9ObVPPpQAlw4iz78lZ/7)** Californians are waking up to how disastrous these years of Democrat rule have been. There is no better way to highlight that failure than putting myself, a Sheriff who has spent decades defending law and order, up against Kamala Harris, who as Attorney General oversaw the severe decline in public safety that we are living with today.Kamala Harris, Karen Bass, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff want us to forget the harm that Democrat rule has caused to California.But you know how these years have been:
---
* Democrats’ lack of preparation and water management allowed wildfires to ravage the state, while Karen Bass and Gavin Newsom were nowhere to be found.
* Despite Democrats spending hundreds of millions to “fix” it—crime, homelessness, and drug addiction skyrocketed.
* Democrats wasted billions of dollars on “high-speed rail” with nothing to show for it.

---
As they say: fool me once, shame on you... Fool me twice, shame on me.Well Californians ought to be ashamed.There’s rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is unbearable...Californians are being taxed to death just to watch their hard-earned dollars go towards fighting against Trump’s common-sense policies like wildfire prevention, immigration reform, and water storage improvement.These California Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they _welcome_ the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Chad, I’m afraid California’s best days are behind us.”But listen, here’s something you need to remember...**_Republicans turned things around_ by electing Ronald Reagan as Governor of California.****_And we can do that again_**. **But there’s no way I can pull it off without you.****[That’s why I’m asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/vPYDVfT2FQozr11lZLYF7eSZcnB3yqQbGlf6c5EktZvAqxYbiBzrYf-xT3YQ1nQwG3yYBArYbHmwY8LZKbqCxAR6zlNKJgvk9rCTN-qudvMynEcrxP4xBa_haIe3KegFmJKSSm4EgQhTfY2Vstf04bhKyle-b9v9EGGT-NND_K8r9JJwMeXsuM4tZu4nPdRkJh4uwS765zE42WOcI9dbJd5ZQCIp9rf_kTWXG6wWwC8eKT4nBGt_SXmvOf2KHhDTJ0wNVvaVqHxdA1VfMe0njDSx515Xgp1xTosninJ-BiW8SkILeuxn5Wez70fQPwt3m44U2f2rbCysFBjOg8rVGEwmqcoXhB5JHTI0YFA1kZXDp6R16wNryV2n-0Q58bP915L-F7Rocn3u6w6EDf0S4-VFcGJ9Vhl-csP8uCHxxFx9swkQdqYh6QCNh0DbMFCOycrT1qclV2G6Ug/QhLcK33CedIz98iHw7MYk9ZdHqe3eOcv/7)** More and more everyday Americans are waking up to the harm that years of Democrat rule has caused them, and they are turning their backs on the party that betrayed them. A recent statewide poll showed Gov. Gavin Newsom's approval rating among likely voters at 44%. The number for the state legislature is even lower, with a 40% approval rating. Fewer than 20% of L.A. residents give Mayor Karen Bass high marks for fire response. Six in 10 voters said they felt the state was going in the wrong direction. The polling for Republicans has never been stronger in 20 years because of the dissatisfaction with the Democrats controlling their government.The time is right...But California is massive. We need to ignite a massive grassroots movement to compete across all 163,696 square miles and in all 58 counties. **[**When you rush your Bianco for California contribution of $35 or more...**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/2RIQHE5Qk4BJnRx-jMA-ODF-6bxBtnpaax3TEWBOiYclEgpb5lWsAV4BHDm3hjOFqGsaDMJPQoT0s7JDgaaY3YEyZVCzN1UYvqzh6ev35DMB0QaDCokYwIqVtUPlD5lVRuF3kuQOy2kZGd17tTf6lbie36_FqFZuvTTy1UOY25hFpSjr53YPrLSeWnZ0Du28uktKb7j6od61aALzLVoCWe5c794NZ8foPJRf0ghfBYLUL_vSiySRYNLCJHifMPq7KlybX5d6rGc-iS8AN-7ZNjLLWrJhWXUDb8wAovimtTZkshMZe7eeJEruPgPRKqcoKXFrYH31TXwIGknsJ6YmrqKP09qWH6ixw5Ol60gbcVR5Yj773qX4gSNlupztsy3bPtemKch1Wjm9Y40ES8bFaNptYWFob3QVi9CnDRShZbdRJVyADMTpxHWbnZTGvNvxW5nuB83hdQ0BqQ/ZvcAoMd8hYGGx2HFhoVUIMnuT74SaDDG/7)**...you’re helping us fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: _You don’t have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free.__**We rely on everyday Americans like you**_ — _Not liberal Hollywood elites_ —to fund this campaign. **[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in to my campaign and give us the resources we need to go up against the Kamala Harris fundraising goliath.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/1m6kNSvJn0sF1a9LnByTe3NbeXJd45SgIQz_yV42d8Vh3dwRe0m3_Oz9y2wKtyXli6rE-9JqcRTTk1fhRbVrCf1KY8v759OuQru8vKc1XF-A5AvsVe304LE6BOac6Uk47_ajuB6qDSqFPYetE99a7VzPKsWIK9tvadPlQe0KtUuoWf2FzsQ2-NQvYrtglMxAJOX5N-W4GtvlKGDluXx1qyMJZKIPAvP2khx83DCVXY34wZdc7AsbY5vi1n3rCeK210wTxRGNYSIjExsJ9plYvXTM0XuI8ck3O79iiS3MZxu7kn-1rkMf7oHCDL0uOr6-toFuPH-YXVDRTkvM3o6JNkeVRRCZ419hbP4Si-RUn_TsmvntqsJTYG3KBe5-YScm5L9F400tFXQPh0UE3PMnurUB0UN-lwFXEs_7H4dl0V_QW5Yek0hmrDPMZ9oS_tX1PkuVZn_WtDZJGQ/av-ULq96YTSL-jV4krgstD6c7ZnHxfIN/7)** The Democrat machine that raised a billion dollars for Kamala Harris is going to come out in full force in her home state of California. But people are fed up with her, with her incompetence, and with the years of Democrat rule.Even if she outraises me 10-to-1, I’ll have a good fighting chance.This race is the toughest in the nation. But I have been doing something just as tough—tackling crime in California.Here is what Democrats don’t understand about the crime problem: when someone breaks the law or is a violent repeat offender, you put them in jail. It’s not a systemic or societal problem. Or a racism problem. It is an accountability problem.I’ve been wrangling criminals without help from these Democrats for years.And despite Liberal politicians and the local media trying to get rid of me, I’ve won two terms as Sheriff.That’s how you can know I’m the man for the job.Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win statewide in California as a Republican.When we win here... defeating Kamala Harris for the second time......we become the line of defense against these failed liberal policies spreading to the rest of the country.And we stop Kamala Harris, or whoever the Democrats put up for Governor, from using California as a liberal launchpad for their extremist agenda.It all depends on you!

clean_body: Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor’s race. | | | | | | Dear Friend,You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars.It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world. | | Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the line and kept Riverside County safe. Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities is graver than ever before. | | | That’s because Kamala Harris is positioning herself to run for Governor of California. Californians are waking up to how disastrous these years of Democrat rule have been. There is no better way to highlight that failure than putting myself, a Sheriff who has spent decades defending law and order, up against Kamala Harris, who as Attorney General oversaw the severe decline in public safety that we are living with today.Kamala Harris, Karen Bass, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff want us to forget the harm that Democrat rule has caused to California.But you know how these years have been: Democrats’ lack of preparation and water management allowed wildfires to ravage the state, while Karen Bass and Gavin Newsom were nowhere to be found. Despite Democrats spending hundreds of millions to “fix” it—crime, homelessness, and drug addiction skyrocketed. Democrats wasted billions of dollars on “high-speed rail” with nothing to show for it. As they say: fool me once, shame on you... Fool me twice, shame on me.Well Californians ought to be ashamed.There’s rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is unbearable...Californians are being taxed to death just to watch their hard-earned dollars go towards fighting against Trump’s common-sense policies like wildfire prevention, immigration reform, and water storage improvement.These California Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Chad, I’m afraid California’s best days are behind us.”But listen, here’s something you need to remember...Republicans turned things around by electing Ronald Reagan as Governor of California.**And we can do that again. But there’s no way I can pull it off without you. More and more everyday Americans are waking up to the harm that years of Democrat rule has caused them, and they are turning their backs on the party that betrayed them. A recent statewide poll showed Gov. Gavin Newsom's approval rating among likely voters at 44%. The number for the state legislature is even lower, with a 40% approval rating. Fewer than 20% of L.A. residents give Mayor Karen Bass high marks for fire response. Six in 10 voters said they felt the state was going in the wrong direction. The polling for Republicans has never been stronger in 20 years because of the dissatisfaction with the Democrats controlling their government.The time is right...But California is massive. We need to ignite a massive grassroots movement to compete across all 163,696 square miles and in all 58 counties. ’re helping us fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: You don’t have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free.We rely on everyday Americans like you — Not liberal Hollywood elites —to fund this campaign. The Democrat machine that raised a billion dollars for Kamala Harris is going to come out in full force in her home state of California. But people are fed up with her, with her incompetence, and with the years of Democrat rule.Even if she outraises me 10-to-1, I’ll have a good fighting chance.This race is the toughest in the nation. But I have been doing something just as tough—tackling crime in California.Here is what Democrats don’t understand about the crime problem: when someone breaks the law or is a violent repeat offender, you put them in jail. It’s not a systemic or societal problem. Or a racism problem. It is an accountability problem.I’ve been wrangling criminals without help from these Democrats for years.And despite Liberal politicians and the local media trying to get rid of me, I’ve won two terms as Sheriff.That’s how you can know I’m the man for the job.Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win statewide in California as a Republican.When we win here... defeating Kamala Harris for the second time......we become the line of defense against these failed liberal policies spreading to the rest of the country.And we stop Kamala Harris, or whoever the Democrats put up for Governor, from using California as a liberal launchpad for their extremist agenda.It all depends on you! | | Thank you and God Bless,Sheriff Chad Bianco Chad Bianco For Governor | | Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026 PO Box 706Riverside, CA 92502 Pop Acta Media | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

They simply cannot fathom that I, Winsome Earle-Sears, am a proud conservative Republican - that I dare to think **differently!**

name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: We can win in California again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026
body:
Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor’s race.

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars.It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world.
---
| | Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the line and kept Riverside County safe. Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities is graver than ever before.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/29kmrdUnYoAX6lELH6eo91B1zmgAyZaS0rVLKXotqtfneLmJoOK3vf5zyPYNhJdwQ-o9F_gk1aX36CTTHmnprcOUUbOLnoWpAw7XtH47P5lLWAPfebE0nPG1EkNlSG4lxKOVQhzdlo_Pjwf1-n5Cm8o1TuDgrPfkzbhOueYWJYdEdpP_5SULGjdXY3SfwbJ4MgjeQZ2lBiQie_Pp9q1P0Hrk4WMHhkCP1L_jd2HCkV9bBmJT-B3pK3SEGlw3bjkkTDnpRyPU3jhsaGkGClBb7CuxfBnfj1NX2OkdVdjTets-tk6ENcliDlMr-aL9bkaM6NWBkZvudi9xBJq1DMdqjCmsOfBOPwK_wV0iggTqmpwH0edo-CBK8wSJZGa36Ej3a2_KdBdlzVjIqjMLvCHAaBXM9MO9_Ukwov4L8J5IrjUKJfbu1-wBrn1F4c5Sr34IHaUUyPv5uQtCfg/yOhA1adGAavfUUpAvq6DpUdFq3FnWeFH/7)
---
| | That’s because Kamala Harris is positioning herself to run for Governor of California. **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat radical Kamala Harris in the race for California Governor.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/ltlW0d1PBYt3IyV8F-UL4QlpHgUK9cJu0CEd4evonjEG5PLUpy9nHGUkz41D9MkSB897kZ8ntwzUcCnCqKv2laDvZbjH3VGxH9Vnag31yThoi7iFBAbCuMlFFvh0Aabwl9SSWs2OwTgdv5A3Xd2hooaEfp5Wh6MG6Rwx_t4oc92kUtcbkNvh-9QAvP6qhZT4__oHgQ5G2BS7YvHozqKLPc-KWueHNkhVwWaUUXetJyQG3QZ9wGOd5zeUGSDu-murqN4rwwhZLgEAanpW478OVS9NHWRRlnUclAHKAMTjxKNOV9bpdzNteIqUJ5Umc0662zWjsuMHTdC7Do6Ai9motgIWLBmUWOFwhEXYrqrOuEyrOREs4oiT307ocLOHnqPn2igJvXCF57V4IPVHaO2nnjITs64245TbcuJyQbGwWEJBip8z4aerW8Gere81x6E_ROGu1o-1pCngrg/cRGVORK1A260NfoIwhzDCSM_IwRrtJ6H/7)** Californians are waking up to how disastrous these years of Democrat rule have been. There is no better way to highlight that failure than putting myself, a Sheriff who has spent decades defending law and order, up against Kamala Harris, who as Attorney General oversaw the severe decline in public safety that we are living with today.Kamala Harris, Karen Bass, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff want us to forget the harm that Democrat rule has caused to California.But you know how these years have been:
---
* Democrats’ lack of preparation and water management allowed wildfires to ravage the state, while Karen Bass and Gavin Newsom were nowhere to be found.
* Despite Democrats spending hundreds of millions to “fix” it—crime, homelessness, and drug addiction skyrocketed.
* Democrats wasted billions of dollars on “high-speed rail” with nothing to show for it.

---

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Call this what it is:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I don’t like to mince words, and I’m not afraid to tell you how I feel about something.
#

Peter, it’s Ruben.
I’ve spent the last few days processing the fallout after Trump tanked the economy. I don’t like to mince words, and I’m not afraid to tell you how I feel about something.
So, here it is: **This is probably the dumbest thing a president has ever done.**
There were a lot of problems with the way things were going before Trump took office. Prices were too high, wages were too low. Millions of people struggled while millionaires and billionaires kept getting richer.
But there were bright points, too. Manufacturing — especially advanced manufacturing — was coming back. In Arizona we’ve had billions invested in the production of microchips domestically, which was huge. We were investing in infrastructure and clean energy. Unions were getting stronger, wages steadily increasing.
We were on a path to something better.
Now, retirement funds are in the tank. Auto plants are laying off staff. Manufacturers are scrambling to figure out how they’ll stay afloat. Our allies and our closest trading partners are walking away from us, and towards China. And through it all, leadership in the GOP is moving as fast as they can to pass trillion dollar tax cuts for millionaires and billionaires and blow up services that regular people depend on.
I’m sorry, but this is just incalculably stupid. For better or worse, the United States built the global economy — and we put ourselves at the center of it. Trump lit it on fire last Wednesday, and then he clocked out to take a long weekend golfing.
No single American should have that power. In the Senate, I am going to push to reign in Trump and put limits on his power, and I’ll take any allies I can get. There’s some movement on this already, and I’m hopeful we can do more.
And you can be absolutely sure — today, and through the rest of this administration — that I am going to tell everyone I can that all of this is Donald Trump’s fault.
Hang in there, Peter. And please, take care.
Talk soon,
Ruben
🌵Please! Don’t click away yet 🌞
While Ruben takes on the Trump administration, he needs to know he has the support of a big team behind him.**Sustaining, monthly recurring donations are a huge help as we budget out for the long haul.** [**If you can, please consider making a recurring donation to his campaign to help him keep up the pressure.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr25%3Frecurring%3Dtrue.I7W3cb&refcode=em250407-1-90&t=6&akid=3809%2E734936%2Eqeq5Pf)

Thank you! 🫡

clean_body: I don’t like to mince words, and I’m not afraid to tell you how I feel about something. Peter, it’s Ruben. I’ve spent the last few days processing the fallout after Trump tanked the economy. I don’t like to mince words, and I’m not afraid to tell you how I feel about something. So, here it is: This is probably the dumbest thing a president has ever done. There were a lot of problems with the way things were going before Trump took office. Prices were too high, wages were too low. Millions of people struggled while millionaires and billionaires kept getting richer. But there were bright points, too. Manufacturing — especially advanced manufacturing — was coming back. In Arizona we’ve had billions invested in the production of microchips domestically, which was huge. We were investing in infrastructure and clean energy. Unions were getting stronger, wages steadily increasing. We were on a path to something better. Now, retirement funds are in the tank. Auto plants are laying off staff. Manufacturers are scrambling to figure out how they’ll stay afloat. Our allies and our closest trading partners are walking away from us, and towards China. And through it all, leadership in the GOP is moving as fast as they can to pass trillion dollar tax cuts for millionaires and billionaires and blow up services that regular people depend on. I’m sorry, but this is just incalculably stupid. For better or worse, the United States built the global economy — and we put ourselves at the center of it. Trump lit it on fire last Wednesday, and then he clocked out to take a long weekend golfing. No single American should have that power. In the Senate, I am going to push to reign in Trump and put limits on his power, and I’ll take any allies I can get. There’s some movement on this already, and I’m hopeful we can do more. And you can be absolutely sure — today, and through the rest of this administration — that I am going to tell everyone I can that all of this is Donald Trump’s fault. Hang in there, Peter. And please, take care. Talk soon, Ruben 🌵Please! Don’t click away yet 🌞 While Ruben takes on the Trump administration, he needs to know he has the support of a big team behind him.Sustaining, monthly recurring donations are a huge help as we budget out for the long haul. Thank you! 🫡 Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

The power of collective action is real, and if we all engage, together, we have a shot at making an impact. That’s why I’m so excited we’re teaming up with Jane Fonda Climate PAC for our **_Boomers vs. Zoomers: Celeb Trivia Night_** event. This isn’t just a trivia night. It’s about building the movement we need to not only meet this moment but to secure a livable future for generations to come.
I’ll be frank: The road ahead is not going to be easy. Trump and his buddies have shown they have no bottom and will do whatever it takes to obtain power and enrich themselves. But while the MAGA extremists and corporate polluters have billionaires and dark money, we have something stronger: people. People like you who can play an essential role in leading this country out of the darkness and into the light.
That’s what this event is about. It’s a serious situation that requires serious action, but that doesn’t mean we can’t have a little fun along the way.

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Waiting to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
What should be next on our agenda for the first 100 days?
| Peter,
---
My father has already issued hundreds of executive orders to get America back on track.
---
****From securing our border to ending “woke” DEI programs in the federal government to resuming drilling to lower energy costs, he’s ENDING Biden’s insanity and putting the American people first!****
---
And this is just the beginning of restoring America’s greatness! There’s still a lot more we can accomplish during his first 100 days in office.
---
But like I’ve said before, the America First movement is built on listening to the grassroots Americans who make this country great.
---

Fellow Patriot,

**[BIG NEWS:](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ee326044223f4ac7910f8f4eee339d99&_e=KEv9a1H1DJqfc247DWXVsUxomoOlxj8l_c0bR0Y7vPkcm7nMXN-cII7YodJvJIWQfPmkw5rBQ-SS8B7VvedwCks-mJmhFuVkxf5gEio2koOI1Eo0D26rRVvUk4BFw0xV2dB3fi_IKZBGeNf9QqDwnEw3zS00hbTzJUdqIOuq1jB1znlWpOtj9-xuRr0Jm9y4d1pmiBl_rj52Z0B4LtmM21T9ZtiXHbcd1EplVk4_r5dxwRvRAKhRAMskkyQYDo99LlduLC24Gy7S_YgqoE3-Hm0EqqCcUbfZmvJbBhcUVo3BCKdGnWGe1-CQhKX1Jddc9tgtD87TkSQEoqR3RBPUQ2esVXniCnVl7zD62YbYCD4lCR9hZrTOYfoFUVFsmZZac1f10t_32uYkeoxHofbiAYmY3nBzvU1LCRpc9jYLlaFNDfcuVpD3cITyfeDhSZzC8_dbHcARWRa6RJCU5GszotHXOU7ZMl5X-XwnwAQiQzw%3D) **Republicans now have an 8-POINT LEAD over Democrats for control of the House and Senate.

But here's the thing...

_... None of that matters unless EVERY Republican completes and verifies their Voter Profile for 2025._

[****](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._QMqg/sduf4fc717d) Dear Patriot,

I’m James O’Keefe, founder of O’Keefe Media Group (OMG), and **we’re in the fight of our lives against the Deep State.

Two weeks ago, I reached out with an urgent mission:** raise $42,000 in ten days to train three new American Swipers—each at $14,000 for cameras, travel, and legal support—to expose the career bureaucrats sabotaging Trump and Musk’s DOGE agenda.

Patriots like you stepped up, and we’re halfway there, with $21,000 raised. **But we didn’t hit our goal by the original deadline.

The Deep State isn’t slowing down, and neither can we**. **[**We’ve extended our deadline—giving us just SEVEN DAYS LEFT to raise the remaining $21,000.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._QMqg/s6vc7d10e77)**

We can’t let these unelected hacks outlast us.

Why the urgency? Just last week, my Swiper team caught NIH genetic counselor James Welch on hidden camera, coaching researchers to dodge DOGE oversight by changing “race” to “ancestry” in trials.

**He even joked about shooting people at NIH! This is the swamp Trump and Musk are draining—and we’re their eyes and ears.**

**The Deep State’s panicking.** Career bureaucrats are scrambling, hiding emails, shredding files, because American Swiper’s exposing their rot—IRS overreach, election fraud, corporate cronies funding illegal immigration.

**[**We’ve already got five Swipers in training, but without three more, we can’t keep up with the scale of their corruption.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._QMqg/sdtd2a1f7af)**

**[**Your $25 buys a day’s training, $50 gets gear, $100 covers legal support.

Donate TODAY, and let’s crush them before they crush us. $21,000—or the truth dies.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._QMqg/sfl64fbcd14)**

For the Truth,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. Seven days left—$21,000 to go. We extended the deadline because the stakes are too high to stop now. **[**Give now or watch the Deep State win!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._QMqg/sep90b4856a)**

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Peter-
MAGA Mike Kennealy is running to be governor of Massachusetts- and he'd love for you to not pay attention to his history of failing to deliver for the people of our Commonwealth.
Under the Baker administration, Mike Kennealy’s job was to oversee housing and economic development in our state- and he failed . He failed to prevent skyrocketing housing costs and failed to cut taxes for hardworking Bay Staters — while Governor Healey passed tax cuts in her first year in office.
Mike Kennealy is unqualified to address the biggest issues facing Massachusetts. In fact, when he announced his candidacy, he never mentioned the single greatest threat to our state- Donald Trump . He doesn't seem concerned that Trump is destroying our economy, alienating our allies, and taking away over one hundred million dollars in funding for Massachusetts schools.
Watch the video below to see the truth about Mike Kennealy's MAGA ties:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NVo2RBtbHa8 [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NVo2RBtbHa8]
Mike Kennealy and his buddies will never prioritize everyday, hardworking people- they're focused on stuffing the pockets of billionaires instead.
That's why we must re-elect Maura Healey and Kim Driscoll next November.
We're ready for this fight. Will you stand with us against MAGA Mike?
MassDems

clean_body: [] Peter- MAGA Mike Kennealy is running to be governor of Massachusetts- and he'd love for you to not pay attention to his history of failing to deliver for the people of our Commonwealth. Under the Baker administration, Mike Kennealy’s job was to oversee housing and economic development in our state- and he failed . He failed to prevent skyrocketing housing costs and failed to cut taxes for hardworking Bay Staters — while Governor Healey passed tax cuts in her first year in office. Mike Kennealy is unqualified to address the biggest issues facing Massachusetts. In fact, when he announced his candidacy, he never mentioned the single greatest threat to our state- Donald Trump . He doesn't seem concerned that Trump is destroying our economy, alienating our allies, and taking away over one hundred million dollars in funding for Massachusetts schools. Watch the video below to see the truth about Mike Kennealy's MAGA ties: [] Mike Kennealy and his buddies will never prioritize everyday, hardworking people- they're focused on stuffing the pockets of billionaires instead. That's why we must re-elect Maura Healey and Kim Driscoll next November. We're ready for this fight. Will you stand with us against MAGA Mike? MassDems [] [] [] [] Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee Massachusetts Democratic Party 11 Beacon St Suite 410 Boston, MA 02108 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

| | | Trump’s asinine tariffs are causing stock markets to plummet as he pushes us into a trade war and poisons relationships with our allies around the globe. Congress has the power to stop Trump’s tariffs – but that will require Republicans to put our country over Trump’s ego and show some guts for once. Prices on almost everything will go up, and we could soon be in a recession. This could easily turn into another great depression, unless Congress steps in to stop it. For the sake of our entire economy and way of life, we need to DEMAND Republicans join with Democrats to REVERSE Trump’s disastrous tariffs. [Sign your name: Demand Congress reverse Trump’s tariffs >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40c6fbbb-35ce-40e8-89f4-0d1c4c406c00/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105376138/538137129/1861023790?amount=10&source=sbd_ad_em_res_040725_mywhy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDdhZTEyMy1kNzEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V9JGEDCs0E5AcuJmn6mGcuZAXFNWJBBujmIOqXiX8A4=) Peter: When I decided to run for Lieutenant Governor, the first thing people asked me was “Why are you running?” **What I don’t often get asked now that I’m an elected official is why I do what I do — even when it’s hard.** My why is the hard working people I grew up with in Mon Valley — factory workers, teachers, and who are the lifeblood of our state. My why is my mom and dad — a hairdresser and a union bus driver I watched juggle bills, putting food on the table, and raising a family. My why is my wife Blayre and my daughter Harper who both deserve access to reproductive healthcare and bodily autonomy. **_My why is the people of Pennsylvania._** Knowing my why is what gets me up in the morning and what motivates me to fight for the people of Pennsylvania every day. Maybe your why is like mine. You’re worried about your parents' Social Security or your neighbor’s Medicare. You care about people. **[If so, I hope you’ll consider pitching in today. I’m on the frontlines standing up to the Trump regime and as his administration goes all in to attack federal jobs, DEI initiatives, environmental protections, and healthcare access, I could use all the help I can get:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105376139/538137143/1861023790?amount=10&source=sbd_ad_em_res_040725_mywhy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDdhZTEyMy1kNzEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V9JGEDCs0E5AcuJmn6mGcuZAXFNWJBBujmIOqXiX8A4=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania Blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter: When I decided to run for Lieutenant Governor, the first thing people asked me was “Why are you running?” What I don’t often get asked now that I’m an elected official is why I do what I do — even when it’s hard. My why is the hard working people I grew up with in Mon Valley — factory workers, teachers, and who are the lifeblood of our state. My why is my mom and dad — a hairdresser and a union bus driver I watched juggle bills, putting food on the table, and raising a family. My why is my wife Blayre and my daughter Harper who both deserve access to reproductive healthcare and bodily autonomy. My why is the people of Pennsylvania. Knowing my why is what gets me up in the morning and what motivates me to fight for the people of Pennsylvania every day. Maybe your why is like mine. You’re worried about your parents' Social Security or your neighbor’s Medicare. You care about people. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = What’s your why, Peter? Austin Davis * | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as lieutenant governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades. Now, he's helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania Blue up and down the ballot in 2024. Can you chip in today to help me keep Pennsylvania Blue? | = = Paid for by Friends of Austin Davis Friends of Austin Davis PO Box 304 McKeesport, PA 15134 United States If you need to unsubscribe,

name: Leader Scalise
subject: Some candor about Tuesday’s election:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
First off, I want to personally welcome MAGA warriors Jimmy Patronis and Randy Fine to our House Republican ranks. They will play an essential role in passing President Trump’s agenda. | |
---
| | | We need to**** talk about last Tuesday's election...

First off, I want to personally welcome MAGA warriors Jimmy Patronis and Randy Fine to our House Republican ranks. They will play an essential role in passing President Trump's agenda. _**[Now I need to level with you for a moment. That's why I'm coming to you with three pressing updates:](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2c0742b149634b1fbeff3f1c9fc2c439&_e=VwiGFhRc1iykVmlSpqzzjXuXR5-PbkbtuTgb5uozgCzqZ2SzbTpsThBOVhHHniQSHTGzaYktIPq-7Az0V98sHUEAmtP2-KAPz0QP2Hd1YwIQYFrYMCyIIqI_BeF2P5Nab8ia5iYFXaScjAwGWfVMYozAXVcY4NCYMSjKF3pUdfPR831XBZ3J1DeteS6SoksAdLH89OHjgGSuynG-1FxVGyrwlGx-LwZsFA29Ks8RM19GPa0MeKB6gb2n2V2zg6tH6d2CPEoDEfi7JN_iDFtpiCQjB5uqLNHJ68jksKKEiOU6FTgKyTWuXomJgSeS-Fd3lroATwGaZ3cUg-zJnfinwYEC1iSnsRWb-8Xe74p2Qsyh4TJLxguK1cnmutJwdLEyaW4i051W9v39KccGxWkZ3hb4unsS0yXpNmZYLUTFyXo%3D "Now I need to level with you for a moment. That’s why I’m coming to you with three pressing updates:")**_
1. We got shellacked in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race - the Liberal outspent the Conservative candidate by DOUBLE
2. Multiple House seats in Wisconsin are now in serious jeopardy - our Conservative Majority is barely hanging on already
3. The Florida Special Elections were sobering - the Democrat in FL-06 outraised us TEN-TO-ONE

I'm not making a mountain out of a molehill here.

_President Trump 's entire legislative agenda comes to a SCREECHING HALT if this keeps happening._ We have the better ideas, we have the better candidates... but none of that matters if our message is drowned out by a wall of false and misleading Democrat attack ads.

We either rise to the occasion right now or we give up and let the Democrat Machine steamroll everything we've worked so hard for.

So that's why I'm doing something I've never done before.

I'm setting up an emergency one-million-dollar fundraising blitz between now and the end of the week. I'll need your help to get there. It's an ambitious goal but I have faith in this team. **This will help send badly needed reinforcements to the key races in Wisconsin AND fortify our defenses in other must-win races too.**

**[All I ask is that EVERYONE who recognizes the seriousness of last Tuesday's elections pitches in SOMETHING!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2c0742b149634b1fbeff3f1c9fc2c439&_e=VwiGFhRc1iykVmlSpqzzjXuXR5-PbkbtuTgb5uozgCzqZ2SzbTpsThBOVhHHniQSHTGzaYktIPq-7Az0V98sHUEAmtP2-KAPz0QP2Hd1YwIQYFrYMCyIIqI_BeF2P5Nab8ia5iYFXaScjAwGWfVMYozAXVcY4NCYMSjKF3pUdfPR831XBZ3J1DeteS6SoksAdLH89OHjgGSuynG-1FxVGyrwlGx-LwZsFA29Ks8RM19GPa0MeKB6gb2n2V2zg6tHHhuDFyNQjzwWAYyokrsiugE5-UjMMUx79ANuiYfa5RT66YAz785KGxIgmPFs0mnShrpkDM_QlZuH91nN5XEohC37b3V3LbwfWqJhwLidA6yKpNxujh06jARjwAOh_7wMVqXX3TLLcZHGZrovS28oiEizz9TK4DrvlBz7Ti8awlc%3D "All I ask is that EVERYONE who recognizes the seriousness of last Tuesday’s elections pitches in SOMETHING!")**

Look:

If we let the Democrat Fundraising Machine keep outraising and outspending us, we're finished. It's over for our House Majority.

President Trump's ENTIRE legislative agenda hangs in the balance so I'm not holding anything back._That 's why I'm personally asking for your support today._

Unfortunately, this can't wait until next year - it can't even wait until next week.

**[Last Tuesday was a wake-up call for our Conservative movement so we need to move right here and right now. Can you please save the day?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2c0742b149634b1fbeff3f1c9fc2c439&_e=VwiGFhRc1iykVmlSpqzzjXuXR5-PbkbtuTgb5uozgCzqZ2SzbTpsThBOVhHHniQSHTGzaYktIPq-7Az0V98sHUEAmtP2-KAPz0QP2Hd1YwIQYFrYMCyIIqI_BeF2P5Nab8ia5iYFXaScjAwGWfVMYozAXVcY4NCYMSjKF3pUdfPR831XBZ3J1DeteS6SoksAdLH89OHjgGSuynG-1FxVGyrwlGx-LwZsFA29Ks8RM19GPa0MeKB6gb2n2V2zg6tHHCO6NNOjTRqYAYjTGjDRy8mlY253wlhdw80ixGFs2tNNziXym5YTCnhAZnja0IAH4WTCSbrdmxHha0iRBPvjMdF5CU7zvg3AQtnOm1eZtuv9Jan6-Bdtbqf-PkrCursU4tP_UCeitGyn0Ogrxbqrj02dNrxxtlbn5-5vMs1zxzg%3D "Last Tuesday was a wake-up call for our Conservative movement so we need to move right here and right now. I sincerely hope so.

Thanks for all you do,
- _Steve_

# BLUE LETTER
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f213e8c6-8f32-4b79-a4ae-c7cedc4af916?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### CLIFF'S NOTE: The Tariff Hits The Fan: Trump's Economic Arson's So Bad, Even _Republicans_ Are FREAKING OUT
This, my friends, isn't just another spicy headline crafted to appease the soulless algorithm gods at Meta-gram or MonopoliTube. **No --this is as real.** The kinda real that smashes stock markets while Grandpa Tariff toodles around in a golf cart--not a care in the world--except kicking his ball outta the rough to cheat like a sweaty, bloated, orange Happy Gilmore.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ab32498a-09da-4ed4-ae0a-2cb5b034c640?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It's impressively Marie Antoinette, cheating at golf and bankrupting our 401(k)s simultaneously. The problem is--for him, anyhow--MAGA diehards are starting to feel the pain, and it ain't because they've suddenly discovered the joys of Keynesian economics. It's because his boneheaded tariffs are punching them directly in the gut. And not just regular Republicans, but the elected aristocracy too.
Susan Collins isn't "concerned," anymore, she's _screwed_. Lumber? Tourism? Gone. Canadians are no longer coming to Old Orchard Beach--they're too busy _not_ paying 40% more for a crate of American maple syrup. Rand Paul, normally busy auditioning for Russian talk shows, is suddenly screaming at tariffs like they're his neighbor mowing the lawn.
And Mitch McConnell--yeah, I know, he's basically a crumbling animatronic at this point--but when _he 's_ _slamming_ _Trump_ , that's not out of personal concern. That's the sound of Corporate America flipping over the Monopoly board and preparing to storm Park Place.
Because here's a dirty little secret I keep harping on, and will until every last person hears it: It doesn't matter if you've got ten bucks or ten million, in terms of how Trump sees you. If you're not part of the Trump-allied oligarchy--the inside crew hoarding cash to buy America on clearance after the crash--you're nothing. As Gordon Gekko put it in _Wall Street_ :
> [If you're not inside, you're outside, okay? And I'm not talking a $400,000 a year working Wall Street stiff flying first class and being comfortable, I'm talking about liquid. Rich enough to have your own jet. Rich enough not to waste time. Fifty, a hundred million dollars, buddy. A player, or nothing](https://substack.com/redirect/679320a3-4bea-479d-957d-082563d7ad55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [Ed Note: Gekko's $100MM = just under $300MM in today's dollars].
**Blue Amp 's a simple idea: Insiders turned fearless outsiders **_**telling you what others won 't**_**. We 're un-bought; We Need Your Support.**_**Please become a paid subscriber**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.9Itps6SGCY7uBCx8NB1aKDA_z4cXdYvlwWmHK8E7KYo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=160784928)
Whether you're a farmer with empty, worker-starved fields (thanks to Don's cruelty-fueled deportation), a Wall Street firm whose clients just lost billions or a real estate honcho stuck with no labor force and overpriced homes no one can afford, _you 're getting hammered_. Now, I'm not telling you, dear reader, to shed a tear for the GOP jabronis _just_ realizing that empowering a narcissistic fascist with the economic IQ of a half-eaten Pop-Tart wasn't a good business decision. Don't you _dare_ feel bad.
But do enjoy the poetic justice as they finally wake up to the fact that Trump's not just coming for the libs--he's coming for them. In fact, in many cases, he already has. Though, there is one industry he may actually resurrect: pitchfork manufacturing. At this rate, Americans are gonna need _a lot_ of 'em.
**David Shuster really covers this topic thoroughly in the video below. WATCH!**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/de4d13d6-7be7-4ef1-9038-f281f9808002?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
### _**... Yo, Check This Out!**_
* The Hands Off protests this weekend were inspiring. More than 5 million Americans, by recent count, got out there to make their voices heard--roughly 1% of our population! Let's see if we can get that to 5% within a few months.
So here are some more _exclusive_ _photos_ from my pal Joe Simon, professional photographer. Check out the great images he got us!
_* For a few of the best, you 'll have to wait for the paid newsletter on Wednesday_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/54cb9fd9-d662-477c-a5ed-2e4e5b0ad126?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_A HUGE march, great work everyone!_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/17235442-d0dd-4a2c-a340-994b40eba0f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Outside City Hall, with the American flag flown upside down, the universal sign of distress, as well as some great signs!_
* | [](https://substack.com/redirect/bb5f2ff5-f404-450f-9cab-8326cc3bee86?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_I love this --**WE** represent American values, while fascist-MAGA Republicans try to erase our nearly 240-yr old republic. **THEY** Are Anti-American_
_More great pics to come in Wednesday 's paid letter!!_
_**Blue Amp 's reader supported. It's simple: **_**We Need You** _**. If you want indie media to keep fighting fascism,**_**Please be a Paid Subscriber** _**so we can continue this work.**_

---|---|---

* **Below: Our content schedule which will evolve** based on opportunities & your preferences:
* **Monday:** Blue Letter **(Free)**
* T**uesday:** Guest column by a name you know **(** TBD; **Paid; Free 72 hrs later)**
* **Wednesday:** David Shuster Video of the Week; Cliff Humor Column; NYT Pitchbot; Funny Trumper responses; **More Being Developed** **(Paid)**
* **Thursday -** **My Substack Show "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter"** kicks off this week! First guest: Former GOP Rep/presidential candidate, turned scold of Trump/MAGA, Joe Walsh! Adding 2nd surprise guest (**Free live; Paid later)**
* **Friday:** Blue Letter **(Free)**
* **Saturday:** Guest Column by a name you know (TBD; **Paid, Free 72 hrs later).**
* **Sunday:** Video Letter: Videos we created that week **(Free);** Special video just for our newsletter--a surprise + a contest w/ a big winner **(Paid/after Paywall)**
* **MONDAY MAGIC: An incredible aerial view of the truly breathtaking number of people at the Boston Hands Off protest.**_All they needed was some tea!_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b025d54b-dde3-4d34-b28a-b79bc4ad3729?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**First,** Donald Trump declared his plan to privatize the Postal Service!

**Next,** he proposed moving the USPS under the control of the Commerce Department!

**Privatizing the USPS would drastically limit access to vital services,** particularly for those in rural areas. _This could mean that Americans lose access to essential deliveries like medications or Social Security checks!_

name: Save Social Security via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Save Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis — Donald
Trump & Elon Musk’s full-blown attack on Social Security will start to
take effect in days.

For the first time in history, as of April 14, seniors will no longer be
able to call the Social Security Administration toll-free number and
complete an application for retirement benefits. It comes on the heels of
Trump also planning to shut down 47 Social Security field offices and lay
off up to half the agency’s staff.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23194?source=email-20250407&t=1011&akid=8127%2E5885482%2EO064Gs ]Bernie Tweet about social security cuts

This is targeted sabotage that will impact the lives of millions of people
who depend on Social Security, and lawmakers in Congress need to act
immediately to use their power to stop this outrageous cruelty.

Bernie Sanders is leading the charge to stop Musk & Trump’s assault on
Social Security. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23194?source=email-20250407&t=1012&akid=8127%2E5885482%2EO064Gs ]Will you sign the petition now to stand with Bernie
and save Social Security?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23194?source=email-20250407&t=1013&akid=8127%2E5885482%2EO064Gs ]ADD YOUR NAME

Musk tweeted last month that “Social Security is an obvious scam” — and
you can bet he and his billionaire buddies would love nothing more than to
replace it with private investment accounts and profit off our retirement.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23194?source=email-20250407&t=1014&akid=8127%2E5885482%2EO064Gs ]Bernie Tweet about Musk's Ponzi Scheme Comment

That’s the plan: Defund the agency. Create chaos. Then say government
doesn’t work — and sell it off.

Our Revolution is organizing a grassroots campaign to stop Musk and
Trump’s cuts, protect Social Security, and defend the right of every
American to access the benefits they’ve earned.

As the cuts to Social Security access begin, we need to mobilize an
overwhelming public outcry to convince just a few swing Republicans or a
filibuster-ready group of Democrats to block Musk’s devastating plans for
Social Security.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23194?source=email-20250407&t=1015&akid=8127%2E5885482%2EO064Gs ]Will you stand with Bernie and Our Revolution to DEMAND that Congress
stop Musk’s attacks on Social Security?

When we organize, we win.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Disastrous compromise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
The Electoral College was a compromise that tired delegates made without truly understanding the future implications. Now we can see the whole system is a disastrous mistake that could lead to the end of true democracy in this country.
There is stopping anti-democratic forces from using the Electoral College to silence our votes and protect their power. RUSH $25 or more right now and help us erase this badly designed compromise once and for all >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&contactdata=CYJ7JtLAdvD9CGf26TqtDCtsr0XtcJzZ313xIdfbgF8UG2gtKLsr9auk5a6mgs+CXSh9e36+j0X2GErpSNip3q8t942YzQDG/0bCb5Q99aM=]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=CYJ7JtLAdvD9CGf26TqtDCtsr0XtcJzZ313xIdfbgF8UG2gtKLsr9auk5a6mgs+CXSh9e36+j0X2GErpSNip3q8t942YzQDG/0bCb5Q99aM=]
There are times this fight for a popular vote system feels impossible. But friend, we can assure you it's not.
There are a number of ways it can be done. A constitutional amendment, the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact (NPVIC), and more.
What we really need is the will to do it -- and that will is growing nationwide. 17 states plus Washington, DC have joined the NPVIC. Those states would likely also pass the amendment to the Constitution.
Momentum is growing as more and more Americans see the need for a popular vote to elect the president. 63% of Americans think the way we elect a president needs to be changed -- a number that's grown over the last decade and is likely higher now than when polled last summer.
Please, help advance the mission to end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today! >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&contactdata=CYJ7JtLAdvD9CGf26TqtDCtsr0XtcJzZ313xIdfbgF8UG2gtKLsr9auk5a6mgs+CXSh9e36+j0X2GErpSNip3q8t942YzQDG/0bCb5Q99aM=]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:

GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=100.00&tknfa=2DjYsylpBpNOzTlAQuH7BQaKmLUmXJXYjeESkIWSGzM=&contactdata=CYJ7JtLAdvD9CGf26TqtDCtsr0XtcJzZ313xIdfbgF8UG2gtKLsr9auk5a6mgs+CXSh9e36+j0X2GErpSNip3q8t942YzQDG/0bCb5Q99aM=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=250.00&tknfa=2DjYsylpBpNOzTlAQuH7BQaKmLUmXJXYjeESkIWSGzM=&contactdata=CYJ7JtLAdvD9CGf26TqtDCtsr0XtcJzZ313xIdfbgF8UG2gtKLsr9auk5a6mgs+CXSh9e36+j0X2GErpSNip3q8t942YzQDG/0bCb5Q99aM=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&contactdata=CYJ7JtLAdvD9CGf26TqtDCtsr0XtcJzZ313xIdfbgF8UG2gtKLsr9auk5a6mgs+CXSh9e36+j0X2GErpSNip3q8t942YzQDG/0bCb5Q99aM=]
Defenders of voting rights like Cory Booker, AOC, Robert Reich, and Stacey Abrams recognize that the Electoral College is harming our democracy and needs to go.
It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to take away this dangerous mechanism that enabled the January 6th insurrection before it happens again.
Vote suppressors have proven there’s no length they won’t go to in order to win, including gaming this antiquated system. RUSH $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&contactdata=CYJ7JtLAdvD9CGf26TqtDCtsr0XtcJzZ313xIdfbgF8UG2gtKLsr9auk5a6mgs+CXSh9e36+j0X2GErpSNip3q8t942YzQDG/0bCb5Q99aM=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=CYJ7JtLAdvD9CGf26TqtDCtsr0XtcJzZ313xIdfbgF8UG2gtKLsr9auk5a6mgs+CXSh9e36+j0X2GErpSNip3q8t942YzQDG/0bCb5Q99aM=]

| | | Mark Levin drops a TRUTH BOMB about the disgraceful attacks against Elon Musk:
_**"No business should have to put up with this concerted effort by members of government. Members of Congress. Billionaires. Activists. Intimidating customers, intimidating Tesla owners. Intimidating dealerships. Besmirching and smearing him. And his product."**_
Mark is exactly right.

Just turn on your TV - every day, there's a new story about the Liberal Mob firebombing Cybertrucks, screaming at car owners, protesting dealerships, and vandalizing and ramming Teslas.

Meanwhile, Congressional Democrats and their allies in the Fake News Media are fueling outrage in order to sabotage DOGE, Elon Musk, and President Trump.

It's a disgrace.

These attacks are getting more violent and the protests are widespread. DOGE is our best chance to FINALLY root out the rampant corruption in our own government. clean_body: My Swiper team caught NIH genetic counselor James Welch on hidden camera, coaching researchers to dodge DOGE oversight by changing "race" to "ancestry" in trials. | Dear Patriot, I'm James O'Keefe, founder of O'Keefe Media Group (OMG), and we 're in the fight of our lives against the Deep State. Two weeks ago, I reached out with an urgent mission: raise $42,000 in ten days to train three new American Swipers--each at $14,000 for cameras, travel, and legal support--to expose the career bureaucrats sabotaging Trump and Musk's DOGE agenda. Patriots like you stepped up, and we're halfway there, with $21,000 raised. But we didn 't hit our goal by the original deadline. The Deep State isn't slowing down, and neither can we. We can't let these unelected hacks outlast us. Why the urgency? Just last week, my Swiper team caught NIH genetic counselor James Welch on hidden camera, coaching researchers to dodge DOGE oversight by changing "race" to "ancestry" in trials. He even joked about shooting people at NIH! This is the swamp Trump and Musk are draining --and we're their eyes and ears. The Deep State 's panicking. Career bureaucrats are scrambling, hiding emails, shredding files, because American Swiper's exposing their rot--IRS overreach, election fraud, corporate cronies funding illegal immigration. For the Truth, James O'Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group P.S. Seven days left--$21,000 to go. We extended the deadline because the stakes are too high to stop now. Pop Acta Media | Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Tina Kotek
subject: I hope to see your name on this, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Will you join this fight with me? |
#
---
Peter, No matter how many bizarre headlines or hurtful policies the Trump Administration produces, I’m committed to defending our shared values. As Governor, I’m standing firm against every attack on Oregonians — our LGBTQ+ communities, our seniors on Social Security, our veterans, our students, our climate, and more. Our most vulnerable communities are facing unrelenting attacks from Republicans in D.C. As long as I’m leading our great state, _these attacks will not go unanswered. _ **Through it all, I want you by my side as we defend our shared values and way of life. ** **[So I’m asking you: Please add your name to stand with me against these attacks and work towards a brighter future for every Oregonian.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105379601/538149288/675180918?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250407_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDYxYWNiZC1kZDEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ej1QcPsxispxCjuSpeeVshdXtQPqmfG2XVQPLz3C1E=&emci=ee61acbd-dd13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f061acbd-dd13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729)** | [JOIN THE FIGHT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105379602/538149289/675180918?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250407_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDYxYWNiZC1kZDEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ej1QcPsxispxCjuSpeeVshdXtQPqmfG2XVQPLz3C1E=&emci=ee61acbd-dd13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f061acbd-dd13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729)

He’s trying to bully hard-working educators from teaching our kids about inclusion, and he’s harming all students in the process – it’s unacceptable. Thankfully, Congressional Democrats are taking Trump head-on and trying to block him and his MAGA allies from destroying our education system. They’re working hard to keep the Department of Education, prevent funding cuts that would destroy public schools, and stop Trump from banning DEI topics from schools. But Democrats have a tough fight ahead if we’re going to keep education a national priority, Peter. [Will you chip in $5 or any amount you can spare today to invest directly in Democrats who are taking on Trump? | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. ---
**WTHR **
**Marina Silva**
**April 2, 2025 **[](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/Ud16iQIobFQlKBRefSkPiRr0viFTx96-crybJJ4qSJRxmOGG29grZaUmxkQKcahYXsJJbwlYYnVU_Zbn5ssBHPHyjMq0JknDNoVAxWzSzifTWc07_UkPrNXn1g-Vocd6k65WyELyx6crIpoPiwBYzvMgbICkKKGUaJWT3GWeLOTLfUKtS1nhPZMrWMrK1i6lIuwwgqqLxCzzZJwnvluBkQig2Omad_jBQ38PV7cvDeBZUS0UDC3Peuuh4_cf8LkHPOFBjHQcNlJTEAfBp-0u7S7KA1yswsoxvBPRziAtyEmMHBWkaO_bbJngHNsURJBnl4wEppTHxJde2UYgj33pl_Mu3fbhurHaWMvZYGZ7VjMLOkuvjJWjxtLoYPZBfJe1KigUEIi6d72bl2Y3uLUx9A/mTmp53BhptySgQ2qa9xvV6LsQLUqeyEr/7) [https://www.wthr.com/article/news/politics/indiana-governor-mike-braun-signs-new-high-school-diploma-requirements-into-law/531-1a6ae89f-4383-4cf1-9460-902418de93d2](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/o-LFfreX9UA5lHnc1g6APxpAxfKWWYHEEz3xqxkGPWDn1LwkQNuPlRFvOzWw_8HFeMd_r4W8dFRS3DVC4OxlSL-1DknafYIK4_FgBSIQEy-pVZEISuF9dsWUzXTSbfZsAAgXtjibCRP-UZnEaEkZTXKLgUgbd3U4P8TOebGIaike3BntE2uZluXJ6WxZ45yToh1_x93d0bzxPiHfRDaLeSUkZgZQCVMLIwhClyAcOOAMH7iVsCQyJS_hrhwTWyk5VoEQD1eqD5upppfASeyHAatDpJO_2rpW_xAkyeVVqaoMICtfzPke3NKNPdt6NXszfAFSCGpuU4j47DE2s1YETZFCFJqFm8QF8LC9h8IsUBIN_OBOXkVu30BYg51THcjlALZdFc9w1MK8LC1MVjdaqJK2-IzF5x7UzLEaz_q_fWiNofejHawEoEmCvT_3mQ/IVlB64q8aqz9NI-Nq-SjbDPz2hd-RUHb/7) INDIANAPOLIS — Big changes are coming for Hoosier families across Indiana. Governor Mike Braun officially signed new high school diploma requirements into law on Wednesday. He says these new requirements give students a more entrepreneurial approach to their education. **"Quality education is key to a prosperous economic future for Indiana,”** said Gov. Braun. **“Today, by working with our partners, including many in the private sector, we have an opportunity to not only improve outcomes for students statewide, but also strengthen our state economy for years to come.”** The new requirements have minimum requirements, but also have an extra "Honors Plus Seal" students can work toward. **For students earning the Enrollment Honors Plus Seal** All seven of our state’s public colleges and universities and an increasing number of private institutions are guaranteeing automatic acceptance into their school for any student who applies and has successfully earned the enrollment plus seal. This includes:

* Purdue University
* Indiana University
* Ivy Tech Community College
* Ball State University
* Indiana State University
* University of Southern Indiana
* Vincennes University

Additional colleges and universities will continue to be added. **For students earning the Employment Honors Plus Seal** Through the help of Ascend Indiana, students who earn the employment honors plus seal can receive dedicated career support. This includes helping students get connected through interviews with some of our state’s top employers. Students who interview and have completed an employment seal will also be eligible for direct entry into the Central Midwest Carpenters Union apprenticeship. State leaders are also actively working with Operating Engineers Local 150 to offer similar benefits in connection with their apprenticeship. The Indiana Chamber of Commerce is actively recruiting businesses across the state to invite and encourage them to be part of this as well. **For students earning the Enlistment Honors Plus Seal** Any student who completes the Enlistment and Service Honors Plus Seal will be uniquely qualified to join the Indiana National Guard and other military branches. Once accepted to the National Guard, students can:
* Earn college credits for completing training and reduce the time and cost required to complete a degree.
* Gain direct access to veteran mentors, military career counselors, and college ROTC liaisons, who can provide college and career guidance
* Access priority job placement programs designed for military professionals, offering job interviews for federal employment and private-sector roles where military experience is highly valued.

**“Indiana is leading the way when it comes to redesigning the high school experience to ensure these four years are as valuable as possible for students, and I could not be more excited about the opportunity ahead to continue to grow our partnerships in this work,”** said Dr. Jenner. **“In many ways, the adoption of the final diploma rule was only the beginning of our journey, and today’s announcement is the logical next step as many of the same partners who helped us to develop the readiness seals are now solidifying their value for students. I want to thank Governor Braun for his leadership and also our partners for their unwavering commitment to Hoosier students. As we continue implementation of the new diploma, I look forward to growing our list of partners who want to ensure Hoosier students have a more seamless path to their future.”** This will start during the 2028-2029 school year, with schools having the option to opt in this fall.

clean_body: | | | IN CASE YOU MISSED IT Indiana Gov. Mike Braun signs new high school diploma requirements into law | | WTHR Marina Silva April 2, 2025 INDIANAPOLIS — Big changes are coming for Hoosier families across Indiana. Governor Mike Braun officially signed new high school diploma requirements into law on Wednesday. He says these new requirements give students a more entrepreneurial approach to their education. "Quality education is key to a prosperous economic future for Indiana,” said Gov. Braun. “Today, by working with our partners, including many in the private sector, we have an opportunity to not only improve outcomes for students statewide, but also strengthen our state economy for years to come.” The new requirements have minimum requirements, but also have an extra "Honors Plus Seal" students can work toward. For students earning the Enrollment Honors Plus Seal All seven of our state’s public colleges and universities and an increasing number of private institutions are guaranteeing automatic acceptance into their school for any student who applies and has successfully earned the enrollment plus seal. This includes: Purdue University Indiana University Ivy Tech Community College Ball State University Indiana State University University of Southern Indiana Vincennes University Additional colleges and universities will continue to be added. For students earning the Employment Honors Plus Seal Through the help of Ascend Indiana, students who earn the employment honors plus seal can receive dedicated career support. This includes helping students get connected through interviews with some of our state’s top employers. Students who interview and have completed an employment seal will also be eligible for direct entry into the Central Midwest Carpenters Union apprenticeship. State leaders are also actively working with Operating Engineers Local 150 to offer similar benefits in connection with their apprenticeship. The Indiana Chamber of Commerce is actively recruiting businesses across the state to invite and encourage them to be part of this as well. For students earning the Enlistment Honors Plus Seal Any student who completes the Enlistment and Service Honors Plus Seal will be uniquely qualified to join the Indiana National Guard and other military branches. Once accepted to the National Guard, students can: Earn college credits for completing training and reduce the time and cost required to complete a degree. Gain direct access to veteran mentors, military career counselors, and college ROTC liaisons, who can provide college and career guidance Access priority job placement programs designed for military professionals, offering job interviews for federal employment and private-sector roles where military experience is highly valued. “Indiana is leading the way when it comes to redesigning the high school experience to ensure these four years are as valuable as possible for students, and I could not be more excited about the opportunity ahead to continue to grow our partnerships in this work,” said Dr. Jenner. “In many ways, the adoption of the final diploma rule was only the beginning of our journey, and today’s announcement is the logical next step as many of the same partners who helped us to develop the readiness seals are now solidifying their value for students. I want to thank Governor Braun for his leadership and also our partners for their unwavering commitment to Hoosier students. As we continue implementation of the new diploma, I look forward to growing our list of partners who want to ensure Hoosier students have a more seamless path to their future.” This will start during the 2028-2029 school year, with schools having the option to opt in this fall. | | | | | | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. | | NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
