subject: Tariffs on penguins and seals
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105380200/538151319/-1812448514?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTdkMDg5Mi1kZjEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=72JHQ833KouTXnKeCkIY4Gb1nLgEMVZ9YDUh66DRJEA=)
It’s been 100 days of... excuse me, it’s only been 70 days of this Trump administration. It sure feels more than that. He’s attacked our allies. He’s cut tens of thousands of critical, highly-specialized public service officials, leaving us extremely vulnerable to even the slightest issues. He’s put our economy into turmoil. He’s even imposed tariffs on an island that only is inhabited by penguins and seals. None of this is normal, Peter, but we already both know that. What I’m interested in is how it’s affecting you. I value the feedback of my supporters and constituents, so I wanted to ask you: As we embark on another month of this administration, what challenges we’re facing as a country do you want to see addressed in Congress? **Or to say it another way: What’s bugging you, and what can I do to help?** [**To give us your thoughts on the issues we should focus on, please take a minute to take our survey.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105380201/538151320/-1091067099?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTdkMDg5Mi1kZjEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=72JHQ833KouTXnKeCkIY4Gb1nLgEMVZ9YDUh66DRJEA=&emci=3d54c68b-df13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d17d0892-df13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=18052858) | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105380202/538151321/-1091067099?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTdkMDg5Mi1kZjEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=72JHQ833KouTXnKeCkIY4Gb1nLgEMVZ9YDUh66DRJEA=&emci=3d54c68b-df13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d17d0892-df13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=18052858)

clean_body: | = It’s been 100 days of... excuse me, it’s only been 70 days of this Trump administration. It sure feels more than that. He’s attacked our allies. He’s cut tens of thousands of critical, highly-specialized public service officials, leaving us extremely vulnerable to even the slightest issues. He’s put our economy into turmoil. He’s even imposed tariffs on an island that only is inhabited by penguins and seals. None of this is normal, Peter, but we already both know that. What I’m interested in is how it’s affecting you. I value the feedback of my supporters and constituents, so I wanted to ask you: As we embark on another month of this administration, what challenges we’re facing as a country do you want to see addressed in Congress? Or to say it another way: What’s bugging you, and what can I do to help? | Thank you, -Eric | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. name: This is Steve Scalise
subject: I'm sorry. Really, I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate.

| |
---
| | | I am genuinely sorry, Peter.

Really, I am.

I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate.

I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you.

I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating.

_It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages._

**This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. _[You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement- and we only won with your hard work and support.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/Z5mjmYX6Hc3IBXHBZtcbzDWpVidjNc8pj-u0qVxmn9PmKb3IIf7lKIWStp_QTN2565voyC1o0mwUsZYzYNdAvChLDHhu2eWh51oI6VoL_6I4iDDTge2LpjdvLENr2oMULjdcJChQb4KT8C_fRCoeCAHu6QOZO7rX4bSK8E_vqZqQP4MoiJYHyjdL6258RipYZilebYQ6j5UkU2g86OKr4oVK96CWZKOVA3INNpfSfPGu96ShIAbfEqYCqdlVEiTTshi9pknsgZBwSoH2u5zfmdMTOs7hpH6Or117mAJZee0rMLFLXIWUT1YZKGVMmzTX68K_vUZbdZvMYujKt1ROPyaQsK9p4xuH4w5aF4vw8SetjHJ9oVB_4FmXRiJVfXvFRNGMTf-5f4h-5ZO5c8J6mcmNZO21io6Z5SjpZskGl0PGr5utKCeDkRZib4vxMu5_kqfso7hvRGjoFHG95Ro89tU37liseY_5qON7XR4sX1nkN2zACGg/dI6jlwVoC4y4mjFHAdR9xnpfUeqBV4Qw/7 "You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement – and we only won with your hard work and support.")_ **

Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power.

Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible.

They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court.

_**[In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/RQBFAXZPUMP_Rt5FFeEzvhkv8IswCUthlO4Kt8lhsaMOP34Cr4fykF40Dv5ClOOiRTz2KglerRKrJQ8F1cHH4f4cNOsKbXxjVXE71DIIZBv9G3czQZfltGYArONmqukxeMGXE2CEPlryvPvPqq9TB2dPX52q9yBB6POS_i7oht3WnaW4V8uiDcAs3sno2H9gGLNQWCqxS3tcCOlYFeAAAYjGI-v2dsNBRiYTYRcYFMUtGyLShiBFr68-Ph5ddnPAVN8VBbVdGa1xL247Y0WSlQsqZTwaSO9RdOzIbtRuzJ25zB9vZEqwYm-2_PjZUdWwQI2O5JuGTK-xqyipVtz4pizPSc5IU6SCcQm1nbRYUz8mR09clgPZfCjcsTp0yaboaNbhk30M1Z5Czh1eY3m87KBbuadgB5XUiZ_H8u2CwwnnHGKLb6xNnP7JnzznP572evE9nV3BppeaLHW3O-wO0ftEU2IpMsqa2kpr8D2tvL8tNLhz620/2HWpErUbFGkGLwjDC20wYBZA684DTg1M/7 "In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.")**_

_If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. _

BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now.

Our first quarterly deadline is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda.

_**[So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final March deadline?](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/TCHmqlA9a1tU6ns5Z1BEVxqL3IEJhV7r69b_7-jLDw017c4te1zbyyQoAiS0n7DrluaP4g2FKwUYFHpZQQFg9E4tY0PcMVKfnSZmMoJlWyGi8EjLt0ciSzh_FUcBdqqVr-rIPFWV4-zIwAbpTJ-Mg97aXMA98s5GLHq9o6Jhc4yKAeYYP7mkOw6uAkVDSDmNO-y4kGZLbq36_9Z2VIbhGa4ESGBm5oBS0v8ytFAaMMr9XGpRXpZz1QPDKXp3E7JQ59FoD9qmNkiUecvjWny4LXVFQs_2Gfrd4AmiPPIOepS-l7BLEGydVtiM3er1aQD4qGiuASne3oqVm4SSoN5k_FCgNMLJ3pLI8zRQnh4v6jwd45WgbiPDoNaSv36gkqch8XAMx7PWUv2Mo_q-F2ubjvm75ANfTpBwx2yIOFUVaLVgAEa4iKVuAG3HAm_LNsWR9_HgS1NlQG2LawG0UN4pxQKUsdApNCa4_kCghWFsYSHcoJ5D9kw/t3O1_nNj1xNhD4Icr7JDJu05y5fOET8D/7 "So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final February deadline?")**_

It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help.
| | [IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/qOmMPpcvjjJORvkbt23CiywtoWuN2qjPs2EhNwVo6Im107TV6wMYYdE97zvfV9sVUVh5LSutO7AeUyCadgn8Qsdoq8YXd7h1OhJBLd03XwQ6dYRNE3ln4X9s4B67eg7ZaErFm6KDzDpWd4nutTsiHPWZgbYsFqBFwgQ4wRhQcl_EqKZMfyFzaj0lZwH0SE7SP9fGmNx9L6aUvGtr5-qC1wmhKwFtquLNw2UyMenUCn_EMlL8EaLx4rX3U5icTq6uMBpgA7f_Ub-j69vhfSKZcFLNwTEO6sTNrvByYqjpk6E2H-K1MPmDEPnpiRAW_ItAXYwMZdgP091wjkvThmnqrP0qgGgYXrWxqPp5TsdvcXxKGtdz0MhGHt3t7RWw8l78fq_F5wEaAxQujtt7VUbe5v8Hxp8TtJwAdc1azS3PKDX82fKtDbtb074X5JCNandoF6_mDoy97TfhIHX6FiQqHXDB1xMQ8DBCgGNLSqZshQS-p755EUg/6TtvD3GCpC_RsCsp5E5if7uw8LB_7FuL/7 "IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE")
---

Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart.

God bless you,
_- Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

clean_body: I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate. | | | | | I am genuinely sorry, Peter. Really, I am. I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate. I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you. I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating. It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages. This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. "You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement – and we only won with your hard work and support." Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power. Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible. They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court. "In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting." If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now. Our first quarterly deadline is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda. "So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final February deadline?" It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help. | | "IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE" Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart. God bless you, - Steve STEVE SCALISE House Majority Leader | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. You can donate via mail by sending a check to: 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003 |

body:
I’ll be checking in with you periodically [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105380545/538152379/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250407_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Njk4OWJhMy1lMDEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YdJgxtOUXiwRefGmL1lanWuc_l8XVOQ39L6hsYQcA_c=&emci=2c44909d-e013-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=76989ba3-e013-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=252045)

Folks — Last month, I asked you one question: _How have Trump’s policies impacted you?_ I was overwhelmed by your responses. Hundreds wrote in about their personal experiences — veterans, teachers, and everyday people who are feeling the effects of Donald Trump’s administration. I don’t want this conversation to end, so I’ll be checking in with you periodically on emails like this one. This week, I’m especially concerned about Trump’s plan to sell off our public lands to pay for tax cuts for billionaires. Selling off public lands would mean everyday folks could no longer access the places they hike, fish, spend time with their families, or even their ancestral sacred sites. That’s why today, I want to hear your personal stories about public lands. We can’t let Trump and his allies forget that their backward policies are hurting real people across the country. **[I wish I could talk to all of you face-to-face, but this is the next best way for us to connect directly. Please, I want to know: What do public lands mean to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105380546/538152380/-1020587501?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250407_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Njk4OWJhMy1lMDEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YdJgxtOUXiwRefGmL1lanWuc_l8XVOQ39L6hsYQcA_c=&emci=2c44909d-e013-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=76989ba3-e013-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=252045)** | [TELL ME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105380547/538152381/-1020587501?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250407_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Njk4OWJhMy1lMDEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YdJgxtOUXiwRefGmL1lanWuc_l8XVOQ39L6hsYQcA_c=&emci=2c44909d-e013-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=76989ba3-e013-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=252045)

Thank you,
Martin

subject: How Democratic pro-choice women are faring in 2026 U.S. House races:
body:
These races will be decided by razor-thin margins. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105380839/538153359/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE417_20250407_RatingsRU_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055917&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODBjN2Q2MC1lMTEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SUbcqDMw44_azMskDIE06D8LNrBFZ51PPVFaRGwW8E4=) Peter,

_The Cook Political Report_ just released its FIRST House ratings summary for 2026, and I wanted to make sure you know how our endorsed women are faring so far this cycle.

[**The data is clear, Peter, and it shows that we have to defend our pro-choice incumbents AND support women running to flip Republican-held seats. Can you chip in today to help elect our 2026 U.S. House candidates?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105380840/538153360/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE417_20250407_RatingsRU_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055917&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODBjN2Q2MC1lMTEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SUbcqDMw44_azMskDIE06D8LNrBFZ51PPVFaRGwW8E4=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105380841/538153362/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE417_20250407_RatingsRU_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055917&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODBjN2Q2MC1lMTEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SUbcqDMw44_azMskDIE06D8LNrBFZ51PPVFaRGwW8E4=)
---
So here's the deal: Democratic pro-choice women are running to defend their seats in key races rated TOSS-UP by _Cook_ , including:
* Laura Gillen (NY-04)
* Emilia Sykes (OH-13)
* Marie Gluesenkamp Perez (WA-03)

These pro-choice champions are fighting to protect their seats from MAGA Republicans and billionaire-funded attacks. We know that the GOP sees these races as a key part of their strategy to grow their _extremely_ slim U.S. House majority.

But we also have an opportunity to FLIP seats and take back that majority. So far, EIGHT Republican-held seats are rated as toss-ups, including:
* David Schweikert (AZ-01)
* Juan Ciscomani (AZ-06)
* Gabe Evans (CO-08)
* Mariannette Miller-Meeks (IA-01)
* Tom Barrett (MI-07)
* Don Bacon (NE-02)
* Ryan Mackenzie (PA-07)
* Scott Perry (PA-10)

The Republicans who currently hold each one of these seats are ALL on our official 2026 "On Notice" List, which means we’re taking action to beat them — by recruiting candidates, conducting messaging research, and beginning to organize voters and volunteers for these races.

[**Join the movement, and let's show Republicans that we're ready to FIGHT. Donate today to help Democratic pro-choice flip the House in 2026:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105380842/538153364/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE417_20250407_RatingsRU_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055917&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODBjN2Q2MC1lMTEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SUbcqDMw44_azMskDIE06D8LNrBFZ51PPVFaRGwW8E4=)

clean_body: These races will be decided by razor-thin margins. | = Peter, The Cook Political Report just released its FIRST House ratings summary for 2026, and I wanted to make sure you know how our endorsed women are faring so far this cycle. = | = So here's the deal: Democratic pro-choice women are running to defend their seats in key races rated TOSS-UP by Cook , including: Laura Gillen (NY-04) Emilia Sykes (OH-13) Marie Gluesenkamp Perez (WA-03) These pro-choice champions are fighting to protect their seats from MAGA Republicans and billionaire-funded attacks. We know that the GOP sees these races as a key part of their strategy to grow their extremely slim U.S. House majority. But we also have an opportunity to FLIP seats and take back that majority. So far, EIGHT Republican-held seats are rated as toss-ups, including: David Schweikert (AZ-01) Juan Ciscomani (AZ-06) Gabe Evans (CO-08) Mariannette Miller-Meeks (IA-01) Tom Barrett (MI-07) Don Bacon (NE-02) Ryan Mackenzie (PA-07) * Scott Perry (PA-10) The Republicans who currently hold each one of these seats are ALL on our official 2026 "On Notice" List, which means we’re taking action to beat them — by recruiting candidates, conducting messaging research, and beginning to organize voters and volunteers for these races. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Interim Vice President of Federal and Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Markets Tank, Oil Falls, and the White House Ducks the Press
body:
Trump's tariffs are backfiring, and he is too busy playing golf to address the nation. This is MAGA at its worst.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x1lu7-w56lyb-kyd76rh7/)
---
# **Markets Tank, Oil Falls, and the White House Ducks the Press**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x1lu7-w56lyc-kyd76rh8/)
---
| | | | Dear friend, Today’s news could easily make you think Trump is sabotaging our economy on purpose. Global markets plunged, oil prices collapsed, and the White House scrambled to cancel a major press conference with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. At the centre of it all? President Trump’s reckless tariff policy. Let’s talk numbers. The Dow dropped nearly 350 points. The S&P 500 teetered into bear market territory, and while the Nasdaq eked out a minor gain, overall investor confidence evaporated. Overseas, the picture was just as grim: the Hang Seng fell 13.2%, while Germany’s DAX, France’s CAC, and the FTSE 100 each lost more than 4%. This global spiral is being driven by Trump’s sweeping tariffs — an economic grenade disguised as protectionism. The administration has levied blanket import taxes, sparking fears of inflation, supply chain disruption, and, increasingly, recession. Wall Street isn’t buying the “America First” spin anymore. Goldman Sachs raised the odds of a U.S. recession to 45%. Many believe we’re already in one. The oil market is flashing red, too. West Texas Intermediate dropped below $60 a barrel, marking a four-year low. Trump is doing his best to pass this off as a win (cheap gas) but anyone with half a brain realises this is a recession indicator. And while markets were melting down, the White House added to the confusion by canceling a high-profile press conference with Netanyahu, likely due to frictions over the announced 17% tariff on Israeli goods. This could be a sign of change in the U.S.-Israeli relationship, or merely a side effect of today’s chaos. This isn’t just bad policy. It’s a snapshot of an administration flying blind in a storm it created. The markets are watching. So are U.S. allies. And neither seems reassured by what they’re seeing. [**_If we want to stop this economic freefall and build a future that works for working people—not just the wealthy few—we have to be the voices calling it out. Trump’s MAGA agenda has failed the test of economic leadership time and time again, leaving families to deal with the consequences. But if we organize, speak up, and keep telling the truth, we can turn this chaos into momentum. Join us today._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x1lu7-w56lyd-kyd76rh9/) More soon, The No Dem Left Behind Team
---

---

body:
| | | Friends, I have heard from many about just how devastating Trump’s tariffs will be – from squeezing families’ budgets to forcing small businesses to close. Hardworking families are already struggling to get by. Trump’s reckless tariffs are effectively a national sales tax on the middle class that will spike costs even higher for groceries, housing, clothes, electronics and more. On top of that, the Republican budget proposal will force devastating cuts to Medicaid and other critical programs to fund more tax cuts for billionaires. If they succeed, it’s only going to make matters worse for regular, hardworking Americans. I am fighting back in the Senate. That’s why I need you with me. It is going to take all of us coming together to take action to stop Trump and MAGA Republicans. **[_Please, friend, join me in rising to this moment. Pitch in any amount to power the Nevada State Democratic Party’s grassroots operation. We need to have the resources to hold the GOP accountable._](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTT6P51EZsB7qeHgHYlwZE4YUrcMWNN3ZVpJHiAC5sY89wcxhxg9DDAPfFoNw6-zyA_VRCxbdCAQB2G7AV9dWUDfuNix_UUnxDLAzweRfebE2FoFAdbM3f7X1IISa89TAO2Kf2mmb9u28YiAze4tb-yXNAiu-CiO6k4LMsz66cByRK9juBSO1IPNESVbFLtrDC8nu0ErRFG9MaNz7csziQNtXL5c2Grj6pgvhv3GPsr2q3C1wu5H-mpNqHMaeJyA3rGcEtuiI1XH_JYZCaXhi4h23uNXW2FoAc0r5mXzBMLQBiybiHCU8QtBSxD2CBWyyB/4fg/6uKMSGFOTdC4EA0iP7QQdQ/h0/h001.QuMAB-8ZIkn4pf_bxO7H9pOcggOMk-Gjmn5EsQnBebc)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | | | Friends, I have heard from many about just how devastating Trump’s tariffs will be – from squeezing families’ budgets to forcing small businesses to close. Hardworking families are already struggling to get by. Trump’s reckless tariffs are effectively a national sales tax on the middle class that will spike costs even higher for groceries, housing, clothes, electronics and more. On top of that, the Republican budget proposal will force devastating cuts to Medicaid and other critical programs to fund more tax cuts for billionaires. If they succeed, it’s only going to make matters worse for regular, hardworking Americans. I am fighting back in the Senate. That’s why I need you with me. It is going to take all of us coming together to take action to stop Trump and MAGA Republicans. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ---|---|--- | | – Jacky The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Eric Gastfriend
subject: AI Policy in Full Bloom on Capitol Hill
body:
This is American’s for Responsible Innovation’s (ARI) biweekly newsletter, where we give a run down of the current news in the AI policy space

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a231db7777d0/ai-policy-in-full-bloom-on-capitol-hill?e=a07d75591f)
---
| | | | [](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=e1307ea446&e=a07d75591f)
---
| Dear ,

It’s spring in D.C., cherry blossoms are in the wind, and Capitol Hill is a hive of activity. Just months into the new Congress and administration, and key committees are already sending AI bills to markup, the White House is collecting comments on AI policy, and lawmakers are assessing how AI fits into a range of immediate policy priorities - from taxes to tariffs.
This is Americans for Responsible Innovation’s ([ARI](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=772c3a62ea&e=a07d75591f)) biweekly newsletter, where we give a run down of the current news and movement in the AI policy space and how it impacts Washington, the country, and the innovation community. Let’s dive in ⬇️

### White House Seeks AI Recs
What should the Trump Administration’s AI policy look like? It’s a question that stakeholders in the AI policy space have been wrestling with - and April 15 marked the deadline for sharing recommendations with the White House.
We used this opportunity to lay a [public stake](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=300eb06bbd&e=a07d75591f) in the ground on our policy positions for the year. It can feel like these comments are going out into the void, but our submission drew attention alongside comments from leading AI labs ([Politico](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=cf35a99556&e=a07d75591f), [Inside AI Policy](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=61688421fd&e=a07d75591f), [Transformer](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=6e036f447e&e=a07d75591f)).
In total, over 8,500 comments were submitted, including a comment from ARI offering insight into how the AI policy can be used to achieve the President’s goals of strengthening national security, fueling innovation, and supporting human flourishing. Among our recommendations, ARI called for:
* **Strengthening export controls**. ARI’s comment calls for the administration to refine and enforce the AI Diffusion Framework and close loopholes in the law. ARI highlights the need to expand export controls to protect American cloud assets.
* **Hardening frontier lab security.** ARI proposes the Intelligence Community partner closely with frontier labs to secure AI to prevent the theft of model weights and tech with military, cyber, or intelligence applications.
* **Advancing science**. To support human flourishing, ARI urges the Administration to work towards accelerating medical breakthroughs and U.S. materials science discoveries.
* **Reliable AI for nationwide adoption**. Trustworthy and transparent AI will accelerate adoption and fuel innovation. ARI calls for strengthening the US AI Safety Institute, establishing a system for voluntary AI incident reporting, and protecting whistleblowers.

### Keeping an Eye on Tariff's Impact on AI
Last week marked the Trump Administration’s “Liberation Day,” and tariffs are the topic du jour in D.C. But the conversation on tariffs isn’t limited to grocery prices and car sales - ARI President Brad Carson joined Bloomberg Radio to discuss the tariffs potential impact on American AI leadership.
[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=b80cd2eaea&e=a07d75591f)AI’s explosive growth is driving a massive infrastructure build-out of both data centers and the energy facilities needed to power them - but tariffs may create an additional hurdle as the AI sector works to build capacity. For 2025, the tech sector is projected to finish construction on data centers with 6.5 additional GW of power capacity, but analysts suggest that tariffs may boost commercial construction costs by up to 5 percent. [Watch the full interview on Bloomberg Radio](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=f688c61f12&e=a07d75591f).
ARI Senior Advisor Satya Thallam also chimed in with [Politico](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=5df095730b&e=a07d75591f) to share his thoughts on the impact of tariffs on the AI sector, noting that, “If we take this in concert with the administration’s stated goal on AI, which is to lead the world and maintain American leadership [on AI], then something’s got to give.”

### Marking up TAKE IT DOWN
This past month, the House Energy & Commerce committee held its hearing on the TAKE IT DOWN Act, a key bill introduced by Sen. Ted Cruz aimed at combating non-consensual deepfake content. In advance of the hearing, ARI [helped to lead a coalition letter](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=4930ec2b38&e=a07d75591f) with a dozen grassroots advocacy organizations urging committee leaders to move the bill forward.
The TAKE IT DOWN Act also made news when First Lady Melania Trump publicly [endorsed the bill](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=f3170b4f8b&e=a07d75591f). With the Committee hearing completed, the TAKE IT DOWN Act is now **headed for a markup this week** , after which the path will be clear for a House vote.
[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=ee9f4a2379&e=a07d75591f)

### Economists Are Underestimating AI’s Workforce Impact
Today, ARI released our newest report, “[ _The Technologist-Economist Disconnect: Assessing AI Labor Disruption_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=a144e97078&e=a07d75591f).”
Policy analyst David Robusto creates a [new framework](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=32a3901361&e=a07d75591f) for assessing AI’s capability to absorb both current and future jobs, highlighting the need for feasible policy approaches to mitigate the impact of AI on the workforce and bridge the gap between AI technologists and economists.

### The Kids Aren’t Alright
Last month, ARI released two public polls assessing voter attitudes on AI policy questions. The [first poll](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=19b3e7d816&e=a07d75591f) examined AI chatbots designed to form romantic relationships as well as voter attitudes towards AI’s [integration in government](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=52a5568b72&e=a07d75591f). The poll found that three out of four voters are either very or somewhat concerned about the impact AI will have on younger generations.
The [second poll](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=36ab8cebb1&e=a07d75591f) released by ARI looked specifically at AI policy and national security. The polling, which asked voters which issues they would like to see the Trump Administration address regarding AI, found that national security concerns top the list of voter priorities. Over three quarters of all voters believe it is either very or somewhat likely that foreign actors will use AI to harm the U.S.
[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=6fdb0d9e96&e=a07d75591f)

### Coming Soon
In the coming month, ARI has some exciting work we’re publishing. Keep an eye out for a legal memo backing up the constitutionality of the TAKE IT DOWN Act in advance of a House vote, and new comments for California on the state’s approach to AI policy.
For regular updates, be sure to [follow us on X](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=c8417e67ab&e=a07d75591f) and on [LinkedIn](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=0aac9fa601&e=a07d75591f), as well as subscribing to our Substack newsletter, [The Output](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=d04f385090&e=a07d75591f).
And don’t forget to check out the cherry blossoms!

Sincerely,
**Eric Gastfriend** _Co-Founder & Executive Director_**Americans for Responsible Innovation****T** 617.794.4511
**E**[ eric@ari.us](mailto:eric@ari.us?subject=null&body=null)
---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=3141261bba&e=a07d75591f)
---
[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=41351cb7ea&e=a07d75591f)
---

Our mailing address is:
American for Responsible Innovations 712 H St NE # 2486 Washington, DC 20002-3627 USA

Want to change how you receive these emails?You can [update your preferences](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=78defcc9fe&e=a07d75591f&c=96c720d718) or [unsubscribe](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=78defcc9fe&t=b&e=a07d75591f&c=96c720d718)

name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: We just went toe-to-toe with Mike Johnson. And we won.
body:
Nine Republicans joined every Democrat in Congress to send a clear message to Mike Johnson and House GOP leadership

| |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105382172/538158069/-479924438?amp;refcode=250407_bp_split_img&ms=250407_bp_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTc2ZjliZGMtZTQxMy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fRLF5ZhnoPDtCe7EreSzb76Qs24hFyFfzlUZOtO8Hjc=) Hey friend, Nellie Pou said I could reach out with some news: Last week, Speaker Mike Johnson held a vote on the House floor to kill my resolution to allow new parents in Congress to vote remotely while raising a newborn child. But it failed. Mike Johnson lost, and common sense won. Nine Republicans joined every Democrat in Congress to send a clear message to Mike Johnson and House GOP leadership: The status quo is not acceptable. It’s not acceptable that people from middle-class families, and especially young women, have been deterred from running for Congress. It’s not acceptable that Congress has been dominated by the interests of older, wealthy men. And it’s not acceptable that Mike Johnson tried a desperate, last-second procedural gimmick to silence our voices. Over the last three months, I went toe-to-toe with the Speaker of the House and all the power he wields. And together, we showed Mike Johnson that nobody fights harder than a mom. But this fight isn’t done. Mike Johnson will fight until the bitter end to prevent us from modernizing Congress, so I need your support more than ever before. **[If you believe in my work to make Washington more welcoming to young people and regular families, will you pitch in a split donation between Nellie and me? clean_body: Nine Republicans joined every Democrat in Congress to send a clear message to Mike Johnson and House GOP leadership | | = Hey friend, Nellie Pou said I could reach out with some news: Last week, Speaker Mike Johnson held a vote on the House floor to kill my resolution to allow new parents in Congress to vote remotely while raising a newborn child. But it failed. Mike Johnson lost, and common sense won. Nine Republicans joined every Democrat in Congress to send a clear message to Mike Johnson and House GOP leadership: The status quo is not acceptable. It’s not acceptable that people from middle-class families, and especially young women, have been deterred from running for Congress. It’s not acceptable that Congress has been dominated by the interests of older, wealthy men. And it’s not acceptable that Mike Johnson tried a desperate, last-second procedural gimmick to silence our voices. Over the last three months, I went toe-to-toe with the Speaker of the House and all the power he wields. And together, we showed Mike Johnson that nobody fights harder than a mom. But this fight isn’t done. Mike Johnson will fight until the bitter end to prevent us from modernizing Congress, so I need your support more than ever before. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you, Brittany Pettersen | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . There’s only one reason that measles is surging in Texas and across America: anti-vaccine conspiracies spread by people like Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. After RFK Jr persuaded thousands of American Samoans to refuse the measles vaccine through outright lies, dozens died in a 2019 epidemic. Now, America is suffering the same fate. Our new upcoming billboard in Texas blasts RFK and Texas Senator John Cornyn, who voted to confirm RFK as HHS secretary. name: Jay Jones
subject: This endorsement is special to me
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=other]

Folks,

I am proud and humbled that my campaign for Virginia Attorney General has earned the endorsement of the Collective PAC, America’s largest organization focused on supporting Black candidates, elected officials, and voters.

I’ve spent my career ensuring that every Virginian is treated equally under the law.

In the House of Delegates, I fought to expand civil rights. As an attorney, I worked with the Virginia NAACP to protect voting rights. And as the Commonwealth’s next Attorney General, I will continue to fight for justice by supporting common-sense legal reforms, advocating for voting rights, and defending our freedoms against any threats.

I am honored to have earned this endorsement, and I am hoping I’ve earned yours, too. If you’re in my corner, will you endorse my campaign for VA Attorney General today? My team and I need 350 top supporters to add their name today and show that we have the momentum we’ll need to win. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/VQlnDTm9bUaZLp5Kq5T65A2]

ADD YOUR ENDORSEMENT NOW → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/VQlnDTm9bUaZLp5Kq5T65A2]

Folks, my grandfather had to leave Virginia to go to law school because universities wouldn’t accept Black students, but he pushed through discrimination to become a pioneering civil rights lawyer.

My father faced harassment as one of the first Black children to integrate Virginia schools. Despite the difficulties he faced, he excelled in school, and has since served Virginia in all three branches of government.

I’m proud of their legacy of perseverance and public service, and I hope to continue my own as Virginia’s Attorney General. Their experiences make it all the more meaningful to me to have earned the support of an organization dedicated to electing Black candidates.

But it would be even more meaningful to have your support. That’s why I hope you’ll personally endorse my campaign for Attorney General of Virginia today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/VQlnDTm9bUaZLp5Kq5T65A2]

ADD YOUR ENDORSEMENT NOW → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/VQlnDTm9bUaZLp5Kq5T65A2]

Thank you for reading; I hope to see your endorsement come through soon!

– Jay

Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States

body:
Our best chance to stop George Soros| |
---
| | I’m writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b56aa8cb95ac4b8da391ed3e385fc892&_e=KssrKlbiX07_iaajvgXSsqWNnJ2j0I0l16yiN4tka5oJBgbX6d6IRtQdSk5KhRL1smtPr7_lzzMcATqxrZH5IWC3k1jHrt03lMCpvd-O45VjWLy7N283ARHaCm4AbMypThVSc-EvgrlCrfI-rvS3RlaLV7WHGUCD3hsSq36-WctR8bfdJlKV9fbHOVGbCTabQvW9fB6j0q6IUf11PnJB6HjijQuiPN_ayipfmwU8PACgQ4ek3eZ2WA7lesgTWR5EO-P7t52lqpc_V8ofJHMCxdv6VZdZ4gfLQTLBs5roJNuifC88izA56hhn6vPMHtkZ500o7JszxshACoSuRQT0MMiePHIHFlTwYJNvGDz-P78%3D)

| | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message – will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b56aa8cb95ac4b8da391ed3e385fc892&_e=KssrKlbiX07_iaajvgXSsqWNnJ2j0I0l16yiN4tka5oJBgbX6d6IRtQdSk5KhRL1smtPr7_lzzMcATqxrZH5IWC3k1jHrt03lMCpvd-O45VjWLy7N283ARHaCm4AbMypThVSc-EvgrlCrfI-rvS3RlaLV7WHGUCD3hsSq36-WctR8bfdJlKV9fbHOVGbCTabQvW9fB6j0q6IUf11PnJB6OjZvZ4WBw_p5g6f8ZAPes5g7A8c09ICl1pz54oO8BH2py9ce5-EWuDPoC_okZOc5aXkzOh-xkucUdfavW_XAr6IALCINepYopTO5yNQLz-ACNGhAEZ92f774CoymG29eqmdzN9YQU-ijL7MWMZGtWU%3D) ** You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b56aa8cb95ac4b8da391ed3e385fc892&_e=KssrKlbiX07_iaajvgXSsqWNnJ2j0I0l16yiN4tka5oJBgbX6d6IRtQdSk5KhRL1smtPr7_lzzMcATqxrZH5IWC3k1jHrt03lMCpvd-O45VjWLy7N283ARHaCm4AbMypThVSc-EvgrlCrfI-rvS3RlaLV7WHGUCD3hsSq36-WctR8bfdJlKV9fbHOVGbCTabQvW9fB6j0q6IUf11PnJB6DXkwvcxE24tN9FnheMBFGiSJbr33o_MPMy-FLc_tnOSX51zqGzpoKNC0pC1jccPSVij4Jn4wq5ns5GNRr_N5YaMJ8XD5Rg9ySw20V2KHkkomTkNQAJc_lYYoixn6Ftl2ZKEm1SU2_0JnSfSDqlA5SA%3D)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b56aa8cb95ac4b8da391ed3e385fc892&_e=KssrKlbiX07_iaajvgXSsqWNnJ2j0I0l16yiN4tka5oJBgbX6d6IRtQdSk5KhRL1smtPr7_lzzMcATqxrZH5IWC3k1jHrt03lMCpvd-O45VjWLy7N283ARHaCm4AbMypThVSc-EvgrlCrfI-rvS3RlaLV7WHGUCD3hsSq36-WctR8bfdJlKV9fbHOVGbCTabQvW9fB6j0q6IUf11PnJB6HXbKC5Ux_piqBV0DYyhDFmf-a17wbAhsFXZlvPNoxk9LgFjYYjVN03K6DR4yl7_OD1VCqy9NtACh3iPkpAoNfUxijlON4ZHc0vaQUi3HKuPDvbPNNNCdcxxax7iVafqVioJBqRXXP4xgZBkAd_xtOQ%3D)
---
Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b56aa8cb95ac4b8da391ed3e385fc892&_e=KssrKlbiX07_iaajvgXSsqWNnJ2j0I0l16yiN4tka5oJBgbX6d6IRtQdSk5KhRL1smtPr7_lzzMcATqxrZH5IWC3k1jHrt03lMCpvd-O45VjWLy7N283ARHaCm4AbMypThVSc-EvgrlCrfI-rvS3RlaLV7WHGUCD3hsSq36-WctR8bfdJlKV9fbHOVGbCTabQvW9fB6j0q6IUf11PnJB6PMnLNrD8ik74qg8eiF-vUedR_uKnAxsNUNCORH7BXDYbMBqPMcIBXkYVkXmU4AmNbcP-c8DQDJuOx8NBZomaBCM-rRPyMSqUG5CmHYLqrFLrMcxtJhjpNsLoVmoOTHEzDPvDwoVrHBGLwmEvzcVNDg%3D) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. subject: RSVP for our Eugene town hall on April 9th!
body:

# RSVP for our town hall in Eugene this Wednesday!
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Friends,

We are excited to host several town halls that will involve the impacts of federal cuts and firings around the state. Our first "Safeguarding Oregon: Federal Oversight Forum" is this Wednesday, April 9th in Eugene at 6:30 on the University of Oregon campus, in the Prince Lucien Campbell (PLC) building. Please [click here to RSVP](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=92d13229fb&e=1768325bd4) if you plan to attend.

We hope to see you there!

If every supporter reading this donated $7 to support state Dems today, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing extremists in state legislatures across the map. 💪

But we know not everyone can pitch in right now, so we’re relying on our most dedicated supporters to make your first donation of the year to the DLCC.

name: Mark Pukita, GFI
subject: 😠 This will make you VERY angry!
body:
Important information that demands your attention. | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=188d61b9ba&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3586644de3&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | ** **
**CALL TO ACTION!**
** **
**HEALTH FREEDOM IGNORED
WHILE BILLIONAIRES RECEIVE
A $600M PAYOFF IN PROPOSED
OHIO BUDGET!**

---
| **Are you aware Republican Ohio House Leadership rejected every health freedom amendment put forward by Ohio's health freedom activists & agreeable sponsors, yet the $600M give-away to the billionaire Haslam family, who aren't even Ohioans, was gleefully left in the current version of the 2026-2027 Ohio State Budget?**

Enough is enough. It's time we got loud about the tone deaf, dismissive, corrupt cabal controlling the Ohio House, including Speaker Matt Huffman, who took 6-figures or more in campaign donations from the Haslams, the billionaire family who own the Cleveland Browns, shortly before they asked for the $600M deal.****[**Go HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=27929632a1&e=5c740fa3e2) to see a news article explaining this corruption.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=cb41bfc072&e=5c740fa3e2)

Meanwhile, **every single proposed health freedom amendment** to the budget bill was nixed.

It's well past the time we should have become extremely vocal with OUR elected representatives. **Here's what WE ALL NEED TO DO:**

👉👉👉1) **Call, email, and text** (if possible) these people who are on the finance committee, as well as the Speaker, and **TELL THEM** you want the **HEALTH FREEDOM AMENDMENTS** **ADDED** to the budget bill and the **$600M frivolous** use of YOUR money **TAKEN OUT**. **Do not ask them ... TELL THEM ... because remember, THEY WORK FOR YOU!

Matt Huffman, District 78, Speaker**
rep78@ohiohouse.gov
(614) 466-6344

**Brian Stewart, District 12, Chairman**
rep12@ohiohouse.gov
(614) 466-1464

**Michael D. Dovilla, District 17, Vice Chairman**

rep44@ohiohouse.gov

**Bernard Willis, District 74, Member**
rep74@ohiohouse.gov
(614) 466-2038

**Tom Young, District 37, Member**
rep37@ohiohouse.gov
(614) 466-6504

👉👉👉2) **Call, email, and text** (if possible) your Ohio House Member & Ohio Senator ([if you don't know who they are you can find them **HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ca9e9f0f91&e=5c740fa3e2)) and **ask them two very direct questions** (or tell whoever answers). Tell them you want YES or NO answers to these 2 simple questions:

**a) Do you support putting the heath freedom amendments omitted from the current version of the budget bill into the final bill?**

**b) Do you support removing the $600M Haslam money from the final version of the bill?**

Demand answers, YES or NO, not explanations or refusals to answer.

**Once you have answers, please send them to Mark Pukita** at 614-499-0599 (text) or [mark@mark4ohio.com](mailto:mark@mark4ohio.com) (email). We are going to start pressuring our elected representatives, who work for us, to go **ON THE RECORD** which is the only way we will ever get what we want. **We will publish & publicize the answers we get, as well as who ignores us, so you can keep score!**

_**THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR DOING THIS!**_

**DON'T FORGET ABOUT ISSUE 2!**

WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW!
WE MUST GET THE WORD OUT!**

---
| _<**We've left prior weeks' information on Issue 2 below just in case you missed it!** >_

**This issue is beatable!**
1) Turnout for the **May 6th PRIMARY ELECTION** is expected to be around 5% of registered Ohio voters. That's about 400,000 total votes.
2) The past 2 times a similar bond issue was on the ballot, the winning margin was 19.23%, let's round that up to 20%. That means 60% YES & 40% NO. Or, 240,000 YES votes & 160,000 NO votes. A 20% difference or 80,000 vote differential.
3) **FIRST** , if we can educate 10% of the potential YES voters & turn them to NO voters, the result would be 216,000 YES votes & 184,000 NO votes, a 24,000 vote swing. Across Ohio's 88 counties we'd need to persuade 273 YES voters to vote NO, **A VERY REASONABLE** thing to do.
4) **SECOND** , if we can activate 40,000 voters who typically don't vote in primary elections **and get them to vote** , that's a turnout increase of only 0.5%, or one-half of one percent! This is also **A VERY REASONABLE** thing for us to try to get done! It's only an additional 455 votes per county.
5) **WHEN** we do this, **WE WIN!** The final vote count would be 224,000 NO and 216,000 YES = 440,000 total votes = 5.5% turnout. Again, **A****VERY REASONABLE** objective!
**WHAT EACH OF US CAN DO TO SPREAD THE WORD AND MAKE THIS HAPPEN!**
Over the next week, **PLEASE** :
* Make 10 **social media posts** on the issue
* **Send texts** about the issue to 10 people
* **Send emails** about the issue to another (different) 10 people
* **Make calls** about the issue to 10 more (different) people
* Persuade 10 more (new) people to commit to go **to vote with you**
* Persuade 10 people not previously contacted **to make absentee (mail-in) ballot requests with your help**

_****__**Try to contact 50 DIFFERENT people.**_
If each of the 11,000+ subscribers to this email did this, we would easily defeat this **stealthy, unnecessary, costly** , $2.5B bond issue!
**LET'S MAKE IT HAPPEN!**

* * *

[**NEW**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e99076e4fa&e=5c740fa3e2)[**WEBPAGE FOR YOU TO BOOKMARK WITH RESOURCES TO HELP US ALL FIGHT ISSUE 2!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ea4b5b7b33&e=5c740fa3e2)

We [**PREVIOUSLY**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=291b29ffd2&e=5c740fa3e2) made you aware there's a bond issue on the Ohio primary election ballot in May. Now we must make sure others are aware! **EARLY VOTING STARTS APRIL 8TH!**

**HERE'S WHAT YOU CAN DO TO HELP!**

1) PLEASE **forward this message** to as many people as you can, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
2) PLEASE download **[THIS GRAPHIC](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=71a5af498e&e=5c740fa3e2) (same as below)** to your phone & send it to everyone you can, again, **especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
NEW >>>> 3)****** PLEASE **refer** as many people as you can **to the new Issue 2[WEBPAGE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2745d7394a&e=5c740fa3e2)**!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=76afecb181&e=5c740fa3e2)
**(Click the image above to download!)
BACKGROUND ON THIS BOND ISSUE**
It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. Once you've watched it, please SHARE it with everyone you can!
Thank you!

**EPISODE: "Ohio's Stealthy May Bond Issue"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8c822e8c71&e=5c740fa3e2)

body:
\- Get your free copy of Right Wing Revolution and help us defeat the radical left for good. - Join the movement sweeping college campuses and get your free battle plan today. - Claim your free hardcover copy when you support Turning Point's fight for America's future. - The next generation is waking up -- see how you make it possible. - The American Comeback is Real -- Join the unstoppable movement of young patriots standing up for truth and freedom. - The Revolution is HERE [Young Patriots across America are rising up -- get your battle plan to join the movement.] - At every campus I visit, thousands of students are standing up for American values. - Your FREE Copy of Right Wing Revolution [Get your battle plan to defeat the radical Left and restore American greatness.]
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/PSIEeDJGgkLuGMsiSCYDwODzQoKDVvx0KDJOLxQeoiFjOE8J34FLfwIlnlfj1R9qtkkRbdgPVuZYHk3MGtxZEtYWdtsZBdDxafBuvP3Ij32TerLVwsXj5n6XU-MV7TJrqf4cS4M1DsevpWNXW0MfAr9Zq8rXwYx3jTytCx4JDKRYOvSW3841KNDvhlb5Fk6NuMFJyQVvm0tOr_g_wycqcwk0VqUwdOpmtu6C3QLfu_CdY4D749-jqVTA4xsuK8Etj8aEaEzgysrg4yZlrHd7sSxqRmCLJ8ksydoyuvAQ8ujpU0uBjhNW_KsAaiTGpWyO7yG21sAgaW4YuCgO9EcUOK7mIDtDvekiXPYsfFwDaO-9fKWM8AfPngCpGjFXULK87HLRxGnzAZR0q92wTW1yDDZoYJVubC0TCWTt86mGQXelA3cn6FIDRNF30XBMOuYxda5jbv1DWHGczZggijw/u15OjUbbk0z5ZAr7-z9qMib99LIdCTsr/7)
---
Peter, _You have to see it to believe it ..._ Across America, young people are **WAKING UP!** The Left has spent years poisoning students' minds -- _but it 's not working anymore._
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/EP8mctg_XXtfJS9JnFb1kUpgo5FXBd0LdrmiK-EVqhuI784T1oxWORaH9w_TioISag2FlTqAB82KhdozL8Kcz4uu4lfT3btHXF66V4cXen3RyhuEbsuXd1X8yI1lKN651_145LPw5WSLbagMmBaYpwwGHzRRhGQyfXnSJUUysG_zbKVD1DOBKEYpBZEicGd0ugOGig2h1uKSvzssp0rAMSjUI2Ap9In9iFYslPdoGCWkYEynwr19YeKfultaJuwmPqlUx8xCwhqtzXjr-lF86xiweKGjmf4UdtKsoSBIGWVBAm1ghSVtPS0w1nSjB2tTZLVjkhTUp9xMxkxIs4UN99FjlIb-G40zyEbIIOKCXiEGeJy697106ciQ2zrgMwlQS9w4Qn4gSwyNxqhLtpRA6qCJO6olJ7mklssN5yoPYZeaC9lruPJAzfgGIEF3uDAtw_mdNCsQegrukcw0ibU/VvGTO4tsJSMFOIP6OiGUzdXq4Q089l9H/7)
---
At every one of Turning Point USA's stops on college campuses, students are showing up by the thousands -- waving flags, chanting "**_USA! USA! USA! name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: The real sh*t stopping young people from running
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
What’s stopping young people from running?
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250407-1&t=1&akid=1952%2E587540%2ErV4HYw)
Peter, a couple weeks ago, we asked:
_**What’s keeping young people from running for office?**_
You didn’t hold back. Some of the biggest barriers that this team cited were:
❌ **Money:** Without the resources of incumbents and traditional politicians, young candidates struggle to gain traction when they run for office.
❌ **Credibility:** Young people aren’t taken seriously by older voters or the political establishment. Most often, young candidates are discounted and ignored.
❌ **Access/Knowledge:** New candidates lack the mentorship, information, and infrastructure they need to build effective campaigns in competitive races.
Too many young people feel like they don’t have what it takes — not because they aren’t qualified, but because the system is rigged to preserve the status quo.
These are real barriers. And they’re keeping some of the best potential leaders on the sidelines.
So here’s what Leaders We Deserve is doing to tear that sh*t down:
✅ **We invest BIG** in our candidates — sometimes we’re their top donor.
✅ **We train and support** them hands-on, every step of the way.
✅ **We build their credibility** — David literally knocks doors with them, talking to voters in their districts about why our young candidates are ready for the job.
But here’s the deal: This kind of grassroots, people-powered work takes serious resources. And we’re doing it all without a dime of corporate cash.
If you believe in young leaders, if you’re fired up to change who gets to run — and win — we need you with us. **[Peter, can you rush a $5 donation right now to power this fight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250407-1?refcode=em20250407-1952&amount=5&refcode2=1952_587540_rV4HYw&akid=1952%2E587540%2ErV4HYw)**

Let’s build a future that actually looks like us.
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250407-1&t=2&refcode2=1952_587540_rV4HYw&akid=1952%2E587540%2ErV4HYw)**

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: A Big Thank You
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
Thank you, thank you to everyone who has responded to my recent emails with contributions of all kinds.
Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts with me about what is happening in our community and country and to respond to my survey about what is on your mind.
Thank you for clicking the contribute button on the emails asking for financial support for the campaign.
Thank you for signing up to volunteer! And thank you for showing up. I’ve seen #TeamLizzie members all over town recently—at the #HandsOff! Rally and town meetings and strategy meetings and all the places we need to be right now.
And your participation gives me so much inspiration and so much optimism, even in these challenging days. Especially in these challenging days. Because the challenges we face are real—in the Congress, in the country, and in our community. The volume of things coming at us can be overwhelming. The things that are happening are overwhelming. And exhausting. And that is by design.
Which is why we have to focus on what we know to be true—that we can turn things around when we work together. This campaign is proof of it. And we have to keep focused on the things we need to do. The things we have done before, and the new things we need to do now.
I’ll keep sharing my thoughts and plans through these emails. Thanks for all you are doing to make it possible.
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

body:
Dreamers were brought to the U.S. as children, and they have lived and worked in our communities for an average of 24 years. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW-AelnAMJHd9RpTmgMR_Arl33rkBtTvbkdhqBNhloVedh9Ti_r07tFmkn3GiB3p8vnFU91FV-PEjTW0w0xBuapZ_R043-vuRy5AAHz_cjyqnaL9m_yDlLWXo-wwXar3ST6R7VOUp2qFHN0neEwcK7s6oudxxpyNHZxwa5gv2XRZ4eaMfQgb185orNZgUwRPWCYmGFnAYTbLmAUmWgWji3Lg/4fg/lxDCHRwySfuGrOlUlNO7QA/h0/h001.ibF4fDp3lv5ZIDdGhOe7u4hhG1IQEMMZNa3eH8zY1vc)
---
Friend, Last month, a court ruling defending immigrants brought here as children went into effect—affirming that all DACA recipients (also known as Dreamers) can renew their status, which protects them from deportation. The court ruling also opens up first-time applications for the program for the first time in years. However, Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) applications must be processed by the Trump administration, and they haven’t yet commented on whether they’ll follow this court ruling. With Trump’s mass deportation agenda escalating in defiance of court orders, the administration could try to end DACA at any time. So immigrant youth-led United We Dream is urging all current DACA recipients to renew their DACA status while they still can. For those who need to renew their DACA, the exorbitant $555 renewal fee remains a huge barrier for many immigrants. That’s why United We Dream has the DACA Renewal Fund, which fully covers the $555 cost for DACA recipients! [**While applications remain open for the time being, could you chip in whatever you can to the DACA Renewal Fund to lower the financial barriers for immigrant youth to renew their life-changing protections?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquWKGDGBxlkFqEx_8pz9U7p49CmS7XYKP-pnPf-3o5QEDikYyJ1_6RGXJl91hEZYmrefpoacuk1faiSFV-iMd7YO0_3QVnsBtkH2qffknyUK-nNwIuj3w1LuPvJ34SL2ibGY47cShi32DK4kahHZNGvM65KiD-n28qAuh856O1YAxrrXbtL6HOUg0HNgI0Oe1zdbYvRlG77xvSTZi2AkU5fwFhmD-Ic1zbVH-Ubc-mE5HD4MxlX5uq7ZRa2pAKDl2tciylTOPOpfZMClpcwRZIM8CffVAq3pKEkoWyTd9ywmYqR0sDhJ1nFsLO-BhVT_Rk9GHOmlubvOfsx18mEaBcn9vCiG7_njUb46fj8g8vKvC2lP9QXWf0aFHbX4ZspRxY/4fg/lxDCHRwySfuGrOlUlNO7QA/h1/h001.8tZ9vI6QYRLG9cUOxTOfiTg9biFsQ0NGZnZDcSvctBY) | [CHIP IN TO HELP DACA RECIPIENTS](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquWKGDGBxlkFqEx_8pz9U7p49CmS7XYKP-pnPf-3o5QEDikYyJ1_6RGXJl91hEZYmrbD5yzoXhvwhE1v8nB2XLy8QBRmNa6jU1oivjWZvNNdI9C65yPLm3V2xFmWyuCzTUK_SZtune3dHeGAM0_qwJkyPAYYP-PIh9lJDC0iv1TckN7GoW4Afiv5VxRv9_6Sd0vqhkjgJNFpovDBRRVeZXJfDML-RCq9cKorkipkUgrZmNnC8g4Q3yxLMmdsrMEEe6SGXsJQ8wgeOegtoxe4DwEptGhAdtHvhGeUhe1LVxcmEgri_iPscZWAH_Rp_o5Rxyc9XuyXS4zYdhEI9sys-cdBLNUSqVJRfi_7UYc4HQU7UrRiKgUBTsVcrltrbV0No8/4fg/lxDCHRwySfuGrOlUlNO7QA/h2/h001.BihiwNgvvpcLCS15HrYUTAbkDU74bafxsRMKYDFvQVw)
---
DACA recipients have lived here for an average of 24 years—their lives, families, and futures are rooted here, and they make our communities stronger. I will never stop fighting for them and for all of our immigrant neighbors.
I’m a daughter of immigrants, and I’m proud to represent diverse communities who’ve made their home in Michigan’s 12th congressional district.
In Congress, I’m cosponsoring the newly reintroduced _American Dream and Promise Act_ , which would give DACA recipients (also known as Dreamers), a pathway to citizenship. This could protect more than 5 million of our neighbors who have built their lives here, and keep millions of families together.
I’m also hosting Know Your Rights webinars and workshops with legal advocates on how to resist Trump’s attacks on our communities and keep our communities safe from family separation and deportation. We will defend the constitutional and human rights of everyone who lives here.
Right now, we need everyone to speak out against dehumanization and speak up for our marginalized neighbors. One way you can help is by chipping in to cover the renewal fees for DACA recipients so they can stay here with their families, where their home is. Your support is more important than ever because renewal fees increased this year.
[**100% of your tax-deductible donation will go toward covering the $555 cost of renewal for DACA recipients. Will you make a contribution right now to help?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquWKGDGBxlkFqEx_8pz9U7p49CmS7XYKP-pnPf-3o5QEDikYyJ1_6RGXJl91hEZYmp4OUdsjiWZag6WIZFzpy5Rnjj9qG9I6nChVWTO-F1A51kHMEp1gx6wImcA0mPXWTd2pVxrjJjtIIiZmJK1cevFAQdly4UdwGDoccl_Var8I0pBtDbyWYVfzC6BM3MtGbNXEbQU0JsiZYYWFRzfrilM8UgRJPPNrDi7Y6w--aHOnA5yJGQekqodbI2h5ofLA8KSGe-Fl-MbGNh1LLG7JdcxY9uAkHymYJbwakfDu7uN1C8PTyDmsL1cZUwpkYxRdaFX7F5L5ou1U8gJmPdRVw8i5NbRvciZZ-gt5Mz4a0yAW4z9eMAm7zqM3tVzqLU0rkI/4fg/lxDCHRwySfuGrOlUlNO7QA/h3/h001.XvqzmbcMq3H3SUVH4Sv2t5M-IUC0O-rndnFRQ5h2DXI)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sun, Apr 6, 2025
Subject: Help immigrant youth renew their DACA status >>
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Last month, a federal court opened up first-time DACA applications across the country for the first time in years. DACA recipients, known as Dreamers, were brought to the U.S. as children. For many, this country is the only home they’ve ever known.
The DACA program (Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals) protects these undocumented youth from deportation and allows them to get government IDs so they can drive, go to school, and hold jobs.
The new court ruling—which also affirmed current DACA recipients’ ability to renew their protections—is a hard-fought victory. However, these applications must now get processed through Trump’s U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services department, which has not yet confirmed if it will follow the court’s ruling.
**We can’t trust Trump’s administration to follow the law, and they could move to end DACA at any time. So** **the immigrant youth-led group United We Dream is urging people who are currently protected to renew their DACA status as soon as possible—while they still can.**
The cost for renewals went up by $60 this year, from $495 to $555, creating an even bigger financial barrier for many immigrants. With fees increasing, our support is more important than ever.
[**Will you rush a contribution to United We Dream’s DACA Renewal Fund to help cover the $555 fee for DACA recipients who can’t afford to renew their critical protections?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquWKGDGBxlkFqEx_8pz9U7p49CmS7XYKP-pnPf-3o5QEDikYyJ1_6RGXJl91hEZYmpSLmOX4UHbend_M_gXe-dBjHeaNSwfSneAkwwZsHjHM7-aTG6j9q744fcMvx0T9gOHYqeMl9JaJg3MTzp6urxjmtDhAumiUOe8XKEYDc8c5WNTgYvcyymuZ-Wet1Zxe7Igoz6IFD9hVUAJctzjpnzmyCyo0m-M8tKy_scyK5iXjiEkrRk1xszBEAzTadeQeOWefaP9K0a36REVHOC8YMUo6_Dxj_swgO-1NOf7oLHJ_j0plDxS9qo_uG6zr2-ueO0QGQF95LRIM_03XuIfXjjbAwQ7LeFmvjSaor00WTxy9vCAsc2S-_4jitVk_S7jt1A/4fg/lxDCHRwySfuGrOlUlNO7QA/h10/h001.c2etcWzxoDrLClJJDAr7puk03hkwnxaHhkB0jjL1C18)
[RUSH A DONATION FOR DACA RENEWAL](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquWKGDGBxlkFqEx_8pz9U7p49CmS7XYKP-pnPf-3o5QEDikYyJ1_6RGXJl91hEZYmpVQOrWwMQZKiLnM-nEbElPFLxlqzPw6y3MFD_MD_RyHgAKPfu-DMAdH4gaDflA5_KQKZcJWvsS9Bo0lfTGNl1dgbUD6tdF6OfqCTWAZ8aF32_qwhciCO6kSvRNkBCy_Q-Q0PLunPOmOR3HmqOsQV1XhHnwT4mniyeG26ZojlsWu8R64NEarBsRTvzRp5nyKfFuKWLD5PXXTUdIQwTKmu2baabc5iDw_xW5D16Gfggd65F-Ooa8m5HCS43WE7I3ht3cUCNiFngBiLH_mqPUNhYgu8RphB7rlPp1T1-0z2rvG9_2zqrD5ji9MVjU_Kdbu0k/4fg/lxDCHRwySfuGrOlUlNO7QA/h11/h001.kMR7xRWW5MA7owvd3DjF6hIUFixRQEdb3i4biO8nNvo)
---
United We Dream successfully pushed the Obama administration to enact DACA. The group has continued to push for expanded protections and fight back against deportation raids and racist laws, winning sanctuary resolutions and state policies that limit cooperation with ICE.
For years, the DACA program’s status was in limbo due to court decisions. Hundreds of thousands of current DACA recipients’ lives were in upheaval, and over 90,000 first-time applications have been waiting to be processed.
The latest court decision affirms that DACA recipients in all 50 states have protection from deportation, but the ruling could put work authorization at risk for DACA recipients in Texas, leaving that up to a Texas judge.
I’m a proud cosponsor of the newly reintroduced _American Dream and Promise Act_ , which would give DACA recipients (also known as Dreamers), a pathway to citizenship. This could protect more than 5 million of our neighbors who have built their lives here, and keep millions of families together.
I will never stop fighting for permanent protections for immigrants, who make our communities stronger. In Congress,**** I will keep demanding human dignity and safety for all human beings, and pushing for everyone’s rights. We need to use our collective voices to speak up for our rights, our shared humanity, and dignity for all people. Dehumanization harms us all.
Right now, you as an individual can fight back against Trump’s mass deportations and protect some families from being torn apart—by chipping in to help DACA recipients renew their protections to stay in the country and stay with their families.

clean_body: Dreamers were brought to the U.S. as children, and they have lived and worked in our communities for an average of 24 years. | | | Friend, Last month, a court ruling defending immigrants brought here as children went into effect—affirming that all DACA recipients (also known as Dreamers) can renew their status, which protects them from deportation. The court ruling also opens up first-time applications for the program for the first time in years. However, Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) applications must be processed by the Trump administration, and they haven’t yet commented on whether they’ll follow this court ruling. With Trump’s mass deportation agenda escalating in defiance of court orders, the administration could try to end DACA at any time. So immigrant youth-led United We Dream is urging all current DACA recipients to renew their DACA status while they still can. For those who need to renew their DACA, the exorbitant $555 renewal fee remains a huge barrier for many immigrants. That’s why United We Dream has the DACA Renewal Fund, which fully covers the $555 cost for DACA recipients! | DACA recipients have lived here for an average of 24 years—their lives, families, and futures are rooted here, and they make our communities stronger. I will never stop fighting for them and for all of our immigrant neighbors. I’m a daughter of immigrants, and I’m proud to represent diverse communities who’ve made their home in Michigan’s 12th congressional district. In Congress, I’m cosponsoring the newly reintroduced American Dream and Promise Act , which would give DACA recipients (also known as Dreamers), a pathway to citizenship. This could protect more than 5 million of our neighbors who have built their lives here, and keep millions of families together. I’m also hosting Know Your Rights webinars and workshops with legal advocates on how to resist Trump’s attacks on our communities and keep our communities safe from family separation and deportation. We will defend the constitutional and human rights of everyone who lives here. Right now, we need everyone to speak out against dehumanization and speak up for our marginalized neighbors. One way you can help is by chipping in to cover the renewal fees for DACA recipients so they can stay here with their families, where their home is. Your support is more important than ever because renewal fees increased this year. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to DACA Application Fund | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Last year, United We Dream helped hundreds of DACA recipients to renew their protections, and together, we will keep demanding protections and dignity for all who live here. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sun, Apr 6, 2025 Subject: Help immigrant youth renew their DACA status >> To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Last month, a federal court opened up first-time DACA applications across the country for the first time in years. DACA recipients, known as Dreamers, were brought to the U.S. as children. For many, this country is the only home they’ve ever known. The DACA program (Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals) protects these undocumented youth from deportation and allows them to get government IDs so they can drive, go to school, and hold jobs. The new court ruling—which also affirmed current DACA recipients’ ability to renew their protections—is a hard-fought victory. However, these applications must now get processed through Trump’s U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services department, which has not yet confirmed if it will follow the court’s ruling. We can’t trust Trump’s administration to follow the law, and they could move to end DACA at any time. So the immigrant youth-led group United We Dream is urging people who are currently protected to renew their DACA status as soon as possible—while they still can. The cost for renewals went up by $60 this year, from $495 to $555, creating an even bigger financial barrier for many immigrants. With fees increasing, our support is more important than ever. United We Dream successfully pushed the Obama administration to enact DACA. The group has continued to push for expanded protections and fight back against deportation raids and racist laws, winning sanctuary resolutions and state policies that limit cooperation with ICE. For years, the DACA program’s status was in limbo due to court decisions. Hundreds of thousands of current DACA recipients’ lives were in upheaval, and over 90,000 first-time applications have been waiting to be processed. The latest court decision affirms that DACA recipients in all 50 states have protection from deportation, but the ruling could put work authorization at risk for DACA recipients in Texas, leaving that up to a Texas judge. I’m a proud cosponsor of the newly reintroduced American Dream and Promise Act , which would give DACA recipients (also known as Dreamers), a pathway to citizenship. This could protect more than 5 million of our neighbors who have built their lives here, and keep millions of families together. I will never stop fighting for permanent protections for immigrants, who make our communities stronger. In Congress, I will keep demanding human dignity and safety for all human beings, and pushing for everyone’s rights. We need to use our collective voices to speak up for our rights, our shared humanity, and dignity for all people. Dehumanization harms us all. Right now, you as an individual can fight back against Trump’s mass deportations and protect some families from being torn apart—by chipping in to help DACA recipients renew their protections to stay in the country and stay with their families. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to DACA Application Fund | | | | | | | | | Thank you. I will keep fighting for and alongside you. -Rashida P.S. If you’re eligible for DACA and considering applying for the first time, United We Dream recommends speaking to a trusted attorney or community organization before submitting your application. * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via .
