[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/b1f640e24a0144f6b87dfb0b01a97216-9ebf4f76365a40dfb0fecf8baeff9a9c/63)

name: The Squad
subject: An extraordinary act of endurance and courage
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250407-1306-foote&t=1001&akid=1306%2E342411%2EbQn-RJ ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Last week, Cory Booker embarked on an extraordinary act of endurance and
courage. He spoke for over 25 hours straight on the Senate floor to
protest Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s blatant disregard for the rule of
law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.

That kind of courage is contagious,
Peter. It’s a call to action for
all of us. Cory Booker has shown us the power of stepping up and speaking
truth to power. Now, it’s our turn. We must take this fight to the next
level.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250407-movement.kHEkEh&refcode=em20250407-1306&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1306%2E342411%2EbQn-RJ ]Every dollar you contribute helps us build the grassroots movement we
need to push back against Trump, Musk, and all those who threaten our
democracy. Can we count on you to chip in and ensure that we have the
resources to keep pushing forward?

Our Squad — Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida, and AOC — stands in solidarity with
Cory Booker and every leader who is stepping up and speaking out against
the threats posed by Trump and Musk. But we can’t win this fight alone.

Imagine what we could achieve if leaders all over this country stepped up,
just like Cory Booker, and amplified the voices and values of the people.
Imagine what we could do if we united to demand justice, accountability,
and real change for our communities. We’ve already started, but we need to
build an even stronger grassroots base.

Now’s the time to take bold action,
Peter. We can’t wait for
someone else to do it. We need YOU to stand with us, to support the Squad,
and to help us build the resources we need to defeat Trump, Musk, and the
forces trying to tear this country apart.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250407-movement.kHEkEh&refcode=em20250407-1306&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1306%2E342411%2EbQn-RJ ]Are you ready to take this fight to the next level? Chip in to support
the Squad and help us keep pushing forward to defeat Trump, Musk, and
their dangerous agendas.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250407-movement.kHEkEh&refcode=em20250407-1306&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1306%2E342411%2EbQn-RJ ]Donate ››

Together,

The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1306%2E342411%2EbQn-RJ

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Sam
subject: building on this momentum right here in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
We just witnessed a historic win in Wisconsin, where voters elected Judge Susan Crawford and defeated Elon Musk-backed Brad Schimel. Voters delivered a powerful message on Tuesday in favor of fairness and democracy and a clear rebuke of Elon Musk and Donald Trump.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105389385/538182274/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzAyMDkxMmYtZmQxMy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4ovTnsbhZUFGw2_t3MBXBLHsrgojT9bjj5nuuBSGyc0=)
---
| Peter,

We just witnessed a historic win in Wisconsin, where voters elected Judge Susan Crawford and defeated Elon Musk-backed Brad Schimel. Voters delivered a powerful message on Tuesday in favor of fairness and democracy and a clear rebuke of Elon Musk and Donald Trump.

This victory serves as a powerful reminder that when we come together, we can push back against the negative forces trying to undermine our rights and our future.

**Now, it’s our turn to keep this momentum going — right here in Virginia. This November, we have a chance to deliver a clear message that Virginians will not stand for the chaos and division that is coming out of Washington.**

Virginians have already felt the devastating impacts of this new administration, from mass layoffs to tariffs, and while Virginia’s Republican leadership has defended President Trump and these harmful policies every step of the way, Abigail is ready to stand up for Virginians to protect our democracy, safeguard our reproductive rights, and create an economy that works for everyone.

But this race is set to be the most competitive in the country, and we know that Elon Musk could pour millions of dollars into this race to try to sway the outcome his way. That’s why we need to build a strong base of grassroots support now.

And when we win in 2025, we’ll set the groundwork for Democrats to win in 2026 and beyond.

clean_body: We just witnessed a historic win in Wisconsin, where voters elected Judge Susan Crawford and defeated Elon Musk-backed Brad Schimel. Voters delivered a powerful message on Tuesday in favor of fairness and democracy and a clear rebuke of Elon Musk and Donald Trump. | = | Peter, We just witnessed a historic win in Wisconsin, where voters elected Judge Susan Crawford and defeated Elon Musk-backed Brad Schimel. Voters delivered a powerful message on Tuesday in favor of fairness and democracy and a clear rebuke of Elon Musk and Donald Trump. This victory serves as a powerful reminder that when we come together, we can push back against the negative forces trying to undermine our rights and our future. Now, it’s our turn to keep this momentum going — right here in Virginia. This November, we have a chance to deliver a clear message that Virginians will not stand for the chaos and division that is coming out of Washington. Virginians have already felt the devastating impacts of this new administration, from mass layoffs to tariffs, and while Virginia’s Republican leadership has defended President Trump and these harmful policies every step of the way, Abigail is ready to stand up for Virginians to protect our democracy, safeguard our reproductive rights, and create an economy that works for everyone. But this race is set to be the most competitive in the country, and we know that Elon Musk could pour millions of dollars into this race to try to sway the outcome his way. That’s why we need to build a strong base of grassroots support now. And when we win in 2025, we’ll set the groundwork for Democrats to win in 2026 and beyond. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Sam Campaign Manager * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. name: Sarah McBride
subject: Families will pay the price of Donald Trump’s tariffs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Car seats, high chairs, cribs, and strollers are not luxury items.
#
Being a parent or caregiver is hard enough.
The long nights. The 24/7 worry. The never-ending expenses.
Now imagine being told that you have to pay _even more_ for the things that keep your baby or toddler safe.
**Car seats. High chairs. Cribs. Strollers. These are not luxuries.** They’re essential items — and, thanks to Donald Trump’s reckless tariff policies, their prices will go up.
Trump promised to lower costs on day one. But the truth? His policies are doing the _exact opposite_ , and it’s families who will pay the price.
**That’s why Sarah led a letter urging the Trump administration to take immediate action to exempt items for young children from these harmful taxes on everyday Americans.**
Because no family should have to choose between keeping their child safe and affordability.
[**If you agree, will you join our call and become a grassroots co-signer of Sarah’s letter to Donald Trump?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-stop-tariffs-essential-items-young-children/?source=em20250407-1881&akid=1881%2E21716%2E-O5Xcv)
**[Sign on »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-stop-tariffs-essential-items-young-children/?source=em20250407-1881&akid=1881%2E21716%2E-O5Xcv)**
Thanks for taking action,
Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250407-1&t=1&refcode2=1881_21716_-O5Xcv&akid=1881%2E21716%2E-O5Xcv)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1881%2E21716%2E-O5Xcv)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1881%2E21716%2E-O5Xcv)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1881%2E21716%2E-O5Xcv)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Mark Takano
subject: rooted in resilience:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
I didn’t take the usual path to Congress
| [ ](https://takano4ca.us/l/a6gdkZdpxjrf?t=43yNa958ErBX)
---
**I didn’t take the usual path to Congress, Peter.** I wasn’t handpicked by party insiders, shaped by Washington consultants, or carefully designed based on the latest polling. No, my commitment to public service was _built over generations_ —rooted in resilience, perseverance, and an unshakable belief in a better future.

**My parents and grandparents didn’t have that same choice.** During World War II, they were sent to Japanese American internment camps, stripped of their rights, and forced to rebuild from nothing—all because of racist, fear-driven policies. [](https://takano4ca.us/l/fiq1Dc6wzfnj) **Even after being treated as second-class citizens** , they never gave up on this country. They taught me that loving America means fighting to **_make it_** live up to its promise.

That lesson shaped my entire life. It’s why I spent 20 years as a public school teacher. It’s why I ran for Congress—despite the bigotry I faced when my Republican opponent forcibly outed me in 1994. And it’s why I’m still fighting today.

Because now, we’re facing a new wave of extremism. The MAGA Majority in the House isn’t just attacking immigrants, LGBTQ+ Americans, and women’s rights—they’re openly scheming to cut Social Security, the lifeline millions of seniors rely on. They want to dismantle decades of progress, and if we don’t stop them, they just might succeed. [**We cannot let that happen. The only way to stop MAGA’s dangerous agenda is to narrow their majority in the House and flip key seats. If we sit on the sidelines, they win. But if we fight together, we can stop them. So I’m counting on you – will you chip in $7 today to help elect Democrats and protect our future? »**](https://takano4ca.us/l/ydXYHKAfv7Pc) | [CHIP IN $7 TO FLIP THE MAGA MAJORITY! »](https://takano4ca.us/l/Kb7Uywzcb3ys)
---
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://takano4ca.us/l/WG2SHn23kN5b)
---

[Or a custom donation »](https://takano4ca.us/l/N0qyBN6UeBxh)
Thank you,

Mark Takano
| | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517
www.marktakano.com

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://takano4ca.us/l/PBwBgLnOQcVg?t=Ci5LLfOvWoE8). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact, make a[monthly contribution by clicking here](https://takano4ca.us/l/yu51pBJtoYm1?t=m2wEuhJYJNMm).**

| Peter, The Easter season is here! That means it's the perfect time to help your kids remember why we celebrate Easter: The ultimate sacrifice that Jesus made, and His glorious resurrection! If your kids are like most, they look forward to Easter morning with eager anticipation! The joy of receiving baskets of goodies and sweet treats is enough to make any child excited. But with all the excitement, it's easy for kids to forget why we celebrate Easter: The resurrection of Jesus Christ.
---
| [ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ecf7ed8ea8864a73b58c14c79cefa191&_e=aplFLYJbIIN9k-7DLAdtNL-i3VUgy6MnuYLx0GUQ3XNk0M0Tvp02lzS3LfJgYx0AqPNv1SghVcSdK2xy5NR99A9xTRwUgQCuwDC0EJmUsLNyOV57eWXd6BiZpCK-8jIR_mfYeb85W8pC-iCDPQ5AQyvLKWy1C5KrR857bfA_MT_-40Bp8uMDOILw3haxvhWelrVoMYY7xaMerI8xu4GKxwPmF2v-NsDYbaoAgFPlPFPVTBzCq2DESeDoa67eRMT1U6WTsxUuS_hL8rgJA1hZ_4v1tJtbZyKxHCPfLR15c7MABn7O4jkSWAVqSzNDYwWDiYBPE0pGGSTK-qXL_NbHvyP-bpKovhQGt_eI5X_OQwuL2lH_N8rVIbA54TgnzOqR6ifg0yZI1VVHmZ6zna27KQ%3D%3D)
---
|
---
That's why we're giving away The Kids Guide to the Bible: The Resurrection of Jesus as part of this free bundle offer for Easter! This special gift is packed with pages of colorful illustrations and important Biblical facts about how and why Jesus died for our sins, and how He was resurrected from the dead. You'll also receive the latest issue of EverBright Kids Magazine & Activity Book for free. You just need to pay $1 s&p; each, which is a small price to help your kids remember that Jesus is the reason for the season! Have a very happy and blessed Easter, Your friends at The Kids Guide to The Bible

clean_body: It's easy for kids to forget why we celebrate Easter| | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, The Easter season is here! That means it's the perfect time to help your kids remember why we celebrate Easter: The ultimate sacrifice that Jesus made, and His glorious resurrection! If your kids are like most, they look forward to Easter morning with eager anticipation! The joy of receiving baskets of goodies and sweet treats is enough to make any child excited. But with all the excitement, it's easy for kids to forget why we celebrate Easter: The resurrection of Jesus Christ. | | That's why we're giving away The Kids Guide to the Bible: The Resurrection of Jesus as part of this free bundle offer for Easter! This special gift is packed with pages of colorful illustrations and important Biblical facts about how and why Jesus died for our sins, and how He was resurrected from the dead. You'll also receive the latest issue of EverBright Kids Magazine & Activity Book for free. You just need to pay $1 s&p; each, which is a small price to help your kids remember that Jesus is the reason for the season! Have a very happy and blessed Easter, Your friends at The Kids Guide to The Bible | P.S. Remember, when you order this special Easter Gift Bundle, your kids can watch the "Jesus Is The Good News" video lesson—it's the perfect way for kids to celebrate Easter!

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: This fight is personal for me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4646%2E35263%2EEMYqU5)
Peter — The recent budget cuts to the National Institutes of Health (NIH) are nothing short of cruel. Elon Musk and Donald Trump are writing off funding for cures for Alzheimer’s disease and cancer as waste, fraud, and abuse — all to pay for tax cuts for their billionaire buddies. As these devastating cuts go into effect, valuable research will be slowed. Progress toward bettering the lives of millions of people will stall. There will be a deadly delay in potential treatments and cures. **Patients turn to medical professionals to get answers, and the Trump administration’s cuts to NIH will leave them in the dark.** Peter, this fight for proper care has always been personal to me. As a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital. I may not have gotten better without the skilled doctors and nurses who cared for me and the medical advancements made due to NIH funding. We can all agree that the government should be more efficient. But recklessly revoking funds for lifesaving research is not the way to do it — full stop. **I refuse to stand idly by as this administration robs patients and their families of cures for diseases that affect millions of Americans and people around the world.** **[I’ll always fight the GOP’s attempts to take away our care. Can you chip in $10 to support my efforts to hold this administration accountable to those affected by the NIH cuts?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2533?c0=stb-em-apr25.wY8HBL&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250407_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4646%2E35263%2EEMYqU5)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-apr25.YbSOLB&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250407_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4646%2E35263%2EEMYqU5)

I’ll never forget why I got into public service. My work has always been inspired by my personal experience, and I’m doing everything I can to ensure every American has access to health care and life-changing cures.
Thank you for standing with me.
— Tammy

name: Bryan
subject: April 7 Campaign Update
body:
Here's what we can do to continue to build the conservative movement.

| | | | | [](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=637a19fb8d&e=e907534017)
---
| | | | | **April 7, 2025**
---
| Here’s an update from our campaign:
---
| | | | |
# Moving Forward From the April Election
---
| It’s no surprise that conservatives, Republicans, and common-sense voters across Wisconsin are feeling disappointed with the results of Tuesday night. But there was one bright spot from Tuesday that we can build on...
---
[](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=0254150fd0&e=e907534017)
|
# A Victory for Election Integrity

The one positive Conservatives can take home is that the Constitutional Amendment protecting **Voter ID passed** [62.7% - 27.24%.](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=f2674d32e8&e=e907534017) Voter ID passed with majority support in every county except Dane and Milwaukee.
_I’m dedicated to continuing my work supporting strong election integrity measures nationwide. Stay tuned for an update on these efforts later this week_[ _**HERE**_](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=530baa8622&e=e907534017) _._
---
[](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=9835a2466a&e=e907534017)
| _Support for the Constitutional Amendment by county_
---
| **Our takeaway from Tuesday is clear - conservative policies are popular with voters.**
We must redouble our efforts to focus on the issues that Americans sent Republicans to Washington to deliver on - to provide economic relief for Wisconsin families, secure our border, unleash American energy, and restore trust in our elections.

We can win, but we can’t afford anyone to sit on the sidelines. 2026 is coming up quickly, and the Left is already preparing.
---
| [GET INVOLVED TODAY](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=ee816bc145&e=e907534017)
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil
---
| [DONATE](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=28ab485680&e=e907534017)
---
|

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Sign Up Now for Resistance Lab Training April 13
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
With our democracy under threat, we won’t be giving it up easily.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250407-4927-footer&t=1&akid=4927%2E420207%2EVudDEL)
Peter, have you been to one of Pramila’s Resistance Lab trainings yet?
Pramila developed these trainings with experts on global resistance movements to educate people about how democracies fall and to learn about the most effective non-violent resistance tactics, frameworks and principles.
**In just two weeks, more than 15,000 people have signed up to join us from 32 states across the country.** Thousands of people are signing up now because they know democracies fall in a matter of months and we don’t have time to waste.
[**Click here to sign up to attend our next training yourself. There are virtual and in-person options, and if you’re able, you can also sign up to host a house party with friends and family so your full group can participate.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/49091?t=2&akid=4927%2E420207%2EVudDEL)
If you sign up to host, we’ll give you all the tools you need to host a successful house party.
No matter how you join us, **you’ll hear from experts** who have been studying non-violent resistance movements across the globe, **get real tools** to put to use in upcoming actions, and help build our community of effective “Democracy First Responders” to **take back our country.** By the end, you’ll be strike-ready and street-ready!
**Click the button below to RSVP.[And to hear more about the Resistance Labs, click here to watch Pramila talk about our movement on Rachel Maddow!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250407?refcode=em20250407-4927&amount=3&refcode2=4927_420207_VudDEL&akid=4927%2E420207%2EVudDEL)**
**[RSVP](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/49091?t=3&akid=4927%2E420207%2EVudDEL)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
_**P.S. — It takes resources to make our Resistance Lab trainings happen, and since Pramila doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs, she’s counting on grassroots supporters like you to help her keep them going.[If you can, will you pitch in $3 today to fund Pramila’s work to defend our democracy and build our progressive movement?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250407?refcode=em20250407-4927&amount=3&refcode2=4927_420207_VudDEL&akid=4927%2E420207%2EVudDEL)**_

clean_body: With our democracy under threat, we won’t be giving it up easily. Peter, have you been to one of Pramila’s Resistance Lab trainings yet? Pramila developed these trainings with experts on global resistance movements to educate people about how democracies fall and to learn about the most effective non-violent resistance tactics, frameworks and principles. In just two weeks, more than 15,000 people have signed up to join us from 32 states across the country. Thousands of people are signing up now because they know democracies fall in a matter of months and we don’t have time to waste. If you sign up to host, we’ll give you all the tools you need to host a successful house party. No matter how you join us, you’ll hear from experts who have been studying non-violent resistance movements across the globe, get real tools to put to use in upcoming actions, and help build our community of effective “Democracy First Responders” to take back our country. By the end, you’ll be strike-ready and street-ready! Click the button below to RSVP. In solidarity, Team Pramila P.S. — It takes resources to make our Resistance Lab trainings happen, and since Pramila doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs, she’s counting on grassroots supporters like you to help her keep them going. | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Cruel and illegal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
I want to be clear, Peter: **Donald Trump’s cruel attempts to dismantle the Department of Education are _illegal_ , and my Democratic colleagues and I are fighting back with everything we have.** Millions of children rely on the programs that Elon Musk, Trump, and his administration are targeting. I know this because I am a product of our public education system. My elementary school created a lunch program because we did not have the National School Lunch Program yet. To this day, for nearly one in three students, a free lunch at school is often their only meal that day. And when I was accepted into college, I paid for my education through work-study — yet another federal program. I have a full understanding that — if vital programs like free school lunch, special education, or financial aid are dismantled with the Department of Education — chaos and confusion will spread like wildfire in our communities and schools across the country. It’s beyond backward that families, students, and teachers will be left to pay the price for the Trump administration’s destructive billionaire tax cuts. My Democratic colleagues and I refuse to stand by as the Trump administration robs every student in our nation of the quality education they deserve. Peter, our public schools are the reason why I’m here today, and I will never stop fighting for our children’s education and their future. **[If it’s within your budget, please consider fueling my work to protect the Department of Education and crucial federal programs that our children rely on.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105389911/538184224/-1348676356?amount=&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250407_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjI5MjdhZS1mZjEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=riLrHuSeA1ZCjxFpsflwdC44--XS_3pu0EJyZlliexs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105389912/538184225/-1348676356?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250407_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjI5MjdhZS1mZjEzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=riLrHuSeA1ZCjxFpsflwdC44--XS_3pu0EJyZlliexs=)

Last year Senate Democrats and President Biden were RACING to pass the _No Kings Act..._

It would STRIP away Trump's immunity and the far-right Supreme Court's power to save him!!

But now, Republicans are bending the knee to Trump and giving him overarching **executive powers no president should have.**

[**_So we need EVERY SINGLE DEMOCRAT reading this to sign to demand Congress reintroduce the _No Kings Act_ and hold him accountable >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60485?t=4&akid=22981%2E4449941%2E7Y8y96) | [SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60485?t=5&akid=22981%2E4449941%2E7Y8y96)
---
This bill would change EVERYTHING.

Here's what it would do:

**ONE:** It would finally hold Trump accountable for his countless crimes - including his 34 felony convictions.

**TWO:** It would stop the conservative Supreme Court Justices' corruption that they've gotten away with for far too long!

**THREE:** It would put a damper on Trump's absolute destruction he's waging on our democracy!!

But without the support of Democrats in your area, Congress **_MAY NEVER_** re-introduce this bill!
[**_PLEASE: Be one of the first Democrats in your area to sign on before 11:59 PM to DEMAND Congress re-introduce the _No Kings Act_ >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60485?t=6&akid=22981%2E4449941%2E7Y8y96)

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Elon Musk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We're glad that Musk will be taking a break.
#
Alexandria has questioned a lot of billionaires in her career, and she's made it clear: **Elon Musk is one of the most unintelligent, morally vacant billionaires she has ever met.**
So we weren’t surprised to see this new headline:
Last week, Musk dumped $20 million into the Wisconsin Supreme Court election — **now the most expensive judicial election in history** 1 — only for his MAGA candidate to be soundly defeated by Democrat-backed Susan Crawford.
Next, Tesla reported the largest drop in sales in its history — equivalent to **Musk losing a quarter of his net worth since January**.2
And then, the White House confirmed that **Trump will not extend Musk’s 'special government employee' contract**.
We’re glad that Musk will take a break from going after the elderly, the disabled, and veterans to pocket tax cuts for himself, but **our work to stop Trump and his billionaire donors from turning the U.S. into their personal slush fund is not over.**
[Our movement for real progress for working people will have to push harder than ever these next four years. Will you make a $5 contribution today to help Alexandria continue the fight?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250407.cD2feD&refcode=em20250407-8555-P_FND_CTR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8555%2E2526796%2Et8SYME)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250407.cD2feD&refcode=em20250407-8555-P_FND_CTR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8555%2E2526796%2Et8SYME)**
Whether or not you can give today, thank you for standing with us against the MAGA oligarchy.
More soon,
Team AOC

1\. [**MSNBC** : Susan Crawford wins Wisconsin’s Supreme Court election, preserving liberals' majority](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/32207?t=21&akid=8555%2E2526796%2Et8SYME)
2\. [**CNN** : Tesla sales plunge: Biggest decline in history](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/32208?t=22&akid=8555%2E2526796%2Et8SYME)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250407?refcode=em20250407-8555-P_FND_CTR_GFM&t=23&refcode2=8555_2526796_t8SYME&akid=8555%2E2526796%2Et8SYME)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250407-8555-P_FND_CTR_GFM&t=24&akid=8555%2E2526796%2Et8SYME)**

Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: April 7th Legislative Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d3bb693cfd&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Good afternoon,

Tomorrow, two officials from the Trump Administration will be paying a visit to the legislature. At noon, the Homeland Security Director, Tom Homan will be addressing a [joint legislative session](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=79db41ba82&e=a7ab36849c). Then, later in the day, the HHS Secretary, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will be speaking on a legislative panel. These events will be [live-streamed on Capitol TV.](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1cab7d3fb6&e=a7ab36849c)

Over the next few days the State Senate will hold its Rules Committee and Republican Caucus. Then, we will go to the floor of the Senate to debate and vote on several House bills the remainder of the week, including a [bill](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e002a754a6&e=a7ab36849c) to fully fund the supplemental funding for the DES-DD (Developmental Disabilities) program. As you may recall, the governor really got us into a mess with this issue, so the legislature will be working to fix it.

**Bolick Bills Signed into Law by the Governor Last Week**
[**SB 1104**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=7a14931158&e=a7ab36849c) police reports; victims; prosecuting agency

**Bolick Bills on the House Rules Agenda**
[**SB 1229**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=13473770a1&e=a7ab36849c) starter homes; planning; home design; restrictions; prohibition
[**SB 1721**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=5b6c607e5a&e=a7ab36849c) egg-laying hens; housing size standards

Finally, this afternoon, the Arizona Senate Republicans launched a video I taped last Friday discussing the Arizona Starter Homes Act. You can view the video for yourself [HERE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=91e8ec0b99&e=a7ab36849c).

_Bolick Legislation In the News_

**SB 1229**

[https://www.kjzz.org/the-show/2025-04-02/arizona-starter-homes-act-sponsor-says-bill-could-help-young-families-buy-houses-in-the-valley](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=378991a4aa&e=a7ab36849c)

_Campaign Information_

If you live in Legislative District 2, [**please sign my online nomination petition**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=550e242397&e=a7ab36849c) ensuring my name appears on the Republican primary ballot. To qualify from the Republican ballot, I need to collect several hundred signatures from registered Republicans and Independents. It only takes a minute or two to login to sign your name on my online nominate petition.

It takes money to run an effective campaign. Please consider making a [**donation**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=cb76cb5b98&e=a7ab36849c) to help fund our campaign. Last cycle, not only did I have a primary, but I worked tirelessly to defeat my Democrat opponent in the general, too. The Democrats spent nearly $2 million in 2024 to try to unseat me. During a mid-term election, they will likely have even more resources to try to buy this legislative seat.

If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, please [**email me**](mailto:info@bolickforarizona.com?subject=Volunteer) and let me know how you'd like to help us secure this seat. I am working on a plan and would love to have your help.

Thank you for your continued support!

Take care,
Shawnna

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Trump wants to deport U.S. citizens to a foreign mega-prison
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Since the Trump administration violated a court order and deported more
than 200 Venezuelan immigrants to an El Salvador mega-prison described as
‘hell on earth,’ it’s been revealed that most of these men did not even
have criminal records.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250407-trump-el-salvador/?source=em20250407-36565&akid=36565%2E1203867%2ETgqw5d ]Tweet from Jared Holt: 60 Minutes "could not find criminal records" for
75% of the 238 men the Trump admin sent to a Salvadoran prison Of the 22%
that had records, the "vast majority are for non-violent offenses." Trump
admin still insists they're "terrorists." Moral bankruptcy

One man, Andry Hernandez Romero, is a young, gay makeup artist who legally
sought refuge in the United States last year. Another is Neri José
Alvarado Borges, a 24-year-old who was accused of being a gang member
solely because of his tattoos honoring his family and younger brother with
autism.

The administration even admitted that Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a 29-year-old
Maryland father who was legally shielded from being deported, was sent
there by “administrative error,” but claim they cannot get him back.

This is what happens when due process is thrown out the
window, Peter.

And now, instead of doing anything to bring these people back, Trump
himself just admitted that U.S. citizens could be next.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250407-trump-el-salvador/?source=em20250407-36565&akid=36565%2E1203867%2ETgqw5d ]Tweet from Acyn: Reporter: The president of El Salvador said he would
be willing to take American citizens in federal prison population. Trump:
I love that

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250407-trump-el-salvador/?source=em20250407-36565&akid=36565%2E1203867%2ETgqw5d ]This is fascism on full display, and we need to fight back NOW. Add
your name to demand Congress step up and do everything in its power to
bring these men back and stop Trump from deporting even more people
without due process to a foreign mega-prison.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250407-trump-el-salvador/?source=em20250407-36565&akid=36565%2E1203867%2ETgqw5d ]TAKE ACTION

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250407-36565-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36565_1203867_Tgqw5d&akid=36565%2E1203867%2ETgqw5d

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36565%2E1203867%2ETgqw5d

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

clean_body: With President Trump's landslide victory, America can finally turn the page on four years of weakness, incompetence, and chaos. Now, the real work of saving our country begins! Starting now, we will implement our America First agenda, dismantle the Deep State, and make this country GREAT again! body:
We’ll cut straight to the chase – without you on our team, we can’t invest in state races. If we can’t invest, then we can’t compete. And if we can’t compete? We can’t win. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**What happens if a grassroots Democrat doesn’t activate their 2025 membership?** ****
1. Our DLCC membership team will stay stagnant at just over 10,000 members – which won’t be nearly enough to counteract right-wing billionaires’ spending.
2. State Democrats in places like your state and beyond won’t have the resources they need to compete against our opponents in upcoming special elections.
3. Expanding economic opportunity, protecting workers’ rights, and building a better future for people like you will become much, _much_ more difficult if Republicans keep amassing power.

name: Official Democratic Headquarters
subject: How your $3 contribution gets put to work:
body:
---
Derek — We’re reaching out to ask if you’ll make a $3 contribution to the DNC today. But before we do, we want to tell you a little bit about how we'll put that donation to work this year. Right now, Democrats are holding People's Town Halls across the country, making sure _everyone_ — regardless of how they voted — has a chance to be heard. We’re also ratcheting up our fight against Trump in the courts, suing him for his illegal attempts to make it harder for Americans to register to vote, cast a ballot, and participate in our democracy. And we’re investing in state parties, funding on-the-ground organizing work in red, blue, and purple states alike. Last week, we saw those investments pay off as voters rejected the Elon Musk-backed candidate in Wisconsin and as Democrats drastically overperformed in Florida. When we invest everywhere, it makes a big difference, Derek. **For the cost of a monthly streaming service, you can help us build the resources we need to fund all of this work.** [So if electing Democrats in 2025, 2026, and beyond is worth a few dollars to you, we’re asking you to contribute today. clean_body: Derek — We’re reaching out to ask if you’ll make a $3 contribution to the DNC today. But before we do, we want to tell you a little bit about how we'll put that donation to work this year. Right now, Democrats are holding People's Town Halls across the country, making sure everyone — regardless of how they voted — has a chance to be heard. We’re also ratcheting up our fight against Trump in the courts, suing him for his illegal attempts to make it harder for Americans to register to vote, cast a ballot, and participate in our democracy. And we’re investing in state parties, funding on-the-ground organizing work in red, blue, and purple states alike. Last week, we saw those investments pay off as voters rejected the Elon Musk-backed candidate in Wisconsin and as Democrats drastically overperformed in Florida. name: Heidi Campbell
subject: Fight for our rights in Tennessee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Lee Jones, treasurer
body:
https://voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://voteheidicampbell.com/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81515/images/HeidiNews1.png]
Dear Neighbors,
As the 2025 assembly prepares to close, I think of the Mark Twain quote that “No man's life, liberty, or property are safe while the legislature is in session.” This particularly alarming year saw the controlling party pass numerous bills to erode our constitutional rights. Just a few notable bills and resolutions:
* A constitutional amendment to eliminate the right to bail [https://nashvillebanner.com/2025/03/18/tennessee-constitutional-amendment-bail/?nvep=&hmac=&emci=343bb8fd-1a0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=] for numerous charges, challenging the presumption of innocence that is central to our justice system

* A law to felonize lawmakers [https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/mar/12/tennessee-immigration-policies] who vote against Trump’s immigration policies

* A law to prevent Tennesseeans from defending themselves [https://www.thecentersquare.com/tennessee/article_f2fdfe68-a1a9-43c9-a610-d21c0fdf0dd3.html] from harm caused by chemical products

* A law to undermine the state’s authority [https://www.timesfreepress.com/news/2025/mar/28/tennessee-wetlands-bill-sees-support-from-law/] to protect our wetlands

* Numerous laws to disallow DEI policies [https://www.yahoo.com/news/dismantle-dei-act-tennessee-lawmakers-201053290.html] for boards, corporations, and schools

Several anti-trans [https://www.wbir.com/article/news/local/anti-transgender-bathroom-bill-in-tennessee-is-headed-to-the-governors-desk/51-8954d81a-cdc6-49a1-8878-2772a387dee4?nvep=&hmac=&emci=343bb8fd-1a0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=] laws [https://www.newschannel5.com/news/a-2025-bathroom-bill-that-impacts-summer-camps-and-boarding-schools-passes-both-tenn-chambers?nvep=&hmac=&emci=343bb8fd-1a0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=]
Tennessee ranks last in voter turnout, and this disengagement leads to representation that’s detrimental to our shared future. The huge turnout for protests across the country this past week shows us that people are finally stepping up!
When we flipped this seat in 2020 we reversed the trend - let’s pick up the momentum by actively engaging with our neighbors to protect our rights. Here's how you can help:
* Educate Yourself : Stay informed about legislative developments. You can keep up with local events here [https://www.mobilize.us] . And join Rep. Aftyn Behn and me at our town hall on April 19. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/L2XUkEmCIUybjfo03tMC0w2]
* Participate in the Democratic Process : Hold your representatives accountable! Register to vote, assist others in registering, and commit to turning out for elections. Years with no elections are the best time to help identify candidates to run against the extreme members of our legislature.
* Support Advocacy Groups : Collaborate with organizations dedicated to civil liberties and social justice to amplify our collective voice.
* Engage in Dialogue : Perhaps most importantly, share your knowledge within your community, and encourage informed participation in our democratic processes. Initiate conversations with friends, family, and neighbors about the impact of recent legislative actions.
Many are already taking action. What an inspiration to see over 1500 Tennesseans show up, despite a flood at the Parthenon, to oppose the Magasphere agenda at the ‘Hands Off’ rally [https://wpln.org/post/thousands-of-tennesseans-join-in-nationwide-protests-of-president-donald-trump/] ! At the same time at Pearl Cohn High, over a thousand people rallied with U.S. Sen. Elizabeth Warren.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81515/images/Heidinews2.png]
Since I was elected in 2020, this is the first time I’ve seen a major national Democratic leader speak in Nashville for a non-campaign related event. Warren knows that Tennessee stands on the front lines of our national struggle, embodying the challenges that threaten the very fabric of our democracy.
As Tennesseans, our collective character has been forged in the tumult of this dynamic, so we’re no strangers to the narrative that our nation is just waking up to. This is our time to lead–the only way is through!
I’d love to hear from you on these issues. You can reach me directly at 615.438.6338 or just stop by my office and say hello.
Warmly,
Heidi
You can reach the campaign at:
info@voteheidicampbell.com [info@voteheidicampbell.com]
629-279-1026
https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn [https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn] https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN [https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN] https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/ [https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/] https://voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://voteheidicampbell.com/] https://www.tiktok.com/senatorheidicampbell [https://www.tiktok.com/senatorheidicampbell]
Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Lee Jones, treasurer.
Campbell for State Senate
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

name: Rob Bonta
subject: I’m suing Trump and RFK Jr. again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
Gutting NIH funding is not only a deep loss to innovation and progress — it’s illegal.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250407&t=1&akid=1726%2E1088799%2EVyK9uF)
Another day, another lawsuit against the Trump administration:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250407?refcode=em20250407-1726&amount=5&refcode2=1726_1088799_VyK9uF&akid=1726%2E1088799%2EVyK9uF)
On Friday, I co-led 16 attorneys general in suing the Trump Administration, the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), and the National Institutes of Health (NIH) for failing to disperse grant funds and for unlawfully terminating existing grants for medical and public health research institutions across the country.
**President Trump and HHS Secretary RFK Jr. are illegally holding up critical grants for life-saving medical research, and I’m once again suing to hold them accountable.**
**[If you have my back in this fight, will you pitch in $5 or more right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250407?refcode=em20250407-1726&amount=5&refcode2=1726_1088799_VyK9uF&akid=1726%2E1088799%2EVyK9uF)**
In 2024 alone, NIH awarded $5.15 billion in grants and contracts that supported **55,000 jobs and $13.81 billion in economic activity here in California.** We cannot afford to lose that, or the promise of progress for future generations’ health.
Over the decades, research funding like this has brought humanity the eradication of polio, the discovery of the gene that causes breast and ovarian cancer, and the transformation of HIV from a fatal disease into one people can live with. **Gutting NIH funding is not only a deep loss to innovation and progress — it’s illegal.**
**[I won’t let it stand, which is why I’m taking Trump and RFK Jr. to court again. Support my ongoing fight against this administration’s unlawful efforts to slash life-saving funding: chip in anything you can to our people-powered campaign today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250407?refcode=em20250407-1726&amount=5&refcode2=1726_1088799_VyK9uF&akid=1726%2E1088799%2EVyK9uF)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250407?refcode=em20250407-1726&amount=5&refcode2=1726_1088799_VyK9uF&akid=1726%2E1088799%2EVyK9uF)**
In solidarity,
Rob
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250407&t=3&refcode2=1726_1088799_VyK9uF&akid=1726%2E1088799%2EVyK9uF)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1726%2E1088799%2EVyK9uF)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1726%2E1088799%2EVyK9uF)

To give by check:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
Email us: [info@robbonta.com](mailto:info@robbonta.com)
PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Why is Romans so important for Christians today?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1lmubfmssf4svsceg4lp2w5t7a7vg2lqp3msbjfj6u7triq58rali3crmx13bebnt1oqtlhf0qqr8whnq5a&__stmp=sudepr&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sudepr&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dku1op4cg4t5u4wxpvb8a718pljba54apa45086xnj1m7pdolawivh6jdb63g8ufg9nyl3soin5fg0ikh13omsayu2w30ft9cqq0cjnl8df1drtabvy2kqnbqzay00fjnzvyzvg1on6wfd00st9f&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sudepr&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sudepr&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sudepr&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sudepr&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dku1op4cg4t5u4wxpvb8a718zz05hj2v5xnwbqw8u9z51atmbi82cqzrk89fmfjhc6pklyi7kl0564yfa677j2kp6lp1jde9z58hxroxx7gw2p6hdsbbxpjl3wkvsgptzj8ls0t17oimns3nq5bf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sudepr&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sudepr&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: They don’t give a damn about you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
Team — I know I don’t need to tell you that Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and extreme Republicans are crashing our economy as we speak. College savings? Depleted. 401k/403b? Wiped out.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105391497/538189249/476240568?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.04.07_b1_jb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDkzODAyMDMtMDUxNC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T1MKuLNatJYc8UPGPCTLYP7evHyn4TRiK-rGhlTrMxg=)
Team —

I know I don’t need to tell you that Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and extreme Republicans are crashing our economy as we speak.

College savings? Depleted.

401k/403b? Wiped out.

Living in the “Golden Age of America”? Absolutely not.

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: We need something different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
We’ve seen enough. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105391567/538189479/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20250407_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTYxOWZjZS0wNTE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nnluk-yWL4mXnVv7gwfAFixPwYtkEYlj4qJtdL_TGRM=)
---
Peter, The status quo in Washington isn’t working. And if we’re being honest, it hasn't worked for a long time. Senator Cory Booker spoke for over 25 hours on the U.S. Senate floor last week — breaking records, yes, but more importantly, sounding the alarm. He spoke about the harm Donald Trump and his allies are inflicting on everyday Americans, from attacks on our democracy to threats to healthcare and civil rights. And here’s the truth: **he’s right.** Working families are fed up. They’re tired of politicians who are more focused on partisan games than actually lowering costs, protecting rights, and making life better for the people they represent. They need leadership that works _for them_ — not for lobbyists, corporations, or the ultra-wealthy. This moment calls for **something different.** It calls for leadership that doesn’t just pay lip service to big challenges but actually does the work to fix them. It calls for leaders who listen, who fight, and who never forget who they’re working for. We’ve seen what happens when leaders put power and politics above people, and we’ve seen enough. It’s time for something better. Wiley North Carolina Democrats won multiple key statewide races in 2024, and in 2026, we can help stymie Trump’s agenda by taking back the Senate and House. **If you’re looking for a way to make a difference right now, please consider chipping in to prepare for the fights ahead.** [**Your donation will fund organizing, infrastructure, and other things NC Democrats need to fight Trump and win in 2026.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105391568/538189480/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20250407_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTYxOWZjZS0wNTE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nnluk-yWL4mXnVv7gwfAFixPwYtkEYlj4qJtdL_TGRM=) | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105391569/538189481/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20250407_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTYxOWZjZS0wNTE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nnluk-yWL4mXnVv7gwfAFixPwYtkEYlj4qJtdL_TGRM=)**

clean_body: We’ve seen enough. | = Peter, The status quo in Washington isn’t working. And if we’re being honest, it hasn't worked for a long time. Senator Cory Booker spoke for over 25 hours on the U.S. Senate floor last week — breaking records, yes, but more importantly, sounding the alarm. He spoke about the harm Donald Trump and his allies are inflicting on everyday Americans, from attacks on our democracy to threats to healthcare and civil rights. And here’s the truth: he’s right. Working families are fed up. They’re tired of politicians who are more focused on partisan games than actually lowering costs, protecting rights, and making life better for the people they represent. They need leadership that works for them — not for lobbyists, corporations, or the ultra-wealthy. This moment calls for something different. It calls for leadership that doesn’t just pay lip service to big challenges but actually does the work to fix them. It calls for leaders who listen, who fight, and who never forget who they’re working for. We’ve seen what happens when leaders put power and politics above people, and we’ve seen enough. It’s time for something better. Wiley North Carolina Democrats won multiple key statewide races in 2024, and in 2026, we can help stymie Trump’s agenda by taking back the Senate and House. If you’re looking for a way to make a difference right now, please consider chipping in to prepare for the fights ahead. = | = Wiley Nickel for North Carolina PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105391661/538189747/-808671217?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5509-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWZmNzUxZi0wNjE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mo2yUT-Ueg2FMZ8KyFB0-SYo63tEd3dFr4A3rNme8eQ=)
Friend, I just joined my good friend Jon Ossoff at a campaign rally for his reelection here in Georgia. I’ll be honest: Jon is in the fight of his political life – and he’ll need support from every single one of us to defend this seat. I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain.
Jon is the only Democratic senator up for reelection in a state that Donald Trump won, and Trump loyalist Marjorie Taylor Greene has said multiple times that she may be the one to run against him.
If she does, you better believe that she’ll have the GOP behind her – including Donald Trump, Elon Musk, far-right conspiracists, and billionaire-backed super PACs. That means hundreds of millions of dollars are going to flood into Georgia to defeat Jon, and he’s going to need a historic grassroots campaign behind him to fight back and win.
**You can’t build up that level of grassroots support overnight though, friend. That’s why I’m personally asking you to pitch in what you can – right now,_today_. [Please, will you donate $5 or more now – split between my campaign and Jon Ossoff’s – to keep Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105391662/538189748/-808671217?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5509-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWZmNzUxZi0wNjE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mo2yUT-Ueg2FMZ8KyFB0-SYo63tEd3dFr4A3rNme8eQ=)**
| | [Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105391663/538189749/-808671217?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk5509-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWZmNzUxZi0wNjE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mo2yUT-Ueg2FMZ8KyFB0-SYo63tEd3dFr4A3rNme8eQ=)

Since he first stepped foot in the Senate, Jon has been fighting day in and day out for you and your family. When it comes to the things that will make a real difference in your life, Jon gets the job done.
**I know that Georgians are disturbed about the direction of our country right now, which is why we need Jon’s voice in the Senate now more than ever. It won’t be easy. But I know a thing or two about winning tough races here in Georgia, so believe me when I tell you: We can win this seat, but it will depend on each and every one of us doing our part.**
**[So I have to ask: Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or more now – split between me and Jon – to defend Georgia, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Donald Trump’s harmful Project 2025 agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105391664/538189750/-808671217?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5509-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWZmNzUxZi0wNjE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mo2yUT-Ueg2FMZ8KyFB0-SYo63tEd3dFr4A3rNme8eQ=)**

# [Why I'm Speaking at Bernie Sanders' Fighting Oligarchy Tour](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2883939&post_id=160821815&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwODIxODE1LCJpYXQiOjE3NDQwNjc4MTMsImV4cCI6MTc0NjY1OTgxMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4ODM5MzkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.8ftJQMuPGnYekiq-DAwWkGN1YDRvcl2Was164smY2Rk)
### The American dream is worth fighting for
| | [Caroline Gleich](https://substack.com/@carolinegleich)
---
| Apr 7
---
| [](https://substack.com/@carolinegleich)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2883939&post_id=160821815&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwODIxODE1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NDA2NzgxMywiZXhwIjoxNzQ2NjU5ODEzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjg4MzkzOSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.axDEW8lsQPxagmOGn0kiYM90npEd0PNiREeUHQx_tP4&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/carolinegleich/p/why-im-speaking-at-bernie-sanders?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..XYwgCwdivw8xt9-MC35qgxwS_R8eQMsFAOwCn7wo-84?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=160821815)
When I was growing up, my family pinched pennies. I wore my brothers' hand-me-downs. I was taught how to sew clothing that ripped. We didn't spend what we didn't have. I worked as a cashier and a greeter at a gear shop. I worked as a nanny. I know what it's like to juggle multiple jobs, chase down health insurance, and wonder if your dreams are just too expensive to afford.
I know what it's like to fear losing your job because of an injury.
I know the anxiety of wondering if getting pregnant could cost you your paycheck--or your career.
These aren't just policy debates. This is real life for millions of Americans. And it's why I'm stepping up to the mic this weekend to introduce Senator Bernie Sanders at his _Fighting Oligarchy_ rally here in Salt Lake City.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/baee0d3e-7c84-437e-94ee-9dc5640bfc8a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Because I still believe in something called the American Dream.
But I don't mean private jets and stock portfolios. I mean the real dream:
> That if you work hard, you can make a good life.
> That you can buy a home. Raise a family. Breathe clean air. Get healthcare when you need it. Retire with dignity.
> That we take care of each other--not just ourselves.
In 2024, I did one of the hardest and scariest things I've ever done--I ran for U.S. Senate. And I did it because I looked at who was in power and thought, _We deserve better._ Honestly? Most of us could do better.
But this fight is bigger than one campaign. Because all around us, the American Dream is slipping away--not by accident, but by design.
We are living through overlapping crises:
The climate crisis.
The housing crisis.
The healthcare crisis.
Plastic pollution in our rivers and oceans.
The cost of living outpacing what people earn.
And all of it is tied to one root cause: **unchecked greed.**
Greed that lets billionaires dodge taxes while families can't afford rent.
Greed that allows corporations to poison our planet for profit.
Greed that calls public schools "woke" while handing billions to defense contractors.
We spend **over $800 billion** a year on the military while kids go hungry and seniors ration medication. That's not national security--that's moral bankruptcy.
> We're told we can't afford clean energy, universal healthcare, or paid family leave--yet somehow we can _always_ afford another war, another subsidy for Big Oil, another tax cut for the ultra-rich?
It doesn't have to be this way.
We can tax billionaires. We can ensure polluters pay. We can invest in housing, schools, clean energy, and a safety net that actually catches people. We can end Citizens United and publicly fund elections so politicians answer to voters--not billionaires.
Because the American Dream shouldn't be a luxury. It should be a _guarantee._
And that's why I'll be there this weekend. Speaking up. Speaking out.
Not just as a former candidate. Not just as a Utahn.
But as someone who still believes in the promise of this country--and knows it's worth fighting for.
[RSVP here.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/787790fd-7bca-43de-b610-34e2bb4e064d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
See you at the rally.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9ffb4ef5-5d44-40ee-8f8e-ede5c0485cdd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
--Caroline

clean_body: The American dream is worth fighting for | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more The American dream is worth fighting for | | | Apr 7 | | | | | | | | | | | | When I was growing up, my family pinched pennies. I wore my brothers' hand-me-downs. I was taught how to sew clothing that ripped. We didn't spend what we didn't have. I worked as a cashier and a greeter at a gear shop. I worked as a nanny. I know what it's like to juggle multiple jobs, chase down health insurance, and wonder if your dreams are just too expensive to afford. I know what it's like to fear losing your job because of an injury. I know the anxiety of wondering if getting pregnant could cost you your paycheck--or your career. These aren't just policy debates. This is real life for millions of Americans. And it's why I'm stepping up to the mic this weekend to introduce Senator Bernie Sanders at his Fighting Oligarchy rally here in Salt Lake City. | | ---|---|--- Because I still believe in something called the American Dream. But I don't mean private jets and stock portfolios. I mean the real dream: That if you work hard, you can make a good life. That you can buy a home. Raise a family. Breathe clean air. Get healthcare when you need it. Retire with dignity. That we take care of each other--not just ourselves. In 2024, I did one of the hardest and scariest things I've ever done--I ran for U.S. Senate. And I did it because I looked at who was in power and thought, We deserve better. Honestly? Most of us could do better. But this fight is bigger than one campaign. Because all around us, the American Dream is slipping away--not by accident, but by design. We are living through overlapping crises: The climate crisis. The housing crisis. The healthcare crisis. Plastic pollution in our rivers and oceans. The cost of living outpacing what people earn. And all of it is tied to one root cause: unchecked greed. Greed that lets billionaires dodge taxes while families can't afford rent. Greed that allows corporations to poison our planet for profit. Greed that calls public schools "woke" while handing billions to defense contractors. We spend over $800 billion a year on the military while kids go hungry and seniors ration medication. That's not national security--that's moral bankruptcy. We're told we can't afford clean energy, universal healthcare, or paid family leave--yet somehow we can always afford another war, another subsidy for Big Oil, another tax cut for the ultra-rich? It doesn't have to be this way. We can tax billionaires. We can ensure polluters pay. We can invest in housing, schools, clean energy, and a safety net that actually catches people. We can end Citizens United and publicly fund elections so politicians answer to voters--not billionaires. Because the American Dream shouldn't be a luxury. It should be a guarantee. And that's why I'll be there this weekend. Speaking up. Speaking out. Not just as a former candidate. Not just as a Utahn. But as someone who still believes in the promise of this country--and knows it's worth fighting for. See you at the rally. | | ---|---|--- --Caroline You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 The Committee to Elect Caroline Gleich PO Box 980561, Park City, UT 84098 ? ?

name: Derek Tran
subject: What’s bringing me hope right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Tran for Congress P
body:
Team — It’s been quite the past few days in Washington DC, so I wanted to reach out personally. It’s easy to feel hopeless right now. Trump’s recklessness has reached new heights. The economy is in peril. Republicans are coming after Social Security and Medicaid.

| Team —

It’s been quite the past few days in Washington DC, so I wanted to reach out personally.

It’s easy to feel hopeless right now. Trump’s recklessness has reached new heights. The economy is in peril. Republicans are coming after Social Security and Medicaid.

I won’t try to sugarcoat things: It’s sometimes hard to find a sense of optimism these days.

**But one of the biggest things that brings me hope right now is all of you.**

Whether it’s calling elected officials, coming together in protest, or chipping in to Democratic campaigns like mine, there are hundreds of thousands of people across the country who are joining us in fighting back against Trump/Musk’s agenda.

Listen, we’re not a team full of “Elon Musks” who can bankroll this entire operation. I’m proud that Team Tran is composed of teachers, nurses, homemakers, lawyers, activists, engineers, care workers, entrepreneurs, and more who believe in the future of this country.

With so much uncertainty in this moment, one of the things I am most certain about is that grassroots supporters like you are making a difference.

Thanks for staying unified. Thanks for working together. And thanks for your belief in this campaign.

In service,

Derek

_P.S. One of the best things we can do right now is prepare to take back the House Majority in 2026. And given that this was one of the tightest House races in the country last year, it’s no secret that Democrats have to keep this seat blue to restore the Majority.[**If you’re willing and able, I hope you’ll make a small donation to my re-election campaign to help ensure I can win this toss up election, once again.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105391719/538190002/2039042026?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.04.07_b1_dt_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWEzZDkxY2UtMDYxNC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=llQ62dt7GVOeHemTFT_oWUWH5NZkICqow250KTTYoPQ=)_

subject: From the bottom of my heart, y’all: THANK YOU!

body:
|

Folks, it’s Jasmine. I know you’ve heard from me and my team a lot over the past few days and weeks, but I just wanted to personally reach out to thank you for all your support. Right now, I’m getting attacked on all sides from Trump, Musk, and their MAGA cronies here in Congress. They’re trying to scare me into silence and crush my voice as they orchestrate an authoritarian takeover of the federal government. **But my pledge to you and all the American people is that I will never stop fighting back and speaking up.** I couldn’t pull it off without your support, and I’m so grateful to have tenacious grassroots champions like you on my team each and every day. [**And with so much on the line right now, I’m going to continue needing your support for the weeks and months ahead. If you’re able, I’d be grateful for your continued support — $5, $10, or more at a time, split with Serve America — to keep up the fight and hold MAGA Republicans accountable. | Peter, this is _historic:_ [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/ZWEZgzkIirgdS4HGlwmmWg~~/AAPPABA~/RyE-UK164OZ9QQKOEPj-QHpJDHjze71Pe13kjL5naZj5zckGNZQvvVOBiUfN53jeF7VDHFiCe2tlslegZoe6n_KMkkEMWqNdpRiMP-HyIHnscYGwMBHTsWXp-zbNitTRHNK3i0m8rm9oDV7shmWcN58xROpTieR5g62HcBKSSzY1Ah-Ef0OAbl3KtuRG3PiwTUgymSmSLV2hSHMtEpIYRbHWh0judlvQ8teaMMxmIUztgFXU88KD3j48Tog3rS5dwPLMn3VEju6nONic6FyAE3hRsudg2NtBFpJ6r26KH4dpXthqW57LqLtoaRrwlkO1cRSzad8E9fZ97Zv4QojXEzVqyExW2kBY80J_OZ4SMp0~) On Saturday, I stood before over 100,000 Americans on the National Mall, united in our fight against the Trump-Musk administration’s relentless assault on our freedoms and communities. [**_If you have a few minutes, click here to watch my full speech._**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/ZWEZgzkIirgdS4HGlwmmWg~~/AAPPABA~/RyE-UK164OZ9QQKOEPj-QHpJDHjze71Pe13kjL5naZj5zckGNZQvvVOBiUfN53jeF7VDHFiCe2tlslegZoe6n_KMkkEMWqNdpRiMP-HyIHnscYGwMBHTsWXp-zbNitTRHNK3i0m8rm9oDV7shmWcN58xROpTieR5g62HcBKSSzY1Ah-Ef0OAbl3KtuRG3PiwTUgymSmSLV2hSHMtEpIYRbHWh0judlvQ8teaMMxmIUztgFXU88KD3j48Tog3rS5dwPLMn3VEju6nONic6FyAE3hRsudg2NtBFpJ6r26KH4dpXthqW57LqLtoaRrwlkO1cRSzad8E9fZ97Zv4QojXEzVqyExW2kBY80J_OZ4SMp0~) Our message to the billionaire-funded far-right authoritarian regime was clear: Hands OFF programs like Social Security and Medicare that working people have fought for and earned. Hands OFF our fellow Americans like our immigrant and LGBTQ+ neighbors. Hands OFF our fundamental rights. Now is not the time to be silent. Silence is complacency, and we will not be complacent in the face of this assault on our democracy and our fellow Americans. **Now is the time for coming together. Now is the time for action.** Peter, whether you marched with the 1,200+ protests across the country on Saturday or supported from home, you’re part of this movement by standing with my campaign. And I thank you for that. I understand that you can’t protest every day, but I have a duty in Congress to fight back with everything I have. And that’s exactly what I’m doing. But I need your help to keep this fight going. [**_That’s why I’m asking: Will you please stand with me and hundreds of thousands of Americans nationwide by rushing a donation right now so I have the resources to keep fighting the good fight?_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/ZWEZgzkIirgdS4HGlwmmWg~~/AAPPABA~/RyE-UK164OZ9QQKOEPj-QHpJDHjze71Pe13kjL5naZj5zckGNZQvvVOBiUfN53jeF7VDHFiCe2tlslegZoe6n_KMkkEMWqNdpRiMP-HyIHnscYGwMBHTsWXp-zbNitTRHNK3i0m8rm9oDV7shmWcN58xROpTieR5g62HcBKSSzY1Ah-Ef0OAbl3KtuRG3PiwTUgymSmSLV2hSHMtEpIYRbHWh0judlvQ8teaMMxmIUztgFXU88KD3j48Tog3rS5dwPLMn3VEju6nONic6FyAE3hRsudg2NtBFpJ6r26KH4dpXthqW57LqLtoaRrwlkO1cRSzad8E9fZ97Zv4QojXEzVqyExW2kBY80J_OZ4SMp0~) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/f0datfureq8MPrZwhPD4Zw~~/AAPPABA~/-2MaU3ivaunfV8691-UO4BCQ6ljAxQT8eMEKjudLNInyCov70eFChGuA0XphGpM4cQaFkKMNDBbhmKSMPeoNlpdRVX1109JmjendTh55EkoKXeSUjpbfMuvvyQIf6HUJQvjgKROQn-hih40HLxdMR4z9BuZJlgrDNGgaVnIJEbn6nNNeJ13mar8Ce4dGVWpHtnP4h5ZRI-o5JOZE1S_JgRzT8xMUk0dGmTfpYangJPni9MIwJuMcqLAnH_L2ySa86vGw2nUPm2AJWy4z0o3hqmVcPvBYITTCFPVhssS67LMfyxUEAWEZMT6gzMJz9tQF9G7Nw0okjGO11dl9Ui39ZxJvlpRZc2DUQW-J0Sd6v9QDBnjNc3ObqFXJMg9MvDv5)
