clean_body: | ~ | Peter, this is historic: ~ On Saturday, I stood before over 100,000 Americans on the National Mall, united in our fight against the Trump-Musk administration’s relentless assault on our freedoms and communities. ~ Our message to the billionaire-funded far-right authoritarian regime was clear: Hands OFF programs like Social Security and Medicare that working people have fought for and earned. Hands OFF our fellow Americans like our immigrant and LGBTQ+ neighbors. Hands OFF our fundamental rights. Now is not the time to be silent. Silence is complacency, and we will not be complacent in the face of this assault on our democracy and our fellow Americans. Now is the time for coming together. Now is the time for action. Peter, whether you marched with the 1,200+ protests across the country on Saturday or supported from home, you’re part of this movement by standing with my campaign. And I thank you for that. I understand that you can’t protest every day, but I have a duty in Congress to fight back with everything I have. And that’s exactly what I’m doing. But I need your help to keep this fight going. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | ~~ Thanks for your help. Maxwell | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. In 2022, he made history to become the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress. Maxwell isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you join our historic movement today? | ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. name: GOTV PAC
subject: Let’s recap!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter,
When we started this year, we made a commitment to our supporters. To you.
We said we would focus on the races that matter most — the ones that may not dominate the news cycle but determine whether working people have a voice in their communities and in our democracy.
Thanks to you, we’ve kept that promise.
We helped flip two key seats in Virginia’s General Assembly, giving Democrats the ability to fight for public education, protect reproductive rights, and stand up for everyday people. Then we turned to Wisconsin — where Elon Musk spent $21 million trying to buy a seat on the state Supreme Court. And we helped ensure Democrats won. By ten points!
And we did it by having the right strategy.
At GOTV PAC, we run one of the most effective and cost-efficient voter turnout models in the country. While other groups spend $75 or more to turn out a single voter, we do it in-house for just $10. That’s because we believe in talking to people — directly, respectfully, and consistently.
Now we’re turning to the next major fights: In Pennsylvania, three Democratic Supreme Court justices are up for retention. If we lose even one, we risk handing control of the court to those who would roll back voting rights, fair maps, and reproductive freedom.
We’re also staying focused on Virginia, where we have the opportunity to help Abigail Spanberger win the governorship and keep the state legislature in Democratic hands.
And this week, we’ll announce our next major statewide endorsement — because we don’t believe in “off years.”
If you can, we hope you’ll contribute today. Every single donation fuels the grassroots work that helps us win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04072025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=Email04072025] DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=Email04072025]
DONATE $60 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=60&refcode=Email04072025] DONATE $120 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=120&refcode=Email04072025]
OTHER AMOUNT → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04072025]
Let's keep moving forward together.
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04072025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04072025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-UFTIeK5E0CCzhE2NytL8Q2?unsubscribedata=o0XNoJ7fS%2B3SI7FZIakXbQv%2BMee2y%2BhNm5yXtBQhuZByCoBZ%2FCcq%2BgAmm5qoF%2BLo4z4Fh%2BDCwDAafviSYtYU7mLQPIA8fIivYmNV1h%2F4CQ48bYaeoyeAbg4RG%2BTUK8H3K5CXRouIRGlHj9kL7GKL5APFWwQPD%2B%2FpJly%2BTWbAB7c2cwfesGyQw4Qg6nE04%2F9FdW4t8%2FWQffQu62VT6ZIaH2%2BDA2ATumzunSxc7fqp4Xg2L1fP3Jjc9QGv%2F9y2fd2nmcg0CIzPgv4lkWiDXeR6z%2BEsbhBShurCjfRsL2FuV4vL%2FxKgVOPWTuEr1BmWtY0wjec6%2FfUU2050DC5JxCgWd6ICjNZe1VDWadqcBs8d0DqzkmfXP1%2BSq7b9gxlHA0GIi2zXJNbBOQGJ5zKyaYPYr5CWaAB8z6AxShxTWoM0Di4%3D .

name: Britney VanCitters
subject: LAST CALL: Peter, help us fight for the freedom to choose how we get around!
body:
You're invited to join OLCV and Move Oregon Forward Advocacy Day on April 17th! Make sure you RSVP before April 10th to join us.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105392220/538191694/1378362462?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkYzkzZDRjLTBhMTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=znlEaDw2zDaeJL8G1llawsQl4USuuUMrksnYs-XnM3s=&emci=33a94e1c-e213-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6dc93d4c-0a14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)

Hi Peter, We're coming up on **Move Oregon Forward's Advocacy Day on April 17th** , so I want to make sure you get the chance to register before it's too late! Join us in Salem to tell our state lawmakers why we need green neighborhoods with safe sidewalks, bike paths, public transit, and the freedom to choose how we get around. **[**The deadline to RSVP is April 10th, so add your name now!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105392221/538191695/1378362462?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkYzkzZDRjLTBhMTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=znlEaDw2zDaeJL8G1llawsQl4USuuUMrksnYs-XnM3s=&emci=33a94e1c-e213-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6dc93d4c-0a14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)** **Move Oregon Forward Advocacy Day****Thursday, April 17th****9 a.m. to 5 p.m.****Oregon State Capitol, Salem**
---
[**RSVP here**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105392222/538191696/1378362462?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkYzkzZDRjLTBhMTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=znlEaDw2zDaeJL8G1llawsQl4USuuUMrksnYs-XnM3s=&emci=33a94e1c-e213-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6dc93d4c-0a14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
OLCV has teamed up with [Move Oregon Forward](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105392223/538191697/-1295365595?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkYzkzZDRjLTBhMTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=znlEaDw2zDaeJL8G1llawsQl4USuuUMrksnYs-XnM3s=&emci=33a94e1c-e213-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6dc93d4c-0a14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230) to rally at the state capital on April 17th to build momentum and power for a transportation system that is safer, more equitable, and more affordable for all Oregonians. As lawmakers consider changing how we fund our transportation system, we need to ensure that every dollar delivers on our safety and climate goals while expanding financially sustainable and well-maintained transportation choices. We're ready to support funding ideas that reflect our values, as long as they’re fair and don't add to the burden working people already face. If you've already RSVP'd, thank you! Let this email be a reminder to add this event to your calendar if you haven't already. And if you are unable to attend, we are sorry to miss you! We look forward to an exciting and inspiring day of community, engagement, and transit justice advancement. Every Oregonian deserves clean air, healthy, vibrant communities, and the chance to thrive. Every voice makes a difference. Think of what we could do together! **[**Peter, will you add your voice and join us in Salem?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105392224/538191699/1378362462?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkYzkzZDRjLTBhMTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=znlEaDw2zDaeJL8G1llawsQl4USuuUMrksnYs-XnM3s=&emci=33a94e1c-e213-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6dc93d4c-0a14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)**

name: Fair Fight Action
subject: We’re asking you to contact your U.S. House member and tell them to oppose the so-called SAVE Act.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Donald Trump is destroying our economy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
A million minds are pricing the future and they are telling Trump’s White House our country is on the wrong track.
#

No other way to put it than that, folks.
**Donald Trump is destroying our economy.** The stock market isn’t a perfect indicator by any means, but it is a significant one. A million minds are pricing the future and they are telling Trump’s White House our country is on the wrong track.
No one will be spared the impacts. It’s going to hit whether you’re a senior citizen relying on your retirement income, or a parent buying groceries for your family, or someone fresh out of school trying to get your first job.
**Our entire economy is at risk, and it’s because of one person: Donald Trump.**
It doesn’t end there, either. On Friday night, we were voting on amendments well past midnight and into Saturday morning. While on the floor, I asked point blank: Can we agree that no one making more than $100 million per year should have lower taxes? Should be an easy answer — **NO**.
But, my Republican colleagues disagreed. They blocked my amendment and a ton more that would have prevented cuts to Medicaid, Medicare, Social Security, and vital services millions of families depend on. They advanced a budget proposal that would gut those services and give multi-millionaires and billionaires a massive tax break.
That’s the budget Trump told them to pass. These are the tariffs Trump campaigned on. **This is the economy Trump wants, and it’s hurting people like you.**
I’m going to use whatever influence I have as a Senator to convince my colleagues of that, and to use the power delegated to us in the Constitution to be a check on Trump’s agenda and limit the damage he’s doing to our country.
The stakes are too high to do anything less.
Hold fast, we’ll get through this.
Mark

🚀 Wait! Before you go: 🧑🚀
[**If you can afford it, we are humbly asking you to make a donation to Mark Kelly’s Senate campaign.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1420?c0=mek-em-apr25.PaWJ-V&refcode=em250407-1-90&t=1&akid=6037%2E6688874%2ESCzdvt) As Mark holds the line, it’s on us to defend him and make sure he has the resources he needs to fight back. Any amount helps, and it adds up fast when tons of us are chipping in together.
**[DONATE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-apr25.P7mRSa&refcode=em250407-1-90&t=2&akid=6037%2E6688874%2ESCzdvt)**
Thank you!

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=6037%2E6688874%2ESCzdvt).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Kim Schrier
subject: As a pediatrician, World Health Day means a lot to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
SIGN ON >> [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105392296/538192025/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGY4NzI0Ni0wYjE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u3rkqtfTHhF3WPC9GYCmKzh9CpkY2eWPhdrtJ8_rshg=&emci=42d91f03-fd13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=68f87246-0b14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Today is World Health Day, a time to reflect on the progress we’ve made in global health and the critical work still ahead. This year’s theme is maternal and newborn health care—a cause that is deeply personal to me.

I’m a pediatrician.

I spent my career caring for newborns and their families, witnessing firsthand how crucial and sometimes risky those first moments of life are—not just for babies, but for their mothers, too. I ran for office because I saw the gaps in our healthcare system and knew we needed leaders who would fight to close them.

**Days like today serve as a reminder that the fight is far from over.**

Right now, too many families— _especially those in rural areas_ —don’t have access to the doctors they need for a safe and healthy delivery.

Too many mothers are dismissed when they say something feels wrong, and too many babies start life without the healthcare they need to grow into strong, healthy adults. That’s just plain wrong. And it’s why I’m fighting harder than ever to protect maternal and newborn health.

We can do so much more to ensure every mother gets the care she deserves, every baby has a healthy start, and every child reaches their full potential. That means investing in rural healthcare and expanding access to life-saving maternal and reproductive care.

[**Every family deserves access to quality healthcare, add your name to stand with me in this fight. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105392297/538192026/2096548394?ms=em25_250407_whd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&refcode=em25_250407_whd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&source=em25_250407_whd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250407_whd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Y1nqHwb8o65rw1cAwz8I2ZC7C0JUFvAHDc8pG/+WyGOA+OCHAJHw90jOBNyTNKipiLawZ3QQTxtdTf3PovsFEElJW3liu2bSCgb9HthESkFr5hsG7tFg2VlcQkx8vEWAjc7pkX/dKUXqb1aQLR3q2Th+CJbI207wDJS3bkZj7mI=&refcode2=68f87246-0b14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGY4NzI0Ni0wYjE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u3rkqtfTHhF3WPC9GYCmKzh9CpkY2eWPhdrtJ8_rshg=&emci=42d91f03-fd13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=68f87246-0b14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15820338) [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105392298/538192027/2096548394?ms=em25_250407_whd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&refcode=em25_250407_whd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&source=em25_250407_whd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250407_whd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Y1nqHwb8o65rw1cAwz8I2ZC7C0JUFvAHDc8pG/+WyGOA+OCHAJHw90jOBNyTNKipiLawZ3QQTxtdTf3PovsFEElJW3liu2bSCgb9HthESkFr5hsG7tFg2VlcQkx8vEWAjc7pkX/dKUXqb1aQLR3q2Th+CJbI207wDJS3bkZj7mI=&refcode2=68f87246-0b14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGY4NzI0Ni0wYjE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u3rkqtfTHhF3WPC9GYCmKzh9CpkY2eWPhdrtJ8_rshg=&emci=42d91f03-fd13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=68f87246-0b14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15820338)
Thank you for being part of this movement.

clean_body: SIGN ON >> Peter, Today is World Health Day, a time to reflect on the progress we’ve made in global health and the critical work still ahead. This year’s theme is maternal and newborn health care—a cause that is deeply personal to me. I’m a pediatrician. I spent my career caring for newborns and their families, witnessing firsthand how crucial and sometimes risky those first moments of life are—not just for babies, but for their mothers, too. I ran for office because I saw the gaps in our healthcare system and knew we needed leaders who would fight to close them. Days like today serve as a reminder that the fight is far from over. Right now, too many families— especially those in rural areas —don’t have access to the doctors they need for a safe and healthy delivery. Too many mothers are dismissed when they say something feels wrong, and too many babies start life without the healthcare they need to grow into strong, healthy adults. That’s just plain wrong. And it’s why I’m fighting harder than ever to protect maternal and newborn health. We can do so much more to ensure every mother gets the care she deserves, every baby has a healthy start, and every child reaches their full potential. That means investing in rural healthcare and expanding access to life-saving maternal and reproductive care. Thank you for being part of this movement. Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress.
